subject: We’re making gains

body:
Well, I think we all know the answer to that is HECK NO. |
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0caca77e652c474f9cb7e2d7e883b6ec&_e=e2mwtojlUhJLTOdKvWvx2UiswNVUWVCncrcj_R9CxDs0DGGlwOlZ-sqfhlYTi-WKoCSKlTS3UngW0ZuNpPUq0LMlSKnIphDCK-vunB7wd39zPI1AWSqWWIjlUE5N9ThprRfV1xlE0cXujTImCiJQLidJRITNA_WptNUo30yQ3IrkdjHpkaqLVhCycfBLjsWEBpevxgQmaAP0EeRSRZm3WoGpLt7MS5wqbxQ_OHgKbnvjy3LCsLgsfHHieB84NfsZseRneMc-gDIybp5ECcskXxq9f587LkhkFaQb1oCpPqrQMXo3XKrMyUethsd25ugaaNP8yAz9LlnF__Vjxzvgm0w_LcwPWP6lNWpE5pUmI3Ny0cmRb-QrV_WqN99_LOkQX-HgIBDZDn3Uh02USlIrc4hajpimwAnmTcD-HZ4P0bZ4A09MCV__Me2lWiMCfCxDBzzYr8wqJ73Iee6Ci7J98W2PkhWAPmruchaHGQ4rgO6sr1CaRFIhYO_pV7fj0gtt62Tt492CxJmCnWmWMENXBA%3D%3D)

---
Fellow American, as a top Republican supporter, I wanted to let you know how we are laying the groundwork to win the midterms in less than 100 days.

**Exceptional ground game.**

If you’re wondering what that means, let me explain. The RNC is recruiting thousands of volunteers to knock doors and make phone calls in communities across the nation.

Essentially, our unmatched data-driven ground game and a grassroots army of volunteers is spreading the Republican Party’s message in every community across the country!

Our commitment to engage with voters at the community level is how we will take back the House and Senate this November. Elections are won on the ground, which is why I am emailing you today. [**Outreach efforts come with a price tag, and we need some fundraising support to ensure we have enough in the bank to cover our costs for the next three months.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0caca77e652c474f9cb7e2d7e883b6ec&_e=e2mwtojlUhJLTOdKvWvx2UiswNVUWVCncrcj_R9CxDs0DGGlwOlZ-sqfhlYTi-WKoCSKlTS3UngW0ZuNpPUq0LMlSKnIphDCK-vunB7wd39zPI1AWSqWWIjlUE5N9ThprRfV1xlE0cXujTImCiJQLidJRITNA_WptNUo30yQ3IrkdjHpkaqLVhCycfBLjsWEBpevxgQmaAP0EeRSRZm3WoGpLt7MS5wqbxQ_OHgKbnvjy3LCsLgsfHHieB84NfsZseRneMc-gDIybp5ECcskXxq9f587LkhkFaQb1oCpPqoSgR6PHMJzJlKtp53-_slyLzwtT9nFnMy3512mkQFirxiGiBSJRP--UNmeVxSZS24QMoIMH8L8PLTzlFMpQcb_cJyR16kzoquZ8h8nyTBEIi_kOB8dLXZI5gmegfYyKd2QucEJKXyGf5Mo_iprptsHMcz5F4mioEMsRebcdlxNpYSNIk3QfrVyr1INqiuG6wq57GpmlNpDHUap_j_Qmepr2FLFiLvUap8-v7F4LCgSIA%3D%3D)

[** Fuel our Outreach efforts >> **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=0caca77e652c474f9cb7e2d7e883b6ec&_e=e2mwtojlUhJLTOdKvWvx2UiswNVUWVCncrcj_R9CxDs0DGGlwOlZ-sqfhlYTi-WKoCSKlTS3UngW0ZuNpPUq0LMlSKnIphDCK-vunB7wd39zPI1AWSqWWIjlUE5N9ThprRfV1xlE0cXujTImCiJQLidJRITNA_WptNUo30yQ3IrkdjHpkaqLVhCycfBLjsWEBpevxgQmaAP0EeRSRZm3WoGpLt7MS5wqbxQ_OHgKbnvjy3LCsLgsfHHieB84NfsZseRneMc-gDIybp5ECcskXxq9f587LkhkFaQb1oCpPqqsCbGFZcAqMBrR1aVMI1v-qmfJc2Po8Sf8UNRJHqDulpjEegktepqUyMVP0JKfGzPKYNJzAaRd9Zgwm-EueFLcVjHiLXmLIRYA0FlB2Pbvku_IjQe0fpfMxGAHTLFuRVNAsPLWJyfHmpkgp7YNT6tnXr_urDFs0XAvFTjwidbeJMQLuCr-2oiQItlRzD54yqtYulPgnln7d4LBp2V9A2kUa_X2MbLVspuUBCXRx4RHMQ%3D%3D)
We are also ramping up our minority outreach, opening over 30 community centers geared toward minority voters. Recent polling shows Hispanics have shifted overwhelmingly towards the GOP, and we have a record number of Black Republicans running for Congress. These community centers are important because they provide a platform for minorities to tell potential voters WHY they joined the Republican party.

clean_body: Well, I think we all know the answer to that is HECK NO. | Fellow American, as a top Republican supporter, I wanted to let you know how we are laying the groundwork to win the midterms in less than 100 days. Exceptional ground game. If you’re wondering what that means, let me explain. The RNC is recruiting thousands of volunteers to knock doors and make phone calls in communities across the nation. Essentially, our unmatched data-driven ground game and a grassroots army of volunteers is spreading the Republican Party’s message in every community across the country! Our commitment to engage with voters at the community level is how we will take back the House and Senate this November. Elections are won on the ground, which is why I am emailing you today. We are also ramping up our minority outreach, opening over 30 community centers geared toward minority voters. Recent polling shows Hispanics have shifted overwhelmingly towards the GOP, and we have a record number of Black Republicans running for Congress. These community centers are important because they provide a platform for minorities to tell potential voters WHY they joined the Republican party. We are in crunch time and things are only going to get busier. We’re planning our budget and looking at how we can stretch our resources for the next three months and we know we want to put more into our outreach efforts. Let’s keep making gains across the country and WIN! Sincerely, Ronna McDaniel Chairwoman of the Republican National Committee (RNC) | | Paid for by the Republican National Committee. clean_body: This election, everything is on the line. We can win back the Senate majority, but we cannot do it without friends like you. | Fellow American, We wanted to show you some recent polling from our critical U.S. Senate race in Georgia: Walker 46% -- Warnock 46% Walker 43% -- Warnock 46% After running $25 million of attack ads against me, the Democrats expected this race to be a blowout in favor of Senator Raphael Warnock, but the race is a TOSS-UP. It's still TOO CLOSE TO CALL. Raphael Warnock has over $22 million in the bank, so this current ad blitz is just the beginning of what he and liberal Super PACs supporting him will spend to defeat us. To stay on pace, it all depends on you. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: This election, everything is on the line. We can win back the Senate majority, but we cannot do it without friends like you. Fellow American, I'm personally asking for your help. Your support today will help us win in Georgia, flip the Senate, and save America! Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Haley Barbour
subject: it’s my job to make sure Tony is prepared
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
Derek,

As Tony’s Finance Director, it’s on me to
make sure he has enough resources to fund his campaign and fight back
against Republican attacks.

That is a lot of pressure, especially since Tony’s opponent is an
obscenely wealthy businessman willing to spread conspiracy theories and
amplify Trump’s worst lies.

If he beats Tony, we could lose abortion rights, access to birth control,
and fair elections.

[ https://go.tonyevers.com/go/1238?amount=10&refcode=TE_EM_FR_3MU_20220814_1_5&t=1001&akid=3837%2E1827488%2EBBVv5C ]That’s why I need your help to make sure we close our $31,500 budget
gap before our first week of the general election deadline at midnight!
Any contribution is greatly appreciated!

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation
will process immediately.

subject: I pulled your record and here’s what it shows:
body:
As one of our best supporters, I hope you’ll answer the call. | | |
---
| | Hi – I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but our team is running dangerously short of our mid-month fundraising goal – **and the consequences could spell disaster for state Democrats if we don’t catch up NOW.** To get us back on track, I pulled our supporters’ records to see who’s given this month. Does this look right? | **Name** | **Email** | **Status** | **Suggested Gift**
---|---|---|---
Janet M. | \-- | Contributed | N/A
**On File** | **[_dpwillis67@gmail.com_](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZBD3kRTEYjFcAcryIttCCkRmGjZldTjASeCx9bdPHEaXws8EqfhPHJytXVK-vMAogseaZRPaMTgUJbl_9m50iPR6M4R7cQa3ml25uBMFeaualD0RvGI5J1kbnDIRd-VUVGENzTZF7Jyh372jKI8tcMYYRk6XBioiIImDyQMIbdyssETbv93PowFIrIMxTl_GVYzSbcOnqfpYBGdY1jJI3t1AAo9zAMWccnVVbxDjEFtDHbSAZi2YicH5u9PV37GPdFe1GOYlIyVbwcWhMN3raqekEYP0pK9vXcJAiXfstm6UDVKskSXsB69PwhRLocrcFMoCW3tDFdO3zGdPwYzI3oUFPE7BVQTglJZjZAqN_M-MRGZwYnrL8367wg5bVVzFz9sNHhdE_dLRjHBPIIgqLsZG0TNUjuNIPCyN2Bxezl0bWDMzdVBqp_opR3j8U5OE4-tq-F_MOT6hgCCtKtPireWh4StaNoc70N9EsM1Ttc-aRM_803Bg4VvUiDTTqsMUq0KFag-fZvpZyTA4ol_us-A/3ol/fDtnzRKJTGqqGSA2RLWc0A/h0/yWHNx2h7lBvq6ijhJrgfRfpGhrsaNw8QqzV35x85P60)** | **PENDING** | **$7**
Tom K. | \-- | Contributed | N/A
Joe C. | \-- | Contributed | N/A
If everyone who received this email donated $7, we wouldn’t need to send another email for this entire month. But that’s isn’t how this works – not even close.
**However, if just a few more Democrats in your state chip in before our midnight deadline, then it should be enough to put our fundraising back on track.**
[Can you chip in an urgent $7 right now to help our team close the gap? Every dollar will be put to work right away to help elect state Democrats.](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZBD3kRTEYjFcAcryIttCCkRmGjZldTjASeCx9bdPHEaXws8EqfhPHJytXVK-vMAogseaZRPaMTgUJbl_9m50iPR6M4R7cQa3ml25uBMFeaualD0RvGI5J1kbnDIRd-VUVGENzTZF7Jyh372jKI8tcMYYRk6XBioiIImDyQMIbdys4xknqHN9s-WmDfCayDQyl1u0y4CWS3mcxx-hxzlNHehje0J2qhkMS3GzAWxBjx4_kXm5HY-APCyNggCqyPKZljjVcrN0OkT0ROrV2BmJaf_syVorpxtn1d80jcjVk2TtpAHZ9tbHmi1YUTYwRLKUP2HBJiexEIgUyRbg6CeNnJ0s5eYEDdLjKB4ke0RkTDjTT6oR3NxLd_h9gosFrOsSHzKLtodG6-KUSix3sH_5ZupKmjZamEaYCZEcvNVGsnRKZSKqKopips-KXu7plpYdfzgvz4114CXrBamBLO5TFzsBKWioGkBbtwkIJaPNsgu-0k5O2u0GS0UQdH1coGT_xEiBOMWmNBLf0xtaKkpKyKA/3ol/fDtnzRKJTGqqGSA2RLWc0A/h1/tPjpwR3Ms0kA9Mer63dC7PD_OkgP49VnwsI08bPve90)
Falling behind on our fundraising _right now_ has me nervous, and here’s why:
* Republicans have already dumped over $12 million dollars into unseating Democrats, and they're poised to pour even more money into the field;
* Trump’s PAC has more money than the Democratic and Republican parties COMBINED – which means we desperately need resources to out-organize, out-message, and out-work the GOP;
* And thousands of state legislative seats are on the ballot this year – and early investment in winning these races is _critical_ to flipping state legislatures

Each of these fights is too important to sit out – and your support is the key that makes it possible to give it our all on every front. That’s why I have to ask one more time:
[ Be one of the Democrats we need in your state to fight back and pull ahead of Republicans: Rush a $7 donation to help us elect Democrats to statehouses across the country >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zuyS4eKwwkxoMC1O7i3AUZBD3kRTEYjFcAcryIttCCkRmGjZldTjASeCx9bdPHEaXws8EqfhPHJytXVK-vMAogseaZRPaMTgUJbl_9m50iPR6M4R7cQa3ml25uBMFeaualD0RvGI5J1kbnDIRd-VUVGENzTZF7Jyh372jKI8tcMYYRk6XBioiIImDyQMIbdytRcp959Vj65XunHHtRJJc30cIBZwSIiSNspEyYrAWPu2itcA_2PLsY6NoXd0RBui5TeQu_YVxCQzullxM9cVFFll5pYF3MWqOO9lCb9JN_nm18kTm-XWMUOImWupYPYtPtJZX1X1CBqd9rVdiMo7SLi1V8nXnctVnd3hkYQADTiEjgTnbnUhrN621KVDuU_oaaIQrK_E3nYJKW_5o0vKdREZoztcN5xo-KpXZgh1D4tCFhyfljDyyhLEFV3lsDIOD2jLBniIfWzipbezHPIrA4WXE9GaRd_0ewS8RTywFAnn0rz0EY7M_tsbTCSJzjYExt8gUdFn7763ipyHqb0yjx0haXVM1xDlVBNRDQN4NcGA/3ol/fDtnzRKJTGqqGSA2RLWc0A/h2/6zAj6QcNubUu1HOKgnH8yF0saf0UptlgnZ5je-ZrMc8)

clean_body: As one of our best supporters, I hope you’ll answer the call. | | | | | Hi – I hate to be the bearer of bad news, but our team is running dangerously short of our mid-month fundraising goal – and the consequences could spell disaster for state Democrats if we don’t catch up NOW. To get us back on track, I pulled our supporters’ records to see who’s given this month. Does this look right? | Name | Email | Status | Suggested Gift ---|---|---|--- Janet M. | \-- | Contributed | N/A On File | | PENDING | $7 Tom K. | \-- | Contributed | N/A Joe C. | \-- | Contributed | N/A If everyone who received this email donated $7, we wouldn’t need to send another email for this entire month. But that’s isn’t how this works – not even close. However, if just a few more Democrats in your state chip in before our midnight deadline, then it should be enough to put our fundraising back on track. Falling behind on our fundraising right now has me nervous, and here’s why: Republicans have already dumped over $12 million dollars into unseating Democrats, and they're poised to pour even more money into the field; Trump’s PAC has more money than the Democratic and Republican parties COMBINED – which means we desperately need resources to out-organize, out-message, and out-work the GOP; And thousands of state legislative seats are on the ballot this year – and early investment in winning these races is critical to flipping state legislatures Each of these fights is too important to sit out – and your support is the key that makes it possible to give it our all on every front. That’s why I have to ask one more time: If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thank you for all you do to make sure state Democrats can fight and win at the ballot box. Jose Cornejo VP Digital, DLCC ** | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. subject: This is it!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Branco for Hawai'i](https://patrickbranco
body:
There are only a few hours left to vote before the polls close at 7pm, and my team needs your help to ensure every last vote gets counted. |
---
| | [ ](https://patrickbranco.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=de935e592040886098d776676&id=b4357085f1&e=f86b831aa4)
---
| | Aloha mai, today is the day! **First of all, I want to say _mahalo nui loa_ for everything you’ve done to make this campaign possible. **Whether you sign waved, called neighbors, donated to my campaign, or attended an event, I am incredibly grateful for your support and couldn't be more proud of the grassroots movement we built here in Hawaiʻi’s 2nd Congressional District. Now it's up to the people of Hawaiʻi to pick the Democratic nominee. There are only a few hours left to vote before the polls close at 7pm, and my team needs your help to ensure every last vote gets counted. **[This is it, mai. Please support my team’s organizing efforts one last time so we can get as many people to the polls before they close at 7pm >>](https://patrickbranco.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=de935e592040886098d776676&id=a7d5098e24&e=f86b831aa4)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

we need to hear from you ASAP

| Peter, with Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock falling in the polls, and our Senate Majority on the line, _we only have two options for how to respond:_

** OPTION ONE: ** We don’t pay attention, remaining confident that Warnock can win without our help. _And we wake up to the devastating news of a Republican Senate Majority the day after the election._

** OPTION TWO: ** We hit our $20,000 goal before tomorrow at midnight, give Democrats like Raphael Warnock the support they need, and we WIN!

[Option two is clearly the only way, Peter. name: Tim Ryan
subject: Mudslinging
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18823?t=1014&amount=3&akid=5044%2E3611125%2E1r2RuB ][IMG]

Hey folks,

We only have a few days left to reach our $300,000 Mid-Quarter goal. I
need you to pitch in $3 right now to help us reach our goal. Here are 3
reasons why:

1. Polls have me two points ahead of my right-wing extremist opponent JD
Vance. We need resources right now—not just on Election Day—to close the
gap and get ahead.

2. JD Vance and the far-right billionaires backing his campaign are
dumping millions of dollars into Ohio to attack me on the airwaves. They
know this seat is the most important Senate race on the map, and they’ve
got money to burn.

3. Ohio will decide Senate control and this race is Democrats’ best chance
at flipping a seat blue. A Democratic Senate will protect abortion, expand
voting rights, and cut workers in on the deal. We cannot afford to lose.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18823?t=1015&amount=3&akid=5044%2E3611125%2E1r2RuB ]Folks, can you chip in $3 right now to help us reach our
looming Mid-Quarter goal? Your donation could mean the difference between
winning this seat or handing over the Senate majority to Mitch McConnell.

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18823?t=1016&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=5044%2E3611125%2E1r2RuB ]Donate $3 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18823?t=1017&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5044%2E3611125%2E1r2RuB ]Donate $25
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18823?t=1018&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=5044%2E3611125%2E1r2RuB ]Donate $50 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18823?t=1019&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=5044%2E3611125%2E1r2RuB ]Donate $100
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18823?t=1020&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=5044%2E3611125%2E1r2RuB ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18823?t=1021&amount=30&akid=5044%2E3611125%2E1r2RuB ]Other Amount

JD’s campaign is floundering. A string of bad headlines has national
Republicans freaking out about their chances of winning in Ohio. So,
they’re pulling out all the stops to tear me down.

I have to admit, I’m a little nervous now that the GOP has started
attacking me on the airwaves.

If we can’t raise the funds we need to combat their mudslinging, this race
is as good as lost.

To flip Ohio blue and expand our Democratic Senate majority, we need
grassroots dollars to compete. That’s where you come in:

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18823?t=1007&amount=3&akid=5044%2E3611125%2E1r2RuB ]If we’re going to compete with JD Vance and his billionaire backers, we
need to reach our Mid-Quarter fundraising goal and keep up our momentum.
Can I count on you to rush $3 now?

If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18823?t=1008&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=5044%2E3611125%2E1r2RuB ]Donate $3 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18823?t=1009&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5044%2E3611125%2E1r2RuB ]Donate $25

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18823?t=1012&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=5044%2E3611125%2E1r2RuB ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/18823?t=1013&amount=30&akid=5044%2E3611125%2E1r2RuB ]Other Amount

Thanks,

Tim Ryan

name: Presidential Alert
subject: re: new Gallup poll -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | |
---
**URGENT via Gallup: America’s standing abroad is SOARING thanks to President Biden’s leadership!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/8427?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220813-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220813-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=5883%2E9716520%2ERG2uEP)
**Now, we need to know where you stand:****Do you approve of President Biden?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8427?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220813-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220813-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=5883%2E9716520%2ERG2uEP)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/8427?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220813-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220813-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=5883%2E9716520%2ERG2uEP)
---

Team, **President Biden is showing us what real leadership looks like** ‐‐ _and the world is taking notice._

A recent Gallup poll shows that after **_years_** of Trump undermining America's allies abroad, our country's standing in the world is finally SOARING again!

But while President Biden works to secure our nation and democracy, **Republicans are still slamming him and obstructing his agenda at every turn.**

We need to show President Biden that Democrats are standing with him during this pivotal moment -- _but we’re still missing 17 responses from Pennsylvania!_

**Please, lock in your response before midnight:**

**Do you approve of President Biden?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/8427?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220813-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220813-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=5883%2E9716520%2ERG2uEP)
---
| [No](https://go.dscc.org/go/8427?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20220813-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20220813-PresidentialAlert-StandingAbroad-Pros-sl1&akid=5883%2E9716520%2ERG2uEP)
---

Thank you,

Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q3?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=5883_9716520_RG2uEP&akid=5883%2E9716520%2ERG2uEP)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=5883%2E9716520%2ERG2uEP)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=5883%2E9716520%2ERG2uEP)** to unsubscribe.

Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc.org](https://www.dscc.org/)** | Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Chairwoman Ronna McDaniel
subject: Sharing the secret sauce to winning the midterms
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Republican National Committee
body:
|
[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=8fbcc87852d045efb601909255757a40&_e=iGa_-oGCkbgzDk-FqzL5Ps3m1iBbQJFRaNYt6PgLGnSscix8tSiBIY2j-DDM2sMr6HFgUFPNX_WzNnNZUio3cHK7v_TSPJUxYnUgq_b6N-oB1PQOPOn2nlo0_9FvCJR51muDh26OAbdKCknOFsMbeMvpREZKdjpC8ZD6hvgJqru2DV9GPOOJ2oHJtOKJPC6n27BOAbeHROLCVNyA8BeEhVEz6GSkeepcHMatm1bPNUN5CxNCHk9ZMI95jjm8YL_2tvbuje7ERnJCukNE6j5vwQYV9C3752TREq-6UyBBHTxxSEqDVlDjo8b8R_8T3L_Qf-MgcjmP7n-MOYjOgr8I9QbCWhCrGk0778n23dWA4KyZQ0DEXzjLXT5pr0vxRTywkL62JicydjQRna2f3neDmIIrow51Rqeox-CuR3SBgdBWYmKkFF_rGvgISJCNaPcyr_sTu2fq-nmeYGolP0_duW0Gfy39bvuu_AJtv9QcgDBKKjm8L8WI3ks4s7lXMH4XzuxgewsKlYnUI9b3VYGz2Q%3D%3D)

---
Peter, as a top Republican supporter, I wanted to let you know how we are laying the groundwork to win the midterms in less than 100 days.

**Exceptional ground game.**

If you’re wondering what that means, let me explain. The RNC is recruiting thousands of volunteers to knock doors and make phone calls in communities across the nation.

Essentially, our unmatched data-driven ground game and a grassroots army of volunteers is spreading the Republican Party’s message in every community across the country!

Our commitment to engage with voters at the community level is how we will take back the House and Senate this November. Elections are won on the ground, which is why I am emailing you today. [**Outreach efforts come with a price tag, and we need some fundraising support to ensure we have enough in the bank to cover our costs for the next three months.**](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=8fbcc87852d045efb601909255757a40&_e=iGa_-oGCkbgzDk-FqzL5Ps3m1iBbQJFRaNYt6PgLGnSscix8tSiBIY2j-DDM2sMr6HFgUFPNX_WzNnNZUio3cHK7v_TSPJUxYnUgq_b6N-oB1PQOPOn2nlo0_9FvCJR51muDh26OAbdKCknOFsMbeMvpREZKdjpC8ZD6hvgJqru2DV9GPOOJ2oHJtOKJPC6n27BOAbeHROLCVNyA8BeEhVEz6GSkeepcHMatm1bPNUN5CxNCHk9ZMI95jjm8YL_2tvbuje7ERnJCukNE6j5vwQYV9C3752TREq-6UyBBHTxxSEqDVlDjo8b8R_8T3L_QXwDnKE2lD6JwTV5tQ0ceirFUnp8slGXbH2XqF1eEFf_yXQ4IM326fNkZUPaHCdjYdwXFMqvqTKjlWnXMFMmW0tuzY_EbhpM0zMY4JJM8pL6zm5NnNtHA1ROrNPBOtBfKhyjzPYV_wz2MBFbYW-spuWbsgcaeMVWb2mVYh33Lyz38SYZ3XCwIPYxmDPs-Y2x_dfKTfZUSr1M3kL_SsaF4bg%3D%3D)

Of course, despite pretending to care about Orange County voters, Katie Porter was right there with Nancy Pelosi voting in favor of the tax increase.

But we've dug through our records and couldn't track down whether YOU are one of the Maddow Show's millions of viewers. Please, lock in your response TONIGHT so we have your corrected information on file: ANSWER MISSING OR OUTDATED: Do you watch The Rachel Maddow Show? | | | If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded. name: Pat Fallon
subject: I met with President Trump this week
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FALLON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Do you support freedom of speech?

Peter,

It's hard to believe, but Election Day is only 3 months away.
On the surface, that may sound like a lot of time, but in the
course of an election campaign, that time absolutely flies by.
We've still got a lot of work to do between now and November.

These midterm elections are probably the most critical midterm
elections in our lifetime. That might sound extreme, but I'm
really not exaggerating.

Nancy Pelosi and the left-wing money machine are working
overtime in their attempt to stop us from reclaiming a Republican
Majority!

If there's one thing the Dems are good at, it's riling up their
base and getting them to donate. We absolutely must match them
dollar for dollar if we want to take back Congress.

Why do we need to take back Congress?

1. End the Democrat economic disaster that has caused the
highest inflation in 40 years and highest gas prices EVER.

2. Stop Biden's open borders agenda that have led to an all-out
invasion on our Southern Border that shows no signs of slowing
down.

3. Prevent the woke leftist social agenda from brainwashing our
children and destroying American ideals.

4. Secure the integrity of our elections and stop radical
Democrats from enacting laws that prevent us from securing our
elections.

We've got a lot of work to do, and the stakes for our country
couldn't be higher. Please chip in anything you can today to help
us ensure a conservative victory!

Thank you and God bless!

Pat Fallon

Conservative Congressman TX-04

body:

**_[BREAKING: THE FBI RAIDED PRESIDENT TRUMP'S HOME: MAR-A-LAGO](https://secure.winred.com/save-america-joint-fundraising-committee/mar-a-lago-fbi-c001-ext001?amount=50&recurring=true&money_pledge=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=d001_d001_na&utm_campaign=20220809_mar-a-lago–fbi-raid-launch_donaldjtrump_saveamerica&utm_content=donate_cpyrs_recTE73DiPZb9i5Gr-10418&leadcreated=false)_**
** **
Peter,

These are dark times for our Nation, as my beautiful home, Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach, Florida, was raided, and occupied by a large group of FBI agents.

Nothing like this has ever happened to a President of the United States before, and it's important that you know that it wasn't just my home that was violated - _it was the home of every patriotic American who I have been fighting for since that iconic moment I came down the Golden Escalators in 2015._

**I stood up to the Radical Left's corruption. I restored power to the people and truly delivered for our Country like we have never seen before.__The establishment hated it.__**

Now, as they watch my endorsed candidates win big victories and see my dominance in all polls, they are trying to stop the Republican Party and me once more. **The lawlessness, political persecution, and Witch Hunt, must be exposed and stopped.**

As long as I have your support, I will continue to fight for the Great American People. I need every single red-blooded American Patriot to step up during this time.

name: Great America Update
subject: Top US Doctor: Sugar is not the problem (This Is)
body:
We’ve been told for years now that sugar is the cause of all our problems. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6243%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=r98YYAyZ4KDL1hUhMW1v5A&sysid=1)
Dear Reader,

Please find a special health message from our paid sponsor. Sponsorships like this allow us to offer you our services free of charge. We appreciate your support.
---
We’ve been told for years now that sugar is the cause of all our problems.

Weight gain. Digestive problems. Sluggishness. Insulin resistance and disease... More and more health experts put the blame on too much sugar in the diet for all these health issues, and more.

**However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry -- a world-renowned heart surgeon -- eliminating sugar isn’t the answer to feeling good again.**

"About 75% of the food we eat has sugar added to it," says Dr. Gundry. “It’s unrealistic to ask people to stop eating sugar."

Instead, he says he’s discovered a way to fight back against the negative effects too much sugar has on the body - without having to stop eating it.

Consistent overconsumption of sugar can cause a harmful condition known as "metabolic slowdown." Warning signs include unwanted belly flab, "brain fog", slower metabolism, tiredness, constipation, and even difficulty concentrating. **Metabolic slowdown currently affects tens of millions of Americans.**

Dr. Gundry explains, "Metabolic slowdown usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But the damage caused by sugar-laden foods is not normal."

The good news is, this problem can be easily fixed from your own home, with a method Dr. Gundry has developed himself. **"It's very simple. My technique is a way to help your body better process the sugar you eat, so that it’s being used as energy - not stored as fat," he says.**

By employing this relatively basic process, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of people make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)

People are also reporting **dramatically improved digestion, more energy, and feeling healthier than they have in years.**

Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release a free informative video to the public showcasing exactly how his Metabolic Slowdown solution works- without changing your diet, and enjoying the foods you love to eat, guilt-free.

"My mission is to help everyday Americans achieve good health," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled."

The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on various social media platforms, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.

[**Click here to watch the presentation:**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c75583%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=D8W323a3pE2OBoFeQMaLig&sysid=1)

[ ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c75584%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=njH88UcKF7ig39myvpF1Sw&sysid=1)

[**Watch The Video** ](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c75595%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=vhWyBwZW0LDdI2nOR7enkQ&sysid=1) Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities.

Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives.

Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible."

[**Click here to watch the presentation**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c75596%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=W8kOkV2QNMwTxlnsCT4uyA&sysid=1)

*individual results may vary.

---

_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6243%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=r98YYAyZ4KDL1hUhMW1v5A&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6243%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=r98YYAyZ4KDL1hUhMW1v5A&sysid=1)

Dear Reader,

Please find a special health message from our paid sponsor. Sponsorships like this allow us to offer you our services free of charge. We appreciate your support.
---
We’ve been told for years now that sugar is the cause of all our problems.

Weight gain. Digestive problems. Sluggishness. Insulin resistance and disease... More and more health experts put the blame on too much sugar in the diet for all these health issues, and more.

**However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — eliminating sugar isn’t the answer to feeling good again.**

"About 75% of the food we eat has sugar added to it," says Dr. Gundry. “It’s unrealistic to ask people to stop eating sugar."

Instead, he says he’s discovered a way to fight back against the negative effects too much sugar has on the body - without having to stop eating it.

Consistent overconsumption of sugar can cause a harmful condition known as "metabolic slowdown." Warning signs include unwanted belly flab, "brain fog", slower metabolism, tiredness, constipation, and even difficulty concentrating. **Metabolic slowdown currently affects tens of millions of Americans.**

Dr. Gundry explains, "Metabolic slowdown usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But the damage caused by sugar-laden foods is not normal."

The good news is, this problem can be easily fixed from your own home, with a method Dr. Gundry has developed himself. **"It's very simple. My technique is a way to help your body better process the sugar you eat, so that it’s being used as energy - not stored as fat," he says.**

By employing this relatively basic process, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of people make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)

People are also reporting **dramatically improved digestion, more energy, and feeling healthier than they have in years.**

Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release a free informative video to the public showcasing exactly how his Metabolic Slowdown solution works- without changing your diet, and enjoying the foods you love to eat, guilt-free.

"My mission is to help everyday Americans achieve good health," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled."

The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on various social media platforms, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.

[**Click here to watch the presentation:**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zehaqmn146t55corrblj7f9sbn6e7kiv60ug8830_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm8oj3c5h2bs)

[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zu85sot2esdrr071e675fr9i8v02o53s8qootkfg_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm8oj3c5h2bs)

[**Watch The Video**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlhh0jit4tisebb98nrd8nnnj1gdovkj4chpr8n0_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm8oj3c5h2bs) Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities.

Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives.

Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible."

[**Click here to watch the presentation**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zfh3ccdt3uonj3f3l5gccqkrdj66budig4rm8moo_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm8oj3c5h2bs)

Dear Reader,

Please find a special health message from our paid sponsor. Sponsorships like this allow us to offer you our services free of charge. We appreciate your support.
---
We’ve been told for years now that sugar is the cause of all our problems.

Weight gain. Digestive problems. Sluggishness. Insulin resistance and disease... More and more health experts put the blame on too much sugar in the diet for all these health issues, and more.

**However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — eliminating sugar isn’t the answer to feeling good again.**

"About 75% of the food we eat has sugar added to it," says Dr. Gundry. “It’s unrealistic to ask people to stop eating sugar."

Instead, he says he’s discovered a way to fight back against the negative effects too much sugar has on the body - without having to stop eating it.

Consistent overconsumption of sugar can cause a harmful condition known as "metabolic slowdown." Warning signs include unwanted belly flab, "brain fog", slower metabolism, tiredness, constipation, and even difficulty concentrating. **Metabolic slowdown currently affects tens of millions of Americans.**

Dr. Gundry explains, "Metabolic slowdown usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But the damage caused by sugar-laden foods is not normal."

The good news is, this problem can be easily fixed from your own home, with a method Dr. Gundry has developed himself. **"It's very simple. My technique is a way to help your body better process the sugar you eat, so that it’s being used as energy - not stored as fat," he says.**

By employing this relatively basic process, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of people make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)

People are also reporting **dramatically improved digestion, more energy, and feeling healthier than they have in years.**

Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release a free informative video to the public showcasing exactly how his Metabolic Slowdown solution works- without changing your diet, and enjoying the foods you love to eat, guilt-free.

"My mission is to help everyday Americans achieve good health," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled."

The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on various social media platforms, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.

[**Click here to watch the presentation:**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpa29a9auidfn1lb3gvsl6hbp7b7hvspcjm9e0c8_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm8pj1cth2bs)

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z724dg2vh2116nogpeqqveuhb7bvjvcd326v1huo_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm8pj1cth2bs)

[**Watch The Video**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zd4odnh585uftu9jqsk5bu6iloatanmqfml1lae8_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm8pj1cth2bs) Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities.

Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives.

Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible."

[**Click here to watch the presentation**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z8m587vpi20t6htgrr9srqlmn7u9eql5im42k7u8_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm8pj1cth2bs)

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Top US Doctor: Sugar is not the problem (This Is)
body:
We’ve been told for years now that sugar is the cause of all our problems.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zn0vh3qirrrl32gesu5lnj2e72ipd47a8akg8ec0_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm8oj0cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq2d9ieuqfbdbie4rrcdljkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbom7c9lc3h31pr2mdjm1dj6cuqe2dhhm1i6fc30m9rjccj7m4oj1db5cur66dbgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6ptie1j3aollm3jr5c3665ob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp2bs)
Dear Reader,

Please find a special health message from our paid sponsor. Sponsorships like this allow us to offer you our services free of charge. We appreciate your support.
---
We’ve been told for years now that sugar is the cause of all our problems.

Weight gain. Digestive problems. Sluggishness. Insulin resistance and disease... More and more health experts put the blame on too much sugar in the diet for all these health issues, and more.

**However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry — a world-renowned heart surgeon — eliminating sugar isn’t the answer to feeling good again.**

"About 75% of the food we eat has sugar added to it," says Dr. Gundry. “It’s unrealistic to ask people to stop eating sugar."

Instead, he says he’s discovered a way to fight back against the negative effects too much sugar has on the body - without having to stop eating it.

Consistent overconsumption of sugar can cause a harmful condition known as "metabolic slowdown." Warning signs include unwanted belly flab, "brain fog", slower metabolism, tiredness, constipation, and even difficulty concentrating. **Metabolic slowdown currently affects tens of millions of Americans.**

Dr. Gundry explains, "Metabolic slowdown usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But the damage caused by sugar-laden foods is not normal."

The good news is, this problem can be easily fixed from your own home, with a method Dr. Gundry has developed himself. **"It's very simple. My technique is a way to help your body better process the sugar you eat, so that it’s being used as energy - not stored as fat," he says.**

By employing this relatively basic process, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of people make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)

People are also reporting **dramatically improved digestion, more energy, and feeling healthier than they have in years.**

Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release a free informative video to the public showcasing exactly how his Metabolic Slowdown solution works- without changing your diet, and enjoying the foods you love to eat, guilt-free.

"My mission is to help everyday Americans achieve good health," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled."

The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on various social media platforms, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.

[**Click here to watch the presentation:**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3456acti8jurlba58ja4atubfb2v85flbg9orqo_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm8oj0cth2bs)
[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z4scdcbchm0mrl2h38gp6isuc73fc40fg2amnde0_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm8oj0cth2bs)

[**Watch The Video**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z09jvhgc1ibh3k1nlbe2897fh0n1bojotjrifgu0_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm8oj0cth2bs) Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities.

Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives.

Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible."

[**Click here to watch the presentation**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2ztqg3u11mljuid8u9ct3g0e985409dlacdvrttd0_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm8oj0cth2bs)

*individual results may vary.

---

subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:

| ********I’m at my wits’ end, Fellow Conservative. Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest.At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my campaign, **_but Republicans may never win another race this year._****Fellow Conservative, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.****I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.** If Pelosi can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.**I have Trump’s endorsement, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else.**[](http://trk.readactnews.) Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the U.S. Department of Defense or the Department of the Navy. PO Box 455, Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us to unsubscribe.

body:
Sunday, August 14th Edition
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013AAq_IycuYg7ZjLVZXE7laex8zLc7atpPPH2vf9dX9jU4n4PTO6rYtPEnqR8_M5j2GOX9r2odHHKv5vGzDAk64PeF2yu4_Oie3Rzp8R5WNYO-WL4io2Fq7d6xy_eCgwfWewHZWepfcjUM2R_Vj1RRA==&c=_iD8GBs-jWuKS6J5xiTm30Qp6-KLWYpqtX_UTDB_zlEg4VSkCzGTnA==&ch=mxbV4y3CoZJHxf90AX_DV3Q2rPBhpb5Ec5nTvoYGAauWNGjQrn3KpA==)
---
|
# Weekly Newsletter
---
| August 14, 2022 | Issue XXVIII
---
| |
---
| Callous Commuter Tax Scheme Hurts New Yorkers
While New Yorkers struggle to keep up with record inflation, the MTA is advancing a callous commuter tax that will siphon even more money away from hardworking New York families and commuters. Rather than rein in construction costs, unelected bureaucrats empowered by Albany Democrats are slapping New York commuters with a bill for as much as $34.50 a day.
Congestion pricing is the wrong solution for rebuilding our New York City post-pandemic. Leaders should be focused on restoring public safety, encouraging a return to work, lowering MTA construction costs and making the region more affordable for everyone.
---
| [VIEW THE STATEMENT ONLINE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013AAq_IycuYg7ZjLVZXE7laex8zLc7atpPPH2vf9dX9jU4n4PTO6rYv-zcJcCLyZWaWx35vlcJ-hpWXONT56VedCwRh5BCqdggrkzP-qHibAd_o0ALpZ801enK7TX3yG7RkI5-CySkA3HhTdx1X4mUIkV6snq_QwKYHe87OCdpsM68Ttddew9EOUXTrWf6wgTGL7UrdKdnZsMzl11XUF-9AvhIaE_XwJG&c=_iD8GBs-jWuKS6J5xiTm30Qp6-KLWYpqtX_UTDB_zlEg4VSkCzGTnA==&ch=mxbV4y3CoZJHxf90AX_DV3Q2rPBhpb5Ec5nTvoYGAauWNGjQrn3KpA==)
---
| |
---
| In case you missed it...
---
---
Last week, Senator Ortt and the NYS Senate Republicans released a detailed inflation report on historic, record-high inflation and unveiled a plan to provide taxpayers, families, and businesses much-needed relief.
---
| [READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013AAq_IycuYg7ZjLVZXE7laex8zLc7atpPPH2vf9dX9jU4n4PTO6rYj_5yzRR_ChIfm2NOSf9OvX7eKLDA-CcW_HoQWo_AGLIW3fPAs9_4tDZ0lu9u5GSYk5aKUrdbMp7ECiqz9cZHMcHFK7U9ZeKf4SFtkNb-KVQOJiQLnHd-Bu69i7k4-DMYhXKOwNzVHGM7r7D4uVaOesGwOLwe9Or55v7vapEwxTvFiaOohUx1FpO2fkienqpUg==&c=_iD8GBs-jWuKS6J5xiTm30Qp6-KLWYpqtX_UTDB_zlEg4VSkCzGTnA==&ch=mxbV4y3CoZJHxf90AX_DV3Q2rPBhpb5Ec5nTvoYGAauWNGjQrn3KpA==)
---
| Senator Rob Ortt and Sheriff Michael Filicetti Announce Grant for Niagara County Sheriff's Office
---
On Friday, Senate Republican Leader Rob Ortt and Niagara County Sheriff Michael Filicetti announced the Niagara County Sheriff's Office has been awarded a $15,000 grant to support and enhance their Taser Program.
"Our law enforcement officials sacrifice so much to protect our communities. As an elected official, one of my top priorities will always be to support our men and women in uniform and ensure they have the resources and equipment they need to do their jobs safely and effectively. I'm glad to have helped secure this grant, which will go a long way toward replacing aging equipment and ensuring the safety and well-being of both our officers and our communities," said Senator Ortt.
---
| [READ MORE](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013AAq_IycuYg7ZjLVZXE7laex8zLc7atpPPH2vf9dX9jU4n4PTO6rYv-zcJcCLyZWTYwCvKd9Zk0pvUiLmFutfVs0XNROVL578kijYgV4G4laT_7ICbBSCO8AaNGomKsJgULdHlmyEqR63PqOWM3po9_OdMjOs2Nb5d73O62FZpoScpJqRZttkpTedeog9pIyma7OSUXRHNG9XCBPtRRtb9j3Z0BdA2KJYcxPMU1eiM_ogTvXKWlyKnRJJS_ZclBWDyHMPlbec8FCnpzmvWdrQqayDqMmoPYO&c=_iD8GBs-jWuKS6J5xiTm30Qp6-KLWYpqtX_UTDB_zlEg4VSkCzGTnA==&ch=mxbV4y3CoZJHxf90AX_DV3Q2rPBhpb5Ec5nTvoYGAauWNGjQrn3KpA==)

name: American Update
subject: Top US Doctor: Sugar is not the problem (This Is)
body:
We’ve been told for years now that sugar is the cause of all our problems. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0536%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=knK0ADdyZrjHNz69G8PBDg&sysid=1)
Dear Reader,

Please find a special health message from our paid sponsor. Sponsorships like this allow us to offer you our services free of charge. We appreciate your support.
---
We’ve been told for years now that sugar is the cause of all our problems.

Weight gain. Digestive problems. Sluggishness. Insulin resistance and disease... More and more health experts put the blame on too much sugar in the diet for all these health issues, and more.

**However, according to Dr. Steven Gundry -- a world-renowned heart surgeon -- eliminating sugar isn’t the answer to feeling good again.**

"About 75% of the food we eat has sugar added to it," says Dr. Gundry. “It’s unrealistic to ask people to stop eating sugar."

Instead, he says he’s discovered a way to fight back against the negative effects too much sugar has on the body - without having to stop eating it.

Consistent overconsumption of sugar can cause a harmful condition known as "metabolic slowdown." Warning signs include unwanted belly flab, "brain fog", slower metabolism, tiredness, constipation, and even difficulty concentrating. **Metabolic slowdown currently affects tens of millions of Americans.**

Dr. Gundry explains, "Metabolic slowdown usually develops over a matter of years, and sometimes even decades. But the damage caused by sugar-laden foods is not normal."

The good news is, this problem can be easily fixed from your own home, with a method Dr. Gundry has developed himself. **"It's very simple. My technique is a way to help your body better process the sugar you eat, so that it’s being used as energy - not stored as fat," he says.**

By employing this relatively basic process, Dr. Gundry has seen thousands of people make swift recoveries. (In fact, he even lost 70lbs himself!)

People are also reporting **dramatically improved digestion, more energy, and feeling healthier than they have in years.**

Now, after years of research, Dr. Gundry has decided to release a free informative video to the public showcasing exactly how his Metabolic Slowdown solution works- without changing your diet, and enjoying the foods you love to eat, guilt-free.

"My mission is to help everyday Americans achieve good health," he explains. "So, if this video can help people achieve that, I'll be thrilled."

The video has since gone viral, first being shared by users on various social media platforms, then being featured on news sites like ABC and CBS.

[**Click here to watch the presentation:**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c30211%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=u53B6STs%2bVjTql%2b7MGR1pw&sysid=1)

[ ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c30212%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DNcfgp%2bxpF6pKqbFq%2b0u1Q&sysid=1)

[**Watch The Video** ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c30213%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bLmhLZlO3TtqYUCMMEXuqw&sysid=1) Dr. Gundry also serves as the personal physician to many A-list celebrities.

Most notable of which include legendary self-help guru Tony Robbins, Oscar award winning actor Alan Arkin, Grammy award winning singer Usher, and countless fortune 500 executives.

Now, there is one thing Dr. Gundry asks from his viewers: "If watching this helps you take control of your weight back, fight unwanted cravings, increase your energy, ease gas and bloating, or find relief from stiff, achy joints," Dr. Gundry says... "Then please share this video with your friends and loved ones. Together, we can help as many people avoid these health issues as possible."

[**Click here to watch the presentation**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c30214%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MNiF4cDLLdgFDPf0Ocd30g&sysid=1)

*individual results may vary.

---

_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0536%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=knK0ADdyZrjHNz69G8PBDg&sysid=1)

name: 1300% MATCH
subject: Patriot, you must act fast if you wish to STAND with TRUMP!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
|
---
| | | Our jaws dropped Patriot,

name: Weiss Ratings
subject: Our Most Important Forecast in 50 Years
body:
I take great pride in our long history of accurate forecasts for investors:
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zifgulm6qck6dlcgbfjtcfnot1ci5otmvtjsud6o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicborcd1lcjj72plickpb4p1ke1gr7d756tg69or568qbasdlm9ir2d3ncgpr6sjnmv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6ptie1j3aollmdjr4sb66pgb4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cdg62pr3cdi61oh5u)
| | | | | | **Our Most Important Forecast in 50 Years ([Watch here](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zt920hjd1f51aa56lmpkmp4kmk1ofm3aee39iihg_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm6or4c3h2bs).)**
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4bftgnef6ma1e1rv75tus9p8gks9odpq7ae13uo_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm6or4c3h2bs)
Dear Reader,
I take great pride in our long history of accurate forecasts for investors:
* In 1987, we warned of the stock market crash months in advance, as well as the explosive recovery that followed.

* We've accurately called nearly every major up-and-down move for gold since 1999.

* In 2007, we warned that the real estate bubble was about to burst, triggering the Great Recession.

* In March 2009, we announced that the market would soon recover, just before the longest bull market in history took off.

* We accurately predicted Donald Trump's 2016 victory and the even greater bull market afterward.

* Just last year, we predicted that Russia would invade Ukraine, turbocharging the massive spike in resource prices that we've just seen.

And now, we are releasing **[our most important forecast of all](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zbu5b12hgdgnbtaoi9p764prsl531lnun2k4g5do_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm6or4c3h2bs)**.
It involves the convergence of three terrible cycles:
The cycle of debt ...
The cycle of inflation, and ...
The cycle of war.
We believe they will upend nearly _everything_ about the way we live, save and invest.
Those caught unprepared could see entire fortunes erased overnight. But those who know what to look for -- and what actions to take right now -- could have the opportunity to create true generational wealth.
That's precisely what cycles expert Sean Brodrick and I reveal in our emergency video broadcast, **[Financial Judgment Day](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlmusd4q9a236vpfdsh5d4u6blqjb8ta3fd34ce8_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm6or4c3h2bs)** , including ...
* The most important forecast in the 50-year history of the Weiss companies.

* How Russia's invasion of Ukraine is unleashing a series of pent-up forces in the global economy that could change our world and our finances for decades to come.

* The time-honored cycles that accurately predicted the Great Depression, and how we've used them to accurately predict nearly every major move in stocks and gold since 1987.

* The economic devastation that occurred the last time the cycles converged into a supercycle.

* The global catastrophe this supercycle is predicting right now.

* How the facts on the ground in Europe and around the world are completely in sync with the predictions that our cycles research is generating.

* The next three phases of this crisis: How investors could build a substantial fortune with each.

* What investors must do -- beginning immediately -- to help insulate their income, savings and investments from the repercussions.

* The supercycle investments specifically designed to protect and grow very substantial wealth in these chaotic times.

* And much more.

If you are invested in the market right now on any level, I urge you -- do NOT miss this all-important conference.
Without a doubt, it is our most important forecast in 50 years.
[Click this link](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zff8t1qadeo3sv4icfvh0ujg1676l9pei56hlr8g_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5jm6or4c3h2bs) to watch our landmark video while there's still time.
Good luck and God bless!
---
Martin

Hello,
The January 6th insurrection and the GOP’s feckless decision to stand by Donald J. Trump is proof enough: There is a Cold War raging for the future of our democracy, and ‘General’ McConnell and ‘Lieutenant’ Grassley are fighting for the wrong side.
I served our country for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. I swore an oath to defend our Constitution against all threats – foreign _and_ domestic. **I’m now running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because I can’t think of anything more un-American than gleefully accepting the endorsement of a deranged man who tried to overthrow 232 years of peaceful transfer of power. It’s time to call it what it was: Treason.**
The polls show I can win. The pundits say we _must_ win if we’re going to expand our Democratic Senate majority. But Grassley has already started slinging mud at me on TV and even attacking my military service, and I’m not taking a dime of corporate PAC money, so I need _your_ help.
**We need to raise another $400,000 before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow to fight back, but right now we’re still $62,018 short. If I’m going to send Chuck Grassley packing and turn Iowa blue, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give every dollar you can afford right now:**
[**Please, will you chip in $5 or more right now – whatever you can spare before our critical mid-month deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and protect our Democratic majority in the Senate?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49201642/361232560/-42398318?refcode=em20220814am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmI2YjRhNi1jODFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qdsnUcQB9G024EeL6Ew0xPc_v3CBb6mx14KrKWWFWHU=)

| "For years Democrats have had a strong hold on the votes of diverse communities. The monopoly on this support is the only thing that gets Democrats elected. We have a chance to change the trajectory of the diverse vote!"

|
Dear Fellow Conservative:

The liberal left LOVES to label the GOP as a fraternity of "old white men," \- it's a tactic that's worked in their favor for years. Allowing them to trash American values with their radical race theories, "cancel culture" and ultra-liberal socialist agenda.

But their propaganda just isn't true, and isn't working! We can prove it!

A new generation of voters are bringing a fresh wave of diversity, youth, and a whole new perspective to the Republican Party. Just look at Governor Glenn Youngkin's campaign in 2021, he received 54% of the Latino vote and one of the highest percentages of Black and Asian support in years. Virginia demonstrated the strength of diverse communities and how their conservative values and votes will bring Republican victories.

In fact, more Republican candidates of color across the country are running for office this year than ever before.

Right Appeal PAC was founded on the belief that a more robust, inclusive, and diverse Republican Party is exactly what America needs to stamp out the Liberal agenda. We need to promote the Party and why we are fighting to support the American Dream that our great country was built on.

We need your help.

name: John Kennedy
subject: Did you hear what I said about the raid?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Kennedy for Us
body:
It just looks political

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60998839:JUqUe1VZN:m:1:3253819041:837D05E27332B26ACA63C0FE40A17D66:r)
---
Peter,

Given their recent history the past few years, the decision by the Justice Department and the FBI to raid former President Trump's home looks totally personal and totally political.

Attorney General Garland and FBI Director Wray need to IMMEDIATELY release a copy of the affidavit and other evidence submitted to the federal judge to support the search warrant and a copy of the search warrant itself, and hold a press conference to answer questions, so the American people know what's going on!

Most Americans believe in the rule of law, and so do I, and the DOJ owes us and President Trump an answer.

Honestly, I was shocked by what happened, so shocked that it's taken me a little while to truly wrap my head around all of this. **[But now, I'm back - and this is the kind of thing that we've got to call out.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60998839:JUqUe1VZN:m:1:3253819041:837D05E27332B26ACA63C0FE40A17D66:r)**

**We need to stop President Biden before it 's too late. I don't think my heart could take 6 more years of this man and his woke cronies.**
| [**RUSH $25 TO STOP JOE BIDEN**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60998840:JUqUe1VZN:m:1:3253819041:837D05E27332B26ACA63C0FE40A17D66:r)

---

I've never been more sure that we're on the right side of history. **But, unfortunately, if the Democrats can solidify their power in November, we 're a hop skip and a jump away from total Tyranny.**

**[It's up to us, friend.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60998839:JUqUe1VZN:m:1:3253819041:837D05E27332B26ACA63C0FE40A17D66:r)** We've got to push the Democrats out of Washington, restore our Majority, and hold the Woke Left accountable for this ridiculous abuse of power.

I hope we can count on you. **[Every day it seems the odds are more and more stacked against us, but I know we can set this right.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60998839:JUqUe1VZN:m:1:3253819041:837D05E27332B26ACA63C0FE40A17D66:r)**

God Bless America,

I don't think my heart could take 6 more years of this man and his woke cronies. | I've never been more sure that we're on the right side of history. But, unfortunately, if the Democrats can solidify their power in November, we 're a hop skip and a jump away from total Tyranny. We've got to push the Democrats out of Washington, restore our Majority, and hold the Woke Left accountable for this ridiculous abuse of power. I hope we can count on you. God Bless America, John Kennedy Folks, our country was founded by geniuses but it's being run by idiots. And if you trust the government, well then you obviously failed history class. Hello,
I’ve always loved horseback riding. But when it comes to the proverbial political “horse race” or fighting for Granite Staters, I’ll take Granite Staters every single time.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49202404/361235097/-1829049351?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1423-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjc5MDk4YS1jZDFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFTNln1lO-gH6yvTYxZ0LO0T_qioGia0r-tufEjumDc=)
Far-right Republicans are hell-bent on replacing me in the Senate with a rubber stamp for Mitch McConnell. They're spending over $25 million and counting to attack me! But why are they so focused on New Hampshire?
They’re off to the races in the Granite State because I'm one of 50 Democrats serving in the U.S. Senate – the narrowest majority a party can have. I won my last race by just 1,017 votes, and with such a slim margin, Republicans think they have a real shot at flipping this seat and retaking Senate control.
If they're successful, Mitch McConnell will take the reins, opening the door for a nationwide abortion ban and other extreme policies that would upend the progress we've made on gun safety and climate change.
Counteracting those attack ads takes a LOT of cash, so I have a big ask for you. **[Will you please chip in $3 or whatever you can to my reelection campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49202405/361235098/-1829049351?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1423-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjc5MDk4YS1jZDFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cFTNln1lO-gH6yvTYxZ0LO0T_qioGia0r-tufEjumDc=)**
Thank you so much for helping.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

But when it comes to the proverbial political “horse race” or fighting for Granite Staters, I’ll take Granite Staters every single time. = Far-right Republicans are hell-bent on replacing me in the Senate with a rubber stamp for Mitch McConnell. They're spending over $25 million and counting to attack me! But why are they so focused on New Hampshire? They’re off to the races in the Granite State because I'm one of 50 Democrats serving in the U.S. Senate – the narrowest majority a party can have. I won my last race by just 1,017 votes, and with such a slim margin, Republicans think they have a real shot at flipping this seat and retaking Senate control. If they're successful, Mitch McConnell will take the reins, opening the door for a nationwide abortion ban and other extreme policies that would upend the progress we've made on gun safety and climate change. Counteracting those attack ads takes a LOT of cash, so I have a big ask for you. = Thank you so much for helping. With every good wish, Maggie Hassan | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: Letitia James
subject: 3 things you need to know
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49203585/361240307/265476937?refcode=jtk634-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDM2OTFiZS1kMTFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Am5F93QrolPOZk74GKZwGcycyP-bwLtme9PJ05MJO-o=)
---
Peter, here are three main things standing between me and re-election:
1\. New York Republicans have decided to endorse a MAGA Republican to run against me for attorney general – **_and he just won his primary._**

2\. The Republican Attorneys General Association (RAGA), a group that is committed to helping elect far-right attorneys general across the country, **_raised MILLIONS last quarter. _**

3\. My GOP opponent has accepted _tens of thousands of dollars_ from a **_“Stop the Steal” conspiracy theorist._**
That’s why, with under 90 days left before Election Day, I’m counting on your support now more than ever. **I’m in the midst of my August mid-month fundraising deadline, but I’m still falling $8,203 short of my goal to raise $15,000. So I have to ask:[Will you rush a donation to my campaign for re-election now so I can stand tall against RAGA’s attacks and defeat my GOP opponent?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49203586/361240308/265476937?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk634-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDM2OTFiZS1kMTFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Am5F93QrolPOZk74GKZwGcycyP-bwLtme9PJ05MJO-o=)**

| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49203588/361240310/265476937?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk634-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDM2OTFiZS1kMTFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Am5F93QrolPOZk74GKZwGcycyP-bwLtme9PJ05MJO-o=)
---
When I made history in 2018 by becoming the first Black woman ever to be elected attorney general of New York, I knew that this historic accomplishment would mean nothing if I didn’t use my platform to fight for New York’s working families. **And, Peter, I’m proud to say that that’s exactly what I’ve done. **

Throughout my time in office, I’ve held gun and opioid manufacturers and sellers accountable for all the harm that they have caused New Yorkers, fought relentlessly for LGBTQ+ and voting rights, advocated for the creation of an abortion fund, and so _much more. _

But, at a time when even our most fundamental rights are under attack, my work is nowhere near complete. That’s why I’m running for re-election, and I’m counting on the support of this grassroots team to help me defeat my GOP opponent and win in November.

**[So please, will you donate $5 now to help me hit my essential mid-month fundraising goal? I can’t compete with the GOP’s attacks without your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49203589/361240311/265476937?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk634-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDM2OTFiZS1kMTFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Am5F93QrolPOZk74GKZwGcycyP-bwLtme9PJ05MJO-o=)**

name: Raphael
subject: what if I told you $5 could help decide our must-win Senate race in Georgia?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend – what if I told you $5 could help decide our must-win Senate race in Georgia?
Your $5 could help me beat the odds (again), keep Georgia blue, and defend our razor-thin Senate majority – and it couldn't be more urgently needed.
After GOP donors poured more than $20 million into my opponent's campaign to defeat me, polling shows me 1 point down. **With experts at _Politico_ predicting that the future of Senate control hinges on Georgia, we have zero room for error.**
I don't take a cent from corporate PACs, so I mean it when I say your $5 could mean the difference between winning and losing this race. **But we just fell short of our fundraising goal, and if we don't close our budget gap by midnight, we won't have the resources we need to pull ahead and win. **

body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losi
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zjh1f1clpnqgba5glqp0n5q5mnupj39svd0djldg_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5ge4pj6cjh238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij78bielqr0sbiegqb7ctl6tr779hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onmmmrr2d34edom1cbnc5qb9clks1o70t5gceoefdljc5jr6s3l6hqm9o5lmdpneduie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc9n6dh6fdr2coo75cr4suobapbi4no)
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziohj532oaenur44l56629113gr9ae8b2roa7fd8_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5ge4pj6cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaccnaiph20e1c4cavt4l8855ao1ol63fluqbsi8_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5ge4pj6cjh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zr5tkijkkq1pd7gi283fr0p2d9et2qs6t82uup38_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5ge4pj6cjh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GRETCHEN WHITMER FOR GOVERNOR **[gretchenwhitmer
body:
There’s so much at stake here. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49205565/361248491/-626943462?refcode=EM_FR_220814FRAM_N_GW_45SA_3_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjU5ZjRkMS1kMzFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9PYRIJqWV8iLBb6XfkfDEyBAjqih35UTfWgTbtWrtps=)
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49205569/361248506/-626943462?refcode=EM_FR_220814FRAM_N_GW_45SA_3_N_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzcvMS85MDA5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjU5ZjRkMS1kMzFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9PYRIJqWV8iLBb6XfkfDEyBAjqih35UTfWgTbtWrtps=) We must win in Michigan, and to win, we need to be hitting our monthly goals – especially as we get closer and closer to the election.

It’s going to take a lot of resources to fight back against the over $15 million in attack ad spending, and there’s so much at stake here. Everything from choice to infrastructure to education is on the line, and my dangerous opponent would drag Michigan backward.

Will you contribute $5 today to ensure that we can stay ahead in this must-win election? I’m counting on people like you to help us fight back.

name: dementia warning
subject: common food linked to dementia
body:
You may be skyrocketing your dementia risk... simply by putting this on your dinner plate.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm5i03dgdjqinh1fv68h1tmuijlrpla1j8tu20kg_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5ge4o36cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf6c9gc2rr8slgmlo68o37mdj6acj7c3h34sb169gjcsrnm5p38pb7mth37dhmmurt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coojecr2curm4phkcapm6ptgmlin49fg)
| Hi Friend, Harvard scientists warn: You may be skyrocketing your dementia risk... simply by [**putting this**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo81nebuvi3epki3cdoqs07ss627ipf190siv6v8_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5ge4o36cdh2bs) on your dinner plate. Countless studies link this food to memory loss - even in people in their 50s. No wonder one in three Americans dies in a nursing home, unable to recognize their loved ones. Millions of Americans [**eat this**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z908vsmmh3f7o3u89teqbbjeq1vljqjuqe561t3o_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5ge4o36cdh2bs) almost every single day... often without knowing the damage it does to your brain. Are you? [**Find out for yourself now...**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsb45en0gg33hj1lon6ulr3604fumu8c530333s0_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5ge4o36cdh2bs) \- Tim Davis **P.S.** Fortunately, as soon as you STOP eating this food... Your brain cells start to regenerate... protecting your precious memories... and blessing you with the crystal clear thinking you had before middle-age. But first, [**check out what this food is**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3d5nnmn3thvci258bdp4bghm8792fkvqnme3tto_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5ge4o36cdh2bs) and see if you're eating it.
---

name: Team Parker
subject: A woman to get the job done…
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Approved by Catherine for Congress
body:
https://www.catherineforcongress.com [https://www.catherineforcongress.com]
A woman to get the job done...
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/79102/images/image0-11.jpeg]
With so many critical issues facing our community and our country, our next Member of Congress should be someone with the right experience, who gets results when it matters most. That public servant is Democrat Catherine Parker. Catherine has delivered for us here at home time and again. Now, let’s elect her to Congress so we can get the job done.
Washington Has Failed Us on Women’s Rights
As a pro-choice woman Catherine co-sponsored and helped to pass the Clinic Access bill to ensure a woman’s right to reproductive healthcare in Westchester County, in addition to co-sponsoring laws creating paid sick leave and banning employers from asking about salary history.
Congress Hasn’t Done Enough To Stem Gun Violence
Catherine passed legislation pushing for New York’s red flag law, banning gun shows at the County Center, and voted in favor of the Firearms Warning Labels bill. She also supported the creation of a Mental Health Task Force to go out
on calls with local law enforcement.
Federal Action on Climate Change Must Continue
While in a Democratic minority, Catherine helped create and fund the County Office of Sustainability. She has a fifteen-year record of advocating and funding flood mitigation infrastructure and supported legislation to shift to renewable energy for Westchester County and its residents. She supports a Green New Deal and the Inflation Reduction Act.
LET’S SEND A WOMAN TO CONGRESS WHO CAN GET THE JOB DONE FOR US.
Early Voting has begun! Have you made your plan to vote yet? CLICK HERE TO FIND AN EARLY VOTING LOCATION NEAR YOU. [https://citizenparticipation.westchestergov.com/voting/early-voting-2022]
Important Dates for this Summer Primary
Saturday, August 13 - Sunday, August 21: Early voting begins, find your polling location here [https://protect-eu.mimecast.com/s/jonrC7n53SAoJYmPfNiU3y?domain=citizenparticipation.westchestergov.com] !
Tuesday August 23: Election Day, find your polling location [https://protect-eu.mimecast.com/s/GeJRC8o52C6LKgjJfojJMl?domain=citizenparticipation.westchestergov.com] .
Sign up to Volunteer [https://www.mobilize.us/catherineforcongress/] Donate TODAY [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/catherineforcongress]
Learn more by visiting Catherine’s website, or follow her on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/CatherineForCongress] , Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/catherineny16/] , or Twitter [https://twitter.com/catherineNY16] .
https://www.facebook.com/CatherineForCongress [https://www.facebook.com/CatherineForCongress] https://twitter.com/catherineNY16 [https://twitter.com/catherineNY16] https://www.instagram.com/catherineny16/ [https://www.instagram.com/catherineny16/]
Paid for and Approved by Catherine for Congress
Catherine for Congress
PO Box 592
Mamaroneck, NY 10543
United States
