name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: NPR may not get it, but rock stars get that Beto is, well...a rock star! In response to the motherf*ker that made its way around the world, Dee Snider of the 80s heavy metal band Twisted Sister asked Beto's team if he could play the song live for a rally.
body:
Twisted Sister for Beto!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter,** ** NPR may not get it, but rock stars get that Beto is, well...a rock star! In response to the motherf***er that made its way around the world, Dee Snider of the 80s heavy metal band Twisted Sister asked Beto's team if he could play the song live for a rally. Beto's campaign manager immediately said yes, and now Dee Snider is putting together an all-star band to sing "We're Not Gonna Take It," an anthem now for Beto as he takes on the cruel, corrupt, coup-supporting Greg Abbott. **I'll say it again. Imagine the morning after election day, Beto O'Rourke as Governor-Elect of Texas._With 59 percent of Texans saying the state is going in the wrong direction, and polling showing Beto within 5 points of Gov. Abbott, it could happen!_** Obviously, with similar results across the land the night before, but this rock star taking over a formerly conservative bastion, this rock star running the second biggest state in the country ... this will be a changed country at least on the path towards sanity and righteousness. [**So, again, can you dig deep to join us in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to a rock star about to become Governor of Texas?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d6eeade-1c5a-4a60-9afa-972f019c3fb6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) THANK YOU! \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action** <info@blueampaction.com>
Date: Fri, Aug 12, 2022 at 10:18 AM
Subject: Beto called someone laughing at kids’ dying from assault rifles a "Motherf***er." NPR's more upset about the swearing than the dead kids.
Peter, NPR just doesn’t get it. **By now I’m sure you’ve seen the viral video of Beto O'Rourke responding to a Greg-Abbott supporting heckler as he talked about the somber reality of our children murdered by assault rifles. NPR saw it, and they were outraged ... by Beto swearing.** **_[THANK BETO for saying what must be said, and doing what must be done. Please join us in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Beto O'Rourke. Because we can't afford 2023 where he is not Governor of Texas.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2bf23371-ef4e-4436-afb8-04897b7df484/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** **_If you're exhausted by Democrats too often refusing to hit back, comment or message aggressively against Republicans who lie, cheat, steal, coup, take away our rights and pocket our taxes, it's a reminder of why we need the next generation of fighters in the Democratic Party to take over, and oh my, is Beto O'Rourke one of those._** Beto was speaking about assault rifles, and how they were weapons made for the battlefield--which every sane human including the creator of the assault rifle has acknowledged--the damage they do to little bodies in schools as they were made to pierce helmets of opposing soldiers. In fetid, disrespectful, and honestly abominable right-wing fashion, as he was talking about children being murdered by assault rifles, he was heckled by a Greg Abbott supporter in the crowd who started laughing.** ** **_Laughing at kids dying via assault rifle. Think about that._** **Then Beto responded the way we all wish we had, not like some polished politician but a real human with real emotions:** **_" It may be funny to you motherf***er but it's not funny to me."_**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: Beto speaks for me!](https://default.salsalabs.org/T29cd7368-0237-42f0-9ff5-7282438475a3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **I** have talked often about how some of our current crop of leaders have done an incredible job, but they don't seem to get the age we're in, of politicians being human and not polished, of Republicans who aren't conservative but somewhere between autocratic and fascist, and how They. Must. Be. Stopped. **Like Stacey Abrams, Katie Porter, Eric Swalwell, Ted Lieu, Ruben Gallego, Nan Whaley, Tim Ryan, John Fetterman, Josh Shapiro, Mandela Barnes, Gretchen Whitmer, Brian Schatz, Chris Murphy and others I don't have space to name, Beto O'Rourke is a leader for this moment.** **_Imagine waking up the day after election day and Beto O'Rourke has sent that cretinous, corrupt, coup-enabling disaster, Greg Abbott, into political retirement. BETO O'ROURKE IS THE GOVERNOR-ELECT OF TEXAS. Try and imagine it for a second. What it will feel like._** **_[And then please join us in THANKING BETO for saying what must be said, and doing what must be done. Please join us in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Beto O'Rourke. Because we can't afford 2023 where he is not Governor of Texas.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T81dce223-e336-4cd6-830a-9834cac46e83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** Cliff

subject: These are dark times for our Nation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
Nothing like this has ever happened to a President of the United States before | These are dark times for our Nation...
[](https://secure.winred.com/save-america-joint-fundraising-committee/mar-a-lago-fbi-c001-ext001?amount=50&recurring=true&money_pledge=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=d001_d001_na&utm_campaign=20220809_mar-a-lago–fbi-raid-launch_donaldjtrump_saveamerica&utm_content=donate_cpyrs_rec1RSw4IQKb4vgku-10418&leadcreated=false)

**_[BREAKING: THE FBI RAIDED PRESIDENT TRUMP'S HOME: MAR-A-LAGO](https://secure.winred.com/save-america-joint-fundraising-committee/mar-a-lago-fbi-c001-ext001?amount=50&recurring=true&money_pledge=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=d001_d001_na&utm_campaign=20220809_mar-a-lago–fbi-raid-launch_donaldjtrump_saveamerica&utm_content=donate_cpyrs_rec1RSw4IQKb4vgku-10418&leadcreated=false)_**
** **
Patriot,

These are dark times for our Nation, as my beautiful home, Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach, Florida, was raided, and occupied by a large group of FBI agents.

Nothing like this has ever happened to a President of the United States before, and it's important that you know that it wasn't just my home that was violated - _it was the home of every patriotic American who I have been fighting for since that iconic moment I came down the Golden Escalators in 2015._

**I stood up to the Radical Left's corruption. I restored power to the people and truly delivered for our Country like we have never seen before.__The establishment hated it.__**

Now, as they watch my endorsed candidates win big victories and see my dominance in all polls, they are trying to stop the Republican Party and me once more. **The lawlessness, political persecution, and Witch Hunt, must be exposed and stopped.**

As long as I have your support, I will continue to fight for the Great American People. I need every single red-blooded American Patriot to step up during this time.

************[**Please rush in a donation IMMEDIATELY to publicly stand with me against this NEVERENDING WITCH HUNT. >>**](https://secure.winred.com/save-america-joint-fundraising-committee/mar-a-lago-fbi-c001-ext001?amount=50&recurring=true&money_pledge=true&utm_medium=email_prsp&utm_source=d001_d001_na&utm_campaign=20220809_mar-a-lago–fbi-raid-launch_donaldjtrump_saveamerica&utm_content=donate_cpyrs_rec1RSw4IQKb4vgku-10418&leadcreated=false)************

Thank you,

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest.
[View this message in your browser](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2za65gllcob2agehddtsrphji7phvgq2jjuk8229o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56ei3bd9ieir38cth6kpjactmekpradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hfbcpkc8pjapdl68p7fdjks2pjbcll69gb1ob16oq3bd3l6mrm2phkeaqe0ppgc1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or7m9o6cdb4mkq6fclicoqm1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn48d245p25oh4cdhm0ob4s3h64ob24no)

********I 'm at my wits' end, Friend. Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my campaign, **_but Republicans may never win another race this year._** **Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.** If Pelosi can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. **I have Trump 's endorsement, I lead the team of Navy SEAL's running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else.** [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsa4o5uhm5lslv9fmf794hdnschhjgkkknds00t8_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5ie1oj2c5h2bs) The point is, Friend, I'm the toughest Republican running for office. If I can't beat Pelosi - no one can. So, I'm going to be blunt with you. [**If you chip in just $5 right now**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zrtfno2dvsamdfjaar8i0vcfvcqgkp3uv4fat0co_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5ie1oj2c5h2bs), I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Pelosi's plan to destroy our nation. I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out? [**DONATE TODAY**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z6v7tcn6u2jmlhgf6s45v25lp4u3hioi9vd273j0_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5ie1oj2c5h2bs) You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will return the favor in Congress. Thank you for your support, Ryan Zinke [**DONATE TODAY**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z027edtb5h2uo7gv94mdruol3gkkoanls1pfbc3o_rp22sh2s8i66or0c5ie1oj2c5h2bs)

| | |

Hey there — here’s what my whiteboard says today:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49227581/361311016/-1829049351?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1443-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWI2MzA3Mi1mNzFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ByBXzm0i6cqhswUFzNf7V2m6C0TV2YAQVHPeWFwIdqU=)
Yep, that’s right. In 2016, Maggie Hassan won her Senate race by just 1,017 votes, one of the tightest margins in the country. And this year, she’s facing another incredibly close race. Republicans are already spending over $25 million in dark money to try to elect one of her extreme anti-choice opponents.
Maggie is a fighter, and she’s won tough races before (again, just look at those 1,017 votes) but she’s going to need our help if she’s got any shot at keeping this seat. **[So I’m hoping you’ll stand with me in supporting Maggie and give just $3 to help her win this November. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49227582/361311017/-1829049351?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1443-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWI2MzA3Mi1mNzFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ByBXzm0i6cqhswUFzNf7V2m6C0TV2YAQVHPeWFwIdqU=)**
Her narrow victory in 2016 helped us win the Senate majority in 2020—and Democrats just won’t keep our razor-thin majority if Maggie doesn’t win again, friend. With access to reproductive health care on the line, it’s more important than ever that Democrats hold Congress and prevent Republicans from passing a nationwide abortion ban.
We need Maggie in the Senate, and we all need to work together to make that happen.
Thanks for all that you do,
Katie Porter
CA-45

DEFEAT KEN PAXTON
| **This is Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton... in his 2015 _mugshot_ from the Collin County Sheriff's Office:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49227832/361312550/1484719371?refcode=ea.8bc365f2-fa1b-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.8bc365f2-fa1b-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmMzNjVmMi1mYTFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9iZBC7_85PqU6VYe1RAxh-vZNMfqC71Vm3xCbcQoJII=) _This photo is from when he was indicted on felony charges._ Seven years later, he’s still under indictment, and now his top aides have also accused him of abusing the power of the Attorney General’s office. He’s well known for ATTACKING the Affordable Care Act and DEFENDING the GOP’s egregious abortion ban in court even before _Roe_ fell. Now, Paxton’s SUING the Biden administration so that Texas hospitals don’t have to provide lifesaving abortion care during medical emergencies — he _wants_ Texas women to die.
* * *
**This is Rochelle Garza, and she’s ready to take back the AG’s office _for the people of Texas!_** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49227836/361312555/1484719371?refcode=ea.8bc365f2-fa1b-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ms=ea.8bc365f2-fa1b-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTI0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YmMzNjVmMi1mYTFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9iZBC7_85PqU6VYe1RAxh-vZNMfqC71Vm3xCbcQoJII=) Rochelle will stand up for families, protect a woman’s right to choose, defend workers, and ensure that corrupt politicians are held accountable for their crimes. She’s already proven that she’s a fighter for the people and for our fundamental rights. As a lawyer, Rochelle reinforced the constitutionality of reproductive rights when she won a federal case for a pregnant immigrant teen — that win resulted in the “Garza Notice” for immigrant teens in detention. (She beat Brett Kavanaugh and the Trump administration in court, too). **The polls are closer than ever. With Rochelle as our Democratic nominee, there’s never been a better opportunity to send Paxton packing and elect a leader who will use the AG’s office to _defend_ our rights.** _The AG’s race is THE | Peter, It’s true: _Vermont remains the only state yet to send a woman to Congress._ **But we’re about to change all of that** : After winning the Democratic Primary last Tuesday, Becca became the body:
"lock and load" [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49208530/361261608/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNiMDc4ODZhLWQ5MWItZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=suR2zeFNF7ZhrZzDM9UNIUfQI5ijF7k0wVl6nyjE3V0=&emci=4a7759da-7f1a-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=3b07886a-d91b-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=16335001) Team,

Just a few days ago, Donald Trump went full Donald Trump mode on Truth Social when the FBI raided Mar-A-Lago. Later, the _Washington Post_ revealed the subpoena was issued with the objective of finding **classified documents on nuclear weapons believed to be at the residence.**

But instead of waiting on the facts of the investigation to be made public by the Justice Department, right-wing media and Trump's cronies in office immediately started calling it a "witch-hunt." **And we later found out from Advance Democracy, a non-partisan, non-profit organization that conducts public-interest investigations, that the response from MAGA Republicans was disturbing and DANGEROUS.**

Trump supporters launched violent threats made against the FBI, Merrick Garland, and other leaders involved in the investigation. Check it out:
* "I'm just going to say it. Garland needs to be assassinated. Simple as that."
* "lock and load"
* "kill all feds"
* "Are we not in a cold civil war at this point?"

**This is the EXACT activity we saw leading up to the insurrection on January 6, and we've already seen follow-through on these violent threats.**

Yesterday it was reported that a man who was present on January 6 tried to breach FBI headquarters wearing military-grade body armor and carrying multiple firearms. **His goal? Combat with and KILL FBI agents on sight.**

We've always said that if we don't unseat the people who made January 6 possible, there's nothing to stop them from sponsoring even more attacks on our democracy and national security. **And right now, we're seeing our predictions come true. We believe these threats should be taken seriously and action must be taken against these people. clean_body: "lock and load" Team, Just a few days ago, Donald Trump went full Donald Trump mode on Truth Social when the FBI raided Mar-A-Lago. Later, the Washington Post revealed the subpoena was issued with the objective of finding classified documents on nuclear weapons believed to be at the residence. But instead of waiting on the facts of the investigation to be made public by the Justice Department, right-wing media and Trump's cronies in office immediately started calling it a "witch-hunt." And we later found out from Advance Democracy, a non-partisan, non-profit organization that conducts public-interest investigations, that the response from MAGA Republicans was disturbing and DANGEROUS. Trump supporters launched violent threats made against the FBI, Merrick Garland, and other leaders involved in the investigation. Check it out: "I'm just going to say it. Garland needs to be assassinated. Simple as that." "lock and load" "kill all feds" "Are we not in a cold civil war at this point?" This is the EXACT activity we saw leading up to the insurrection on January 6, and we've already seen follow-through on these violent threats. Yesterday it was reported that a man who was present on January 6 tried to breach FBI headquarters wearing military-grade body armor and carrying multiple firearms. His goal? Combat with and KILL FBI agents on sight. We've always said that if we don't unseat the people who made January 6 possible, there's nothing to stop them from sponsoring even more attacks on our democracy and national security. And right now, we're seeing our predictions come true. We believe these threats should be taken seriously and action must be taken against these people. And we have to know: | == | == | == Thank you, Team Never Again Marjorie Taylor Greene, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, Mo Brooks, Andy Biggs. Those are just a few of the Republicans in Congress that Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from. Help us hold them accountable by chipping in $5 or more today. = Thank you for supporting Never Again PAC as we continue our fight against American fascism and corruption. We are building a war chest to vote out the nation's most dangerous elected officials and hold them accountable for their acts of treason. = Never Again PAC will hold these most dangerous and radical elected officials accountable by building a war chest to support ongoing rapid response efforts in 2022 and beyond. Through advertising, grassroots & digital organizing in targeted members’ districts, at a time in the cycle when other political organizations have historically not spent resources, will ensure our resources will in fact go further, our message will be heard more clearly, and our targets will feel the pressure immediately. = For generations people have risked everything seeking refuge on American shores to escape the very same sorts of political violence that took place at the U.S. Capitol on January 6th –– and every generation has an opportunity to make investments to protect this democracy –– it is time to do our part. = PAID FOR BY NEVER AGAIN PAC Never Again PAC PO Box 2153 Purcellville, VA 20134 United States

I was born and raised in Milwaukee. I don’t come from a wealthy or well-connected family. But I do come from a proud union family.
My mom was a Milwaukee school teacher for 30 years, and my dad worked 3rd shift at the General Motors plant. Those jobs were my family's ticket to the middle class.
My parents spent their days organizing for better wages and advancing workers' rights. Their example showed me the importance of coming together around shared values and fighting for opportunity for everyone.
The current system isn't working for people in Wisconsin and across the country. Hard work just isn't paying off like it used to. People are working longer and longer for less and less while big corporations and CEOs bring in larger profits than ever before.
That's why we can't settle for what is – we have to reach for what can be.
Now that we are up against Ron Johnson, we will be facing some very powerful special interest groups and right-wing super PACs that want to stop our campaign.
They could pour tens of millions of dollars into negative ads to try to defeat me and prop up Ron Johnson. The truth is that they will stop at nothing to defend this seat.
So we need to be ready for whatever they will throw our way, which means I am relying on lots of people making contributions to help flip Wisconsin's Senate seat and defend the Senate majority.
[**Can you please split a $10 contribution between my campaign and Michael Bennet’s? We'll put your contribution immediately to work to win this race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49228012/361312953/411181816?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20220814_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmMzNjVmMi1mYTFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cmD-JXR1uYJpJeowl0nnAEWjX037Dd37GEIMSYoO-g4=)
As long as we are in this together, there is no limit to what we can accomplish.
Thank you for adding your contribution today.
All my best,
Mandela Barnes

body:
We were contributing to Tammy Duckworth before most people knew who she was.
#
Derek -
When we think back over our success stories over the years, it’s the people who have stepped up to contribute who helped make those possible.
We were contributing to Tammy Duckworth before most people knew who she was.
We were fighting to end the forever wars before it was the popular thing to do.
Our ads have provided the margins in House and Senate races that make today’s majorities possible.
But what most people don’t know is that all along the way, almost all of the donations we receive come from people like you chipping in what they can, when they can.

clean_body: I wanted to personally share some incredible news | = Peter, I'm reaching out because I wanted to personally share some incredible news: After polls showed me trailing Marco Rubio by 2 points for months, a brand-new poll just came out on Monday: It's 45-45. We're officially tied with Rubio in a race that could decide Senate control. I couldn't have done this without you, but now I need you more than ever. As you read this, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are gearing up to pour millions into this race to bombard us with nonstop attack ads from now until Election Day. That's because the GOP knows that if I defeat Rubio, it will virtually guarantee that Democrats keep Senate control. This poll is proof that we can win this. But I'm getting outspent in key areas of Florida, and the GOP is only going to start spending even more to try to defeat us after this latest poll. If we're going to counter their attacks, take the lead and protect our Senate majority, we need to raise $250,000 before midnight tonight – and I simply can't get there without your immediate donation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Val Demings and UniteDemocrats will go through immediately: | = = = I know that with supporters like you by my side, we can do this. We can win this race. If we fall short of our $300,000 Mid-Quarter deadline and fail to hit our
August fundraising goal, it’ll be impossible to keep up with the millions

name: Team Bass
subject: What do you think? Should a billionaire be mayor?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY KAREN BASS FOR MAYOR 2022 – GENERAL
body:
The people still have the power here.

Hey – When Karen officially announced she was running, we knew it would be an uphill battle every step of the way. The Los Angeles mayoral race is notoriously expensive and competitive.

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: The general election just kicked off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=kWaBrUq%2BYDUN7aK0FKwGsJfh2FgY%2Bhns&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
The general election just kicked off in this must-win Senate race, and we've got to do everything in our power to defeat my radical new opponent and keep this seat.
But the truth is this: My efforts to hold Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and GOP extremists accountable for their dangerous agenda have made me a target for defeat.
**Now that I officially have a GOP opponent, I need a surge of grassroots support to fend off coming attacks and win this race. That's why I 'm coming to you today with an important ask: [If you're as committed to protecting our control of the Senate as I am, will you chip in to become a Founding Donor for this campaign? We still need 34 more Founding Donors to pitch in before our fundraising deadline at midnight tonight.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1234-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
[ ](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1234-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
I've got to remind you that the stakes are higher than ever, Friend. My Republican opponent is Trump's handpicked far-right, anti-choice, pro-gun extremist. She will be a rubber stamp for Mitch McConnell and the GOP's disastrous, backward agenda.
She will hand the Senate to Mitch McConnell - to dangerous backsliding on reproductive freedom, voting rights, gun safety, the climate crisis, and so many other critical issues. It would be a devastating loss for the American people.
With the direction of our nation on the line, I have to ask you one more time: **[Please, will you chip in just $5 right now to become a General Election Founding Donor before midnight tonight? Every donation makes a difference, and I'm so grateful for your support.](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1234-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)**
Thank you so much for meeting this moment.
Dick
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=Rem0eehdPgo772Ab3ImVBZfh2FgY%2Bhns&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: The FBI’s raid is yet another escalation in the weaponization of federal agencies!
body:
**[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60998979:6-mVsmVUN:m:1:3253819041:56567523C24AEBA95D1B7B58DF086DD9:r)**

Peter,
The FBI's raid of Mar-a-Lago is yet another escalation in the weaponization of federal agencies against the Regime's political opponents, while people like Hunter Biden get treated with kid gloves. Why didn't the FBI ever raid Hillary Clinton's house after she laundered classified information through a private server and then deleted 30,000 emails that were under subpoena?

**The federal Regime is targeting those it dislikes for disfavored treatment**. They are demanding we get in line or face the consequences.

Now, the Regime is getting another 87,000 IRS agents to wield against its adversaries. With this addition, the agency is now larger than the Pentagon, State Department, FBI, and Border Patrol combined, and BILLIONS of dollars are now being directed to fund these new hires. Democrats are not simply expanding an agency. They are growing their army of Biden Regime soldiers standing ready to execute any order by the D.C. Swamp.

The fact that the Left is turning taxpayer-funded government agencies into extensions of the Democrat Machine to do their political bidding right before our eyes should be alarming to every American. **These are not actions indicative of leaders in a free republic._This mirrors a Banana Republic._**

As your Governor, I have always been clear that the power belongs to the People -- _**_not politicians_.**_ This blatant overreach by the federal government is an attack on our democracy and the American people.

It is past time that elected representatives in Washington, D.C. stand up against this abuse of power by using the constitutional power of Congress to hold these agencies accountable. For too long these agencies have been on autopilot with no accountability. Let's make sure they stand up for our rights. No excuses! - _**[Stand with me>>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60998979:6-mVsmVUN:m:1:3253819041:56567523C24AEBA95D1B7B58DF086DD9:r "https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d0025c081abf2c0c1a0129edd35ee3585ab5764993ef33c944348d145a64d3cdf1fe2dd5a15e89a76fa2a12131287ac420fe5b6547a2f839")**_

Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[RUSH IN A DONATION](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60998979:6-mVsmVUN:m:1:3253819041:56567523C24AEBA95D1B7B58DF086DD9:r)

subject: Our opponent has called abortion rights “demonic” and supports a national ban
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
In 2020 Mark won by only 2.4% and a leaked poll from a Super PAC backing our opponent shows this race in a dead heat.
#

Friends —
Is there ANYTHING AT ALL we can say to convince you to make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline at MIDNIGHT tomorrow?
What if we told you that in 2020 Mark won by only 2.4% of the vote and that a leaked poll from a Super PAC backing Blake Masters shows this race in a dead heat?
What if we told you that Blake Masters has called abortion rights “demonic” and supports a national ban that would criminalize abortion nationwide and imprison health care providers?
And what if we told you that if we miss too many more of our fundraising goals between now and Election Day, we could end up with a Senator representing Arizona who believes Dreamers should never be allowed to become citizens?
We need Mark in the Senate — not someone as radical and out-of-touch as Masters. So today, we have to ask:
[**Can you PLEASE make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight? Mark needs your help to reach our goals.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-aug22.Iyxc-M&refcode=em220814-1-7&t=1&akid=3543%2E6688874%2Ey4AeXc)

clean_body: In 2020 Mark won by only 2.4% and a leaked poll from a Super PAC backing our opponent shows this race in a dead heat. Friends — Is there ANYTHING AT ALL we can say to convince you to make a $3 contribution to Mark Kelly’s campaign before our mid-month fundraising deadline at MIDNIGHT tomorrow? What if we told you that in 2020 Mark won by only 2.4% of the vote and that a leaked poll from a Super PAC backing Blake Masters shows this race in a dead heat? What if we told you that Blake Masters has called abortion rights “demonic” and supports a national ban that would criminalize abortion nationwide and imprison health care providers? And what if we told you that if we miss too many more of our fundraising goals between now and Election Day, we could end up with a Senator representing Arizona who believes Dreamers should never be allowed to become citizens? We need Mark in the Senate — not someone as radical and out-of-touch as Masters. So today, we have to ask: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** It isn’t even about how MUCH you can give today. name: Cheri Beasley
subject: I wanted to give you an explanation personally
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Running for Senate required a big leap of faith — faith in myself and faith that enough people like you would step up to support us.

Team - I’m reaching out myself to ask you to consider making a $3 donation to our campaign before our mid-month fundraising drive comes to a close tomorrow. But before I ask, you deserve an explanation of why your support is so important.
Running for Senate required a big leap of faith — faith in our mission and faith that enough people like you would step up to support us. Winning a race as tough as this has to be a team effort. It requires all of us to do the hard work together.
Right now is a moment when we need folks like you to come through for our campaign. We noticed a bit of a fundraising slow down this past week during our budget meeting, and honestly, it was a bit concerning.
My opponent has at least five different outside groups spending on his behalf. Some of the biggest special interests in politics are aggressively trying to buy this seat — including a Koch-backed super PAC, a major corporate special interest group and two of McConnell’s super PACs.
I don’t believe this seat or our next senator’s vote should be for sale. We need a leader who will always put people first. That’s why our campaign is rejecting corporate PAC money.
So that’s why your support is so important. Whether you can pitch in $3 or any amount you can afford, no donation is too small.
[**Can you please make a $3 donation to our campaign to flip North Carolina’s Senate seat? We still have a lot of ground to cover to help us close our fundraising gap before our midnight deadline tomorrow.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-aug22.dwKUnu&refcode=em220814-1-MA&t=1&akid=1455%2E357359%2ER4Z0xI)

name: Daley
subject: my dad has been insulted
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SEAN PATRICK MALONEY FOR CONGRESS
body:
Here's what you need to know:
My dads both emailed you.
And now I’m emailing too.
That’s how important this is. The fact is, a Super PAC waged $100,000 in attacks against my dad and he could lose his race. [_**I can’t lie, emailing strangers for money is new to me. But I know what’s at stake. My dad has to raise $1,539 by midnight, or he won’t be able to fund his response ad that tells the truth to voters. I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $15 at this make-or-break moment? >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49229345/361318174/91184225?refcode=20220814_em_fr_b1_daley_30_rs_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTY4MTUyNS1mZjFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14H9-xSmkOFWUG2z8y_wVdrSFHxaQhlLHdRmbksRCi0=) [**Here’s what you need to know about this race:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49229346/361318175/91184225?refcode=20220814_em_fr_b1_daley_30_rs_v2&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMwMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTY4MTUyNS1mZjFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=14H9-xSmkOFWUG2z8y_wVdrSFHxaQhlLHdRmbksRCi0=)

I was so proud to see my dad win, even though Trump won his district.

But now, the Republican Party has officially added him to their top target list. And they’ve raised millions to defeat him.

The day he became President in 2017, the Left started coming after him with impeachment lies. They slandered him. They belittled him. They came after all of us day after day, and it's all for one reason:

This is not who we are, Peter. This is banana republic antics. Having Mar-a-Lago, **the home of the 45th President of the United States** , raided by FBI agents is unprecedented. This is not who we are as a democracy.

name: Jen Jordan
subject: CNN reports:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jen Jordan, Inc
body:
Women across the southeast depend on Georgia for reproductive healthcare. Our campaign could determine the future of that care.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49211560/361272774/1460579386?refcode=EM_FR_220814MMD1_MMD_JJ_FULL_7_NG_N_Logo&fn=&ln=&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com&add1=&ci=Cresco&st=PA&pc=18326&oc=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDAzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMjdlNDM0ZS1kZTFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gld_OBlGf19tyhW2gK7Jj_DR4lEzMVBXk8fJk4oar-w=)
---
CNN recently ran a story highlighting why Georgia is such a critical state in the fight for abortion rights.

Prior to _Roe v. Wade_ being overturned, Georgia was "a hub for abortion access for people across the southeast" and "a space where people could come and have options for where they want to have their abortion.” So when Georgia's own abortion ban went into effect, it hurt folks across an entire region of our country.

[**I'm fighting to restore the right to choose in Georgia as our next Attorney General — but first, I have to defeat Chris Carr (who fought to enact our state's abortion ban). name: Donald J. Trump
subject: My beautiful home was raided
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC
body:
Nothing like this has ever happened to a President of the United States before | These are dark times for our Nation...
[View this message in your browser](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu7m4g8hnrdm5jrupm1h0ug6adslfrfq0kemr6ng_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgeppef9t56egn4tblm1on4t1kmepradrmeej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf2d9imdjmcsr569hnas716urjatb4eqpb8t74ecqraddl6tge5c70shpmcs9kmsrt4s3icgr31cj6e9q32tj0s2q6ac70mkom9pj6coojecr46ur62phmcipm8ptgmlin48d245p25oh4cdhm0pb0chge8o724no)
Nothing like this has ever happened to a President of the United States before | These are dark times for our Nation...
[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuqqqtrjfveuv22jer816eo5oe57gdu6n6fidmj8_rp22sh2s8i66or0clg68o74c3h2bs)

**_[BREAKING: THE FBI RAIDED PRESIDENT TRUMP'S HOME: MAR-A-LAGO](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z91qshk2e0qc86uqd93frji619nh5sat76de305g_rp22sh2s8i66or0clg68o74c3h2bs)_**
** **
Friend,

These are dark times for our Nation, as my beautiful home, Mar-a-Lago in Palm Beach, Florida, was raided, and occupied by a large group of FBI agents.

Nothing like this has ever happened to a President of the United States before, and it's important that you know that it wasn't just my home that was violated - _it was the home of every patriotic American who I have been fighting for since that iconic moment I came down the Golden Escalators in 2015._

**I stood up to the Radical Left's corruption. I restored power to the people and truly delivered for our Country like we have never seen before.__The establishment hated it.__**

Now, as they watch my endorsed candidates win big victories and see my dominance in all polls, they are trying to stop the Republican Party and me once more. **The lawlessness, political persecution, and Witch Hunt, must be exposed and stopped.**

name: Nikki Haley
subject: My friends, America is worth fighting for.
body:
| | | [](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=af1607481db84c41b60bdb4f06269a5f&_e=9G0EHx2aEI2ywu3ijj4wbs5T5DbNcIKn9SRAjoR9zsWolxACTGhPC0Imj_SMffz5X6SfYbWLzZHhm3-cOqFO5a28alExyeJDQ4Z00VAHnfxYzC1MGcer144OKgXlVCN_s0MDCGitf5fDYLyeWKau9ieg5TzgSGNtC2fQtrq1ql6SJPVMr1nl81g31un2h9wpBa37XQJfP8eulgZCq_OjC6I59sZn1JyMzz5E1oNMcck7AKa0t_xInfY2aOU98z4QODYhOwRsbxPE5QozR-CLxByBbr8RgnIwktgHlWIumxNYx7992hbcpmhwmJ3vPC6JzdVTwb3-kNrF_lugutWKPcsX1D7hVMsSpRGxLtF7Q5EUzYtrKzX4z9Z3pj9CbHFMfy6Azy7qXr6I3vOpqsQ3PVxEHEHG_pJyr5q-uejHtNo%3D)
---
Friend,
---
I haven’t just seen the American story. I’ve lived the American story. My friends, America is worth fighting for. Where we lead, the world follows. When we speak, the world listens. What we are, the world wants. We must join together to defend America’s values and fight for solutions that lift up all Americans. That’s why I’m campaigning across the country to elect bold conservatives who are unafraid to stand for America. [**That is why I am asking you to make your most generous gift right now and join Stand For America PAC in this mission.**](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=af1607481db84c41b60bdb4f06269a5f&_e=9G0EHx2aEI2ywu3ijj4wbs5T5DbNcIKn9SRAjoR9zsWolxACTGhPC0Imj_SMffz5X6SfYbWLzZHhm3-cOqFO5a28alExyeJDQ4Z00VAHnfxYzC1MGcer144OKgXlVCN_s0MDCGitf5fDYLyeWKau9ieg5TzgSGNtC2fQtrq1ql6SJPVMr1nl81g31un2h9wpBa37XQJfP8eulgZCq_OjCyQwmvt6FSHrfVwe96UdxnZRO3g9PVvFdrerbvbeAB2t7cWvLLWDCmFz9JFS8SiGJhRVFUVRdTBAbTU52cj-eTJNoZ6Ju92z4nfRt4S93jHE2YnDNHvL0ZDYCC8VF6ik-pmwb0hw23V05E2wIMi0mvjTMhH1FGLqAMC7SefJmUmx3WF9yrG9JQ7Op_pYXhD7G8NkDdp7hI3yIQPIpXW8dUg%3D) Democrats have captured the school classroom, the corporate boardroom, the media green room, and the backrooms of government. They own the commanding heights of culture and politics, and they’re using their position to turn Americans against each other, and against our own country. This problem runs deeper than being “woke.” It’s bigger than “Critical Race Theory.” **Those things are dangerous, but the greater danger is that anger toward America is now the bedrock belief of the American Left.** The biggest threat we face is our loss of confidence and conviction in the American cause. It’s the self-loathing that says America doesn’t deserve our love. But I have hope because of conservatives across the country just like you. By contributing today, you stand with nearly two million committed conservatives who have joined Stand For America PAC to ensure we protect the values that make America the greatest country in the world. Thank you in advance for your generous contribution. My very best,
---
[](https://links.standforamericanow.com/u/click?_t=d85fab909a98477596691a746a1de4c5&_m=af1607481db84c41b60bdb4f06269a5f&_e=9G0EHx2aEI2ywu3ijj4wbs5T5DbNcIKn9SRAjoR9zsWolxACTGhPC0Imj_SMffz5X6SfYbWLzZHhm3-cOqFO5a28alExyeJDQ4Z00VAHnfxYzC1MGcer144OKgXlVCN_s0MDCGitf5fDYLyeWKau9ieg5TzgSGNtC2fQtrq1ql6SJPVMr1nl81g31un2h9wpBa37XQJfP8eulgZCq_OjC-7TXPCWEy8ha-q1_t_Y1iq9qGOzGP0fTWja37jcLpp43i62sLMUCe5DVJ9utmHhU5g1NzxgGxXlayQABR9e-NXi3CgkBgM8hSy88yg8f5J6Kn-UX5V9lcEU-KLPFCMeh44HMt3NuQLVw7YHJ9eF7-g98J-I36uEHB68H70yxSUr6MiGPwqr1sPD2zV2Y1Y-m9P4z4w_CxSgyeJ7za5SsK0%3D)

Nikki Haley

clean_body: | | | Friend, I haven’t just seen the American story. I’ve lived the American story. My friends, America is worth fighting for. Where we lead, the world follows. When we speak, the world listens. What we are, the world wants. We must join together to defend America’s values and fight for solutions that lift up all Americans. That’s why I’m campaigning across the country to elect bold conservatives who are unafraid to stand for America. Democrats have captured the school classroom, the corporate boardroom, the media green room, and the backrooms of government. They own the commanding heights of culture and politics, and they’re using their position to turn Americans against each other, and against our own country. This problem runs deeper than being “woke.” It’s bigger than “Critical Race Theory.” Those things are dangerous, but the greater danger is that anger toward America is now the bedrock belief of the American Left. The biggest threat we face is our loss of confidence and conviction in the American cause. It’s the self-loathing that says America doesn’t deserve our love. But I have hope because of conservatives across the country just like you. By contributing today, you stand with nearly two million committed conservatives who have joined Stand For America PAC to ensure we protect the values that make America the greatest country in the world. Thank you in advance for your generous contribution. My very best, Nikki Haley | DON’T MISS THIS UPDATE Did you know Nikki Haley recently endorsed a new slate of candidates for the upcoming midterm elections? name: Harriet Hageman
subject: You're fired, Liz
body:
This will be the most important race in the entire country... |
Peter,

Will you help me FIRE Liz Cheney and take back our conservative movement from the elitist establishment that is working arm-in-arm with Joe Biden?

No sooner had President Trump endorsed my primary challenge to Liz Cheney did she shoot back with her usual arrogance to "bring it."

[**Well, I'm counting on you to help me bring it by chipping in with an emergency donation to my campaign to FIRE Liz Cheney.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999469:JRsFTmVNM:m:1:3253819041:DBE3A97E8505319CB5446E9636F8ADB2:r)
[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999469:JRsFTmVNM:m:1:3253819041:DBE3A97E8505319CB5446E9636F8ADB2:r)
You and I don't have a moment to lose...

That's because establishment elitists, like George W. Bush, headline ritzy fundraisers in other states to raise millions for Cheney.

That was even after Cheney admitted in a 60 Minutes interview that her record-breaking fundraising haul was helped out by Democrats.

If there was ever a time for conservative Americans to stand up to the elitist establishment, it's now. And it's against Liz Cheney.

[**Will you help me stand up with an urgently needed donation today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999469:JRsFTmVNM:m:1:3253819041:DBE3A97E8505319CB5446E9636F8ADB2:r)

I'm getting ahead of myself.

Before you decide to give to my campaign to FIRE establishment-anointed Liz Cheney from Congress, **let me tell you a little about who I am, why President Trump endorsed my primary challenge, and why we need your immediate help.**

My name is Harriet Hageman, and Wyoming is my home.

Growing up on a ranch outside Ft. Laramie, I learned the value of hard work, integrity, self-sufficiency, and honesty from an early age.

They're not just values Joe Biden and his socialists hate - they run absolutely counter to the establishment elites who have for too long controlled our Republican Party... and sold out our country to the highest bidder.

**I should know - like many in my state, and many more around the country, I was duped by these same "Republicans."**

**And as a constitutional lawyer who fought against Bill Clinton's EPA regulations, I watched in disgust as establishment elites like Liz Cheney embraced big government and abandoned our conservative values.**

Unfortunately, it's only gotten worse since President Trump left office.

And now, backed by their friends on the left and the media, Cheney and the establishment are waging a full-blown war on Americans like you and me!

[**No more. Will you support my campaign to defeat Liz Cheney by making an emergency donation today? I'll be honest, her LIBERAL big money backers are putting millions of dollars into her campaign right. Without your help, I don't stand a chance.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999469:JRsFTmVNM:m:1:3253819041:DBE3A97E8505319CB5446E9636F8ADB2:r)
[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999469:JRsFTmVNM:m:1:3253819041:DBE3A97E8505319CB5446E9636F8ADB2:r)
As I said at the start of this email, **President Trump is 100% behind me.**

He knows the people of Wyoming - and the _American_ people - deserve better than Cheney, and he knows I'll never abandon our conservative values once elected to Congress.

In Wyoming, we have a long and proud history of standing up against an overbearing government.

In Washington, I promise to do the same...

...unlike Cheney, who spends more time fist-bumping Joe Biden and complimenting Nancy Pelosi than she does fighting back against big government bureaucrats who _waste our tax dollars_ , _fling open our borders_ , and _silence, censor, and even lock up conservatives_ who disagree!

**But even though I have President Trump's complete and total endorsement, there's one endorsement I still need: yours.**

[**Will you make an donation today to show President Trump that you're still a part of his MAGA-America First Movement?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999469:JRsFTmVNM:m:1:3253819041:DBE3A97E8505319CB5446E9636F8ADB2:r)
[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999469:JRsFTmVNM:m:1:3253819041:DBE3A97E8505319CB5446E9636F8ADB2:r)
You should know that, even though polls show Cheney is grossly unpopular in Wyoming, she still thinks she can win re-election.

**In fact, when liberal _60 Minutes_ asked her if she could beat me in the primary, she said "absolutely...this is going to be the most important House race in the country."**

Well, she was right about something - this will be the most important race in the entire country - but only because it will be the first step in saving America from the big government elites who enable Joe Biden.

Again, I'll need your help to beat her.

As I said, Cheney can count on the deep pocketbooks of the entire establishment.

That's not even saying anything for her left-wing supporters, who see this as their chance to weaken our Republican Party for good.

**But with your help, I know we can beat them. And I know we can send the disastrous Cheney political dynasty packing for good.**

[**So please, won't you ensure that Liz Cheney bury me, a true conservative, with money from her swampy elite friends?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999469:JRsFTmVNM:m:1:3253819041:DBE3A97E8505319CB5446E9636F8ADB2:r)
[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999469:JRsFTmVNM:m:1:3253819041:DBE3A97E8505319CB5446E9636F8ADB2:r)
Liz Cheney represents everything the left stands for, and everything we must fight against.

Will you help me make sure we win that fight?

Respectfully,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999469:JRsFTmVNM:m:1:3253819041:DBE3A97E8505319CB5446E9636F8ADB2:r)
Harriet Hageman
America First Conservative for Congress (WY)

P.S. It's disgusting to see Liz Cheney teaming up with George Bush to demonize conservatives and raise millions to back Nancy Pelosi's unconstitutional power grabs in Congress.

It's even more disgusting to watch her claim she speaks for the people of Wyoming and America.

[**No more - will you make an urgent donation to my campaign to defeat her in the Republican primary?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999469:JRsFTmVNM:m:1:3253819041:DBE3A97E8505319CB5446E9636F8ADB2:r)

[DONATE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999469:JRsFTmVNM:m:1:3253819041:DBE3A97E8505319CB5446E9636F8ADB2:r)

---

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999469:JRsFTmVNM:m:1:3253819041:DBE3A97E8505319CB5446E9636F8ADB2:r)
---

| Paid for by:
Hageman For Wyoming
P.O. Box 4157
Cheyenne, WY 82003
---

name: Rep. Dana Criswell
subject: Stewarding Freedom Well
body:
Stewarding Freedom Well by Rebecca ChaneyPreserving the American Constitutional Republic hinges on the fervent stewardship of Biblical precepts that have been founding pillars of American society | |
---

| | | Stewarding Freedom Well |
---|---|---
| by Rebecca ChaneyPreserving the American Constitutional Republic hinges on the fervent stewardship of Biblical precepts that have been founding pillars of American society and her institutions for generations. I say that right out of the proverbial gate, because while at first glance that may make readers squirm, it is nonetheless true. The life-giving precepts of our founding are profitable for all people - no force necessary. Our entire American jurisprudence is founded on the Decalogue. In this, we find life and freedom because there is freedom in the law. A University of Houston study examined over 15,000 historical writings of our Founders, and the most cited sources for our Founding documents are compelling to note: • 4th most cited source at 2.9% was John Locke
• 3rd most cited source at 7.9% was William Blackstone
• 2nd most cited source, at 8.3%, was Charles Montesquieu
• 1st most cited source at 34% was THE BIBLE!Many countries have cycled through multiple forms of government. France is on her fifteenth! This unfortunate characteristic has not defined America. In Philosopher and Theologian John Locke's "Treatise of Government," a primary influence on the Declaration, he cites the Bible over 1,500 times, showing proper civil government operation. The Constitution is the carrying out of that which has been declared. They are inseparable documents. Are we giving an active defense and assertion of the unchanging principles set forth by our Founding documents? Are we breathing for them? Have we forgotten that our Constitution is based on the higher Moral Law of God that transcends elected officials and lower social compact laws? The viable path forward to restoring true freedom will depend upon the ground the true Church takes in politics. Inalienable rights are _never_ subject to a vote. We have allowed an unconstitutional blurring of sacred jurisdictional lines. In America, we are Caesar! The reason American Founding documents have been the most successful in all of history is because our Forefathers and our Founding Fathers flipped the false government ideology on its head. They knew that power comes from God to the people, and the people distribute it back to the government as appropriate, not the other way around. They knew that God lays out clearly how government is to operate. Exodus 18:21, Jeremiah 17:9, Leviticus 19:34, Deuteronomy 17:6, Deuteronomy 17:15, Ezekiel 18:20, Isaiah 33:22, and Ezra 7:24 are just a few of many scriptures to show us that the Constitutional Republic is the highest form of Republicanism. We have dual citizenship as Christians; we are citizens of not only Heaven but also the earth, and we are placed in this stewardship capacity in America with a stewardship form of government that belongs to We the People. In Luke 19:13, we are told to occupy until the Lord comes, and in Genesis 2:15, God tells us to tend the garden. Individual stewardship and trust given come with sacred duty. As John Quincy Adams stated, "Sacred duty ours; results God's." The government rests on His shoulders Isaiah 9:6 affirms. This frees us to serve with peace, joy, and hope. What will you do to steward the gift of our Constitutional Republic? God is the multiplier of our efforts. Be encouraged. Day to day, simply obey. The outcome does not depend upon us! Onward! |
---
_Rebecca is married to Wes Chaney, and they have two children ages 10 and 8. They own GreenKeepers, LLC, and have been in the residential and commercial landscape business for 18 years. _
_The Chaney family have had seven years of homeschool life. Rebecca is the_[ _Restore Liberty_](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/8VCA6ZT3nJw71SNdmVZsdw) _Mississippi Director, a non-profit organization committed to restoring liberty and freedom in the way America's Founders intended. She is a Lifetime Patriot Academy Constitutional Coach and has been facilitating Constitutional and Biblical Citizenship classes in the Madison County area since the fall of 2020. She is excited to see this effort grow all over the state! _
_Rebecca has served in a variety of consulting capacities within the Mississippi political terrain, including the Mississippi Freedom Caucus where she is an active Steering Committee member, and the_[ _Mississippi Parents for Vaccine Rights_](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/Up07veu46Em68db_g8gXiA) _organization where she serves as Chaplain._
_ Rebecca loves sports, leading worship, and her greatest hope is to see her children walk in truth. For practical tactical information on how to defeat the corrupt ideologies that plague our nation and to engage in a holistic approach toward self-governance and the restoration of civil liberties per our Constitution, you can reach Rebecca at rebeccachaney@protonmail.com_

|
* * *
| The Caucus is a political organization dedicated to promoting the ideals of individual rights, limited government and free enterprise within the state of Mississippi.
| Mississippi Freedom Caucus
530 George Street, Suite 200
Jackson, MS 39202
www.FreedomCaucus.ms
662-469-6242
info@freedomcaucus.ms
---|---

You are currently subscribed to a mailing list of Mississippi Freedom Caucus. If you wish to unsubscribe, please click [here](https://www.votervoice.net/BroadcastLinks/kxhc-e52JdZJMAntoezPZQ).
[](https://www.votervoice.net)

name: Conor McGuire
subject: re: our mid-month goal
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GABE VASQUEZ FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hey there, it’s Conor — your favorite Finance Director! With less than three months (86 days to be exact!) until the general election, we’ve really kicked things into high-gear over here on #TeamVasquez. We’re holding more events, giving out more yard signs, and preparing to knock more doors and reach as many voters as possible to ensure we flip this toss-up seat from red to blue on November 8. But all of that takes resources, and by resources I mean money. And lots of it. Campaigns aren’t cheap, and it’s especially hard going up against an incumbent with the backing of corporate special interests and Donald Trump’s war chest. That’s what makes your grassroots donations so impactful, friend. Gabe is running a people-powered campaign fueled by contributions from people like you. We’re counting on this movement to come through and help us stay on track the closer we get to Election Day and the more expenses add up. This Tuesday marks the middle of the month, so we’ve set a goal of raising $50,000 by then. Can Gabe and I count on you to pitch in towards our goal? **Here’s a personal link to make your donation:[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/vas-email-aug2022/personal](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49229937/361320809/162100326?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220814mm1finance_cm_od60_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NDk5YWM5MC0wMzFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Jt6YmGskLlSGMoKB7E_c4Jt2DalqTha03Fq6WxEC_jg=)** Thanks so much for powering us to the general and giving us what we need to win! — Conor | | Gabe Vasquez is a first-generation American and former City Councilor running for Congress to challenge Yvette Herrell and fight for New Mexico’s 2nd Congressional District. He's building a people-powered movement to flip this critical House seat from red to blue and take his experience in office, passion for the environment, immigrant and civil rights, and economic justice to Congress for the people of New Mexico.

name: Aadland For Colorado
subject: Another Congressman Endorses Erik
body:
"Proud" to have Erik as a colleague
| | | |
---
---
| Congressman Doug Lamborn Endorsement
---
|
---
| | |
---|---
|
(August 18, 2022) Today, Erik Aadland, CD7 Republican candidate for Congress, announces a formal endorsement from CD5 Representative, Doug Lamborn.

Congressman Lamborn is the U.S. representative for Colorado's 5th congressional district. Lamborn participated in the Colorado General Assembly from 1995 to 2006, in both the State House and State Senate. During his time in the Colorado Legislature, Lamborn was elected Senate President Pro-Tem, served as Chairman of the Senate State Military and Veterans Affairs Committee, Chairman of the Senate Republican Caucus, and House Majority Whip.

In 2006, Lamborn was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives to represent Colorado's Fifth District. Because of the district's military and veteran concentration, Lamborn serves as a high-ranking member on the House Armed Services Committee and a former member for ten years of the Veterans Affairs Committee.

Additionally, Lamborn serves as the Ranking Member of the Readiness Subcommittee of the House Armed Services Committee and is also part of the Strategic Forces subcommittee, which oversees our nation's nuclear weapons, ballistic missile defense, national security space programs, and Department of Energy national security programs.

Lamborn is currently serving on the House Natural Resources Committee and its subcommittee on National Parks, Forests, and Public Lands, and the Energy and Mineral Resources subcommittee.
---
| In a statement sent to Erik Aadland's campaign, Congressman Lamborn said:
"I enthusiastically endorse Erik Aadland for Congress. As a decorated combat veteran, Erik understands the daunting challenges facing those who have served. He also understands the need to support current service members with the best training and resources possible. As a businessman with international experience, Erik knows what it takes to promote a healthy economy. His unique experience has prepared him well to serve the constituents of District 7. I would be proud to call Erik Aadland my colleague."
---
| |
---
---
|
# Erik's Remarks
---
| |
---
|
---
| Congressman Lamborn's depth of experience in Washington makes his endorsement all the more meaningful. I admire his steadfastness in standing up for Colorado values, and his dedication to serving our veterans and current service members. I look forward to working with him to address the needs of our constituents.
---
---
| |
---
---
| | [Send Erik your feedback](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U81lN_qFdLWkWF12KhomKPHkc-3pA2hFmkjNCnDdEU0V6n6bs3kfFlyrLAn_UCvm3IHITvQbXZ5GWKlcxo6KojE_eeiGRKeiOQpJTSIwJGFwt3wz_AW1SMq7eeQO9a930UacWGBJ0Uq2CeIxiSQF7ktlRZxjdLXZ5VPMOmSjtFJiSEXFOTv_77efoH25Yr5TX5C5dTvScygNXnx5QnfVj76n9kgNApNutvIDO-p_ujnRJiFg6GudtqonM545StkNUES6dNU1_3I=&c=SqLT0lyB5LOGfrxZNe9fHA0Lgh6aPurOBXnSDP6t2GOUO_kle6NsuA==&ch=Chsa7v-N0y6i3-Q0Nv7rYbUNNnFiS1qFjiEpif6ybXBLfMs0zvjAvQ==)
---
| |
---
|
## About Erik
---
| |
---
| Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children.
---
---
|
## About Aadland For Congress
---
| |
---
| Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in March of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professional people, friends and neighbors.
You can stand with Erik by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001U81lN_qFdLWkWF12KhomKPHkc-3pA2hFmkjNCnDdEU0V6n6bs3kfFryJMKQjt7ul43FiNLBATW3BvOtuChAelv0dgQf0c1fDAuIsDJ3t-3VWhVPCsQ67ouHzmZ0T2O_k5CXcoIXSOIDbnFgdSn5uGQ==&c=SqLT0lyB5LOGfrxZNe9fHA0Lgh6aPurOBXnSDP6t2GOUO_kle6NsuA==&ch=Chsa7v-N0y6i3-Q0Nv7rYbUNNnFiS1qFjiEpif6ybXBLfMs0zvjAvQ==)
---

clean_body: "Proud" to have Erik as a colleague | | | | | Congressman Doug Lamborn Endorsement | | | | ---|--- | (August 18, 2022) Today, Erik Aadland, CD7 Republican candidate for Congress, announces a formal endorsement from CD5 Representative, Doug Lamborn. Congressman Lamborn is the U.S. representative for Colorado's 5th congressional district. Lamborn participated in the Colorado General Assembly from 1995 to 2006, in both the State House and State Senate. During his time in the Colorado Legislature, Lamborn was elected Senate President Pro-Tem, served as Chairman of the Senate State Military and Veterans Affairs Committee, Chairman of the Senate Republican Caucus, and House Majority Whip. In 2006, Lamborn was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives to represent Colorado's Fifth District. Because of the district's military and veteran concentration, Lamborn serves as a high-ranking member on the House Armed Services Committee and a former member for ten years of the Veterans Affairs Committee. Additionally, Lamborn serves as the Ranking Member of the Readiness Subcommittee of the House Armed Services Committee and is also part of the Strategic Forces subcommittee, which oversees our nation's nuclear weapons, ballistic missile defense, national security space programs, and Department of Energy national security programs. Lamborn is currently serving on the House Natural Resources Committee and its subcommittee on National Parks, Forests, and Public Lands, and the Energy and Mineral Resources subcommittee. | In a statement sent to Erik Aadland's campaign, Congressman Lamborn said: "I enthusiastically endorse Erik Aadland for Congress. As a decorated combat veteran, Erik understands the daunting challenges facing those who have served. He also understands the need to support current service members with the best training and resources possible. As a businessman with international experience, Erik knows what it takes to promote a healthy economy. His unique experience has prepared him well to serve the constituents of District 7. I would be proud to call Erik Aadland my colleague." | | | Erik's Remarks | | | | Congressman Lamborn's depth of experience in Washington makes his endorsement all the more meaningful. I admire his steadfastness in standing up for Colorado values, and his dedication to serving our veterans and current service members. I look forward to working with him to address the needs of our constituents. | | | | == | | | About Erik | | | Jefferson County resident Erik Aadland is a West Point graduate and a twice-decorated Bronze Star veteran--one for valor--from his time in Iraq and Afghanistan. Concluding his army career in 2011 as a Captain, he pursued a career in the oil and natural gas industry with his work culminating as a project manager directing the onshore construction of the Leviathan Project in Dor, Israel. This project resulted in Israel being energy-independent and a net exporter of natural gas. Erik holds a master's degree in the field of psychology. He is a devoted husband and proud father of three children. | About Aadland For Congress | | | Erik's effort to represent Colorado District 7 (CD7) is a true grass-roots campaign. There is no family fortune behind this drive; no generations of beer barons or Fat-Cat donors from California and New York backing our organization. Volunteers and professionals began joining the cause to help send Erik to Washington in March of 2021. Staff personnel now cross the spectrum of political pundits, professional people, friends and neighbors. You can stand with Erik by contributing to our cause. We can't do it alone, but together we can do anything. == | Please use the button below to provide your financial support and help insure Erik Aadland is our Republican candidate to the U.S. House of Representatives | == | | | | == == == | PO Box 630552 | Littleton, CO 80163 tel:720-464-4488 == | | | | | | | Aadland for Congress | PO Box 630552, Littleton, CO 80163 | (720) 464-4488 | | Sent by mailto:staff@aadlandforcolorado.com in collaboration with

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=951f5680a9dc43a293451dfc38d79da9&_e=CKXi3GfM4PYt2C3Jzo3O-Q3lVx9NH1ltVY8_dziBuUP0NzrxdsIryxAyEMSEJXrul2gyI2ElTCINkx1bZrf1Ep8r-dm7_zKJiQbHuxdZUElBEYxSZPa7TyKtjb6oblqJETfCu1vViZz3hpnblUcKxLfFjD6LxryauWjLWVQ1PeqjjCgKHPkPcjnNQRXxSExcmv3Jfis3mZ8WGMAbiPR9TFhTrrOfSfTp3mR0GJNFqd-mgCe65QIRWE8vb5vFNh2J06W-SdMb-VW6AWQkPDYHOVjOwJlHT2CifI8MLvtrFlimJauK_fDDk_PBc19bW7dggf5rRJF3uRsQj81NzIFI3adIED7va0NKx1oC1urWMGRVmzGFu0_q1GugQ9nRLPWPxo9b3v1ALBnuJKbmMrGm3xaqGVEmpZEhug3EJfcpbl_sDt7MKtZ0AUvB_DPLmm4Jcveq68fMG1pt-NdAgQXYug%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=951f5680a9dc43a293451dfc38d79da9&_e=CKXi3GfM4PYt2C3Jzo3O-Q3lVx9NH1ltVY8_dziBuUP0NzrxdsIryxAyEMSEJXrul2gyI2ElTCINkx1bZrf1Ep8r-dm7_zKJiQbHuxdZUElBEYxSZPa7TyKtjb6oblqJETfCu1vViZz3hpnblUcKxLfFjD6LxryauWjLWVQ1PeqjjCgKHPkPcjnNQRXxSExcmv3Jfis3mZ8WGMAbiPR9TFhTrrOfSfTp3mR0GJNFqd9uvlZaJoH1VlwD_4dNq-jYyw9FnW7Kpo5T3hUC8TCr5En2nRLupGYB3Dy_R3bRwTvYzojo1jrd05lmMSqgwNNckWVlX-T6FRByR0AikLtzuCsR08U4TW7IuASatNV-LcO8C66FywTVEDz-fLpO6KnO0HMF5rFUYdY0asFAzZy-9__3b9Fsah7GdfJvheG-6PDbIz-7R23fFp-k1N8EpwiCljmJh6O3fGAaQHTjQS3ytA%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=951f5680a9dc43a293451dfc38d79da9&_e=CKXi3GfM4PYt2C3Jzo3O-Q3lVx9NH1ltVY8_dziBuUP0NzrxdsIryxAyEMSEJXrul2gyI2ElTCINkx1bZrf1Ep8r-dm7_zKJiQbHuxdZUElBEYxSZPa7TyKtjb6oblqJETfCu1vViZz3hpnblUcKxLfFjD6LxryauWjLWVQ1PeqjjCgKHPkPcjnNQRXxSExcmv3Jfis3mZ8WGMAbiPR9TFhTrrOfSfTp3mR0GJNFqd_qVVHp-BUKirboNcZrNKtkTZvkzqxxi4-ECFSm2bO1PLSxjX--KvpUFzr4Fh_2gimxcpsuHJsAxuWcNGKhdddkT7J0eDo_RWLtYbeXYiu_x25Nrh097GqytzZe2h_4Rc4z_oY4Nn6ZkI-Bd20knEq7sME60mQHmAouH8NHRT43vgpcHM0n8ZRzZlSOJBDObgwQbkR-TzY98xU6a-aK5qPtIv8PesC4oUYnInvfaftbZw%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. clean_body: I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;” Reaching over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. every day to maximize our efforts across Texas. We can’t risk falling
short.

name: Stacey Abrams HQ
subject: We cannot allow Georgia Republicans to outwork our momentum
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ABRAMS FOR GOVERNOR |
body:
[1]Stacey Abrams for Governor

Georgia “State Republicans push to match Democratic organizing”
Axios Atlanta (7.25.22)

Derek, we have an
urgent update:

Brian Kemp and his Republican allies are now ramping up their voter
outreach efforts across the state.

We were already up against an incumbent governor with immense power, who
seems to be willing to do whatever he can to hold on to power — including
suppressing our votes.

And now, Kemp and national Republicans are working overtime to turn out
their own supporters, while trying to make it harder for Black and brown
people to vote.

We cannot allow them to slow down our momentum. We’re in this fight to
create opportunity for all — but that’s a fight that requires each of us
digging deep in order to win.

As a grassroots campaign, we need your help to reach out to voters and
spread Stacey’s message to every corner of Georgia.

[ https://act.staceyabrams.com/go/1619?refcode=sa_em_220814_B1_Axios_S1_T1_HQ_30opener_RS&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amount=5&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C250&t=1002&akid=1455%2E1862389%2EHep0bH ]We have a data-driven plan to defeat Kemp, but victory depends on
continued and sustained investments from committed
supporters like you.

We were already up against an incumbent governor with immense power, who seems to be willing to do whatever he can to hold on to power — including suppressing our votes. And now, Kemp and national Republicans are working overtime to turn out their own supporters, while trying to make it harder for Black and brown people to vote. We cannot allow them to slow down our momentum. We’re in this fight to create opportunity for all — but that’s a fight that requires each of us digging deep in order to win.
