body:
As you may know, I tend to speak my mind and I never beat around the bush -- just like President Trump -- so believe me when I say this: I'm very worried.
Hey Peter, this is Jim Jordan.
As you may know, I tend to speak my mind and I never beat around the bush _\-- just like President Trump --_ so believe me when I say this: **I 'm very worried.**
I just found out that Democrats already raised over $1 BILLION online this year alone. [**I 'm personally asking everyone on this list to pitch in just ten bucks before we completely fall behind.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999489:6AJM8mVNS:m:1:3253819041:0DEE8B3946CB5AC339E4F1E224A0731B:r)
This staggering number proves it. The Left's army of Trump-hating megadonors will do anything to defeat us and Democrats are CASHING IN. We can still defeat them but only with the support from EVERY LAST ONE of our Pro-Trump American Patriots.
When the stakes are this high, even just ten bucks can make a huge difference. Can I count on you to help save the day? I certainly hope so.
**[Pitch In Ten Bucks >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999489:6AJM8mVNS:m:1:3253819041:0DEE8B3946CB5AC339E4F1E224A0731B:r)**
**[Pitch In More >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999490:6AJM8mVNS:m:1:3253819041:0DEE8B3946CB5AC339E4F1E224A0731B:r)**
Look, I can't stand asking you for money. If there was another back-up plan, I would not be emailing you right now. **Unfortunately, this is an emergency.**
Democrat fundraising is SURGING and we are completely out of options.
If you consider yourself a Pro-Trump American Patriot, here's how we win: [**everyone reading this _\-- including you --_ must pitch in a few bucks by tonight. Can you help?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999490:6AJM8mVNS:m:1:3253819041:0DEE8B3946CB5AC339E4F1E224A0731B:r)
To victory,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/60999490:6AJM8mVNS:m:1:3253819041:0DEE8B3946CB5AC339E4F1E224A0731B:r)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: One more day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The mid-month fundraising deadline is fast approaching.
#
Derek,
John Fetterman only has one more day until his critical mid-month fundraising deadline.
So we’ll cut to the chase:
_**The future of our Senate majority all comes down to PA — Democrats’ #1 pick up opportunity this year.**_
[**_Please, rush a donation to help us raise $275,000 before our mid-month deadline tomorrow. This is the moment we need to all come together to show John that we have his back._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220814-1?refcode=em20220814-6855&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6855_434096_zo3sRN&akid=6855%2E434096%2Ezo3sRN)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220814-1?refcode=em20220814-6855&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6855_434096_zo3sRN&akid=6855%2E434096%2Ezo3sRN)**
Here’s a quick look at what’s at stake:
* Pennsylvania is CNN’s #1 Most Likely to Flip U.S. Senate seat of 2022, and Nate Silver’s 538 ranked PA a “TOSS-UP”
* WE will need serious resources to win in November. **Dr. Oz AND Republican super PACs have already spent over $40 million** , making this the most expensive Senate race in the country. That number is only going to go up. We need to raise up a grassroots army so big that we can match them dollar-for-dollar.
* We wouldn’t ask for your donation if it weren’t so critical right now. And we’ll need every dollar we can get before the election, and that’s why we are emailing you right now.

[**_Can you be one of our essential mid-month grassroots donors by making a $5 contribution today? With less than three months until the election, this is a critical time to support John._**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220814-1?refcode=em20220814-6855&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6855_434096_zo3sRN&akid=6855%2E434096%2Ezo3sRN)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20220814-1?refcode=em20220814-6855&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=6855_434096_zo3sRN&akid=6855%2E434096%2Ezo3sRN)**
Every single donation, no matter how big or small, makes a huge difference. Together, we will send John to the Senate and flip PA blue without taking a dime from corporations or their PACs. Be a part of our grassroots fundraising power!
And thank you, from the bottom of our hearts, for making this all possible.
— Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20220814-6855-footer&t=1&refcode2=6855_434096_zo3sRN&akid=6855%2E434096%2Ezo3sRN)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=6855%2E434096%2Ezo3sRN)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=6855%2E434096%2Ezo3sRN)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Diehl for Governor
subject: Reminder: Diehl and Allen Announce Support for Expanded School Choice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DIEHL FOR MASSACHUSETTS
body:
| | | |
---
DIEHL AND ALLEN ANNOUNCE SUPPORT FOR EXPANDED SCHOOL CHOICE
BOSTON, Mass. - Geoff Diehl and Leah Allen, the Republican party's endorsed candidates for Governor and Lieutenant Governor of Massachusetts, issued a call today for expanded school choice across the Bay State.
"Right now, there are many families across our state, particularly in inner cities, where students are being under-served by the public school system available to them," Diehl said. "Leah Allen and I are committed to improving all of our public schools to make them world-class learning institutions. That's our first priority; we fully support our public schools and the funding they need. But we also support providing alternatives to families who conclude that public education isn't the best option for their students. We firmly back school choice for Massachusetts families."
According to Diehl, he and Leah Allen support making school choice universal across Massachusetts. Parents who choose to withdraw their child from public schools will be able to use a portion of the per-pupil funds allotted to their child by the state toward tuition at private schools, parochial schools and home schooling. The money would be available through newly-established Education Savings Accounts. This concept means parents who feel their child is under-served by their local public school will be able to afford to choose a more appropriate option. Diehl and Allen also support lifting the state charter school cap. And, they support expanding the availability and depth of vocational education opportunities offered by public schools.
Recent reports indicate that there has been an exodus of students away from public schools in recent years. Statewide, public school enrollment reportedly has decreased four percent since 2019, with nearly three-quarters of school districts reporting a decline. In the City of Boston, public school enrollment reportedly has dropped 14 percent over the past five years. At the same time, the number of small schools is growing, with students seeking education opportunities in charter schools, vocational schools, private schools, and at-home learning.
"Basically, we believe in promoting the freedom to make alternative education decisions, and in those cases, the dollars will follow the child," Diehl said.
"Our state has an obligation to support the education of every student, regardless of the mode of education they decide works best for them," Allen said. "Geoff Diehl and I want to make sure every family is supported by the state when they make decisions for their children, including where they will learn and what curriculum they will be taught. For some students, that will be in a traditional public school setting, and we support them. For others, that will be in an alternative school setting, and we will support them too. We believe we can improve our public schools by fully-funding them and providing adequate resources for their mission, while at the same time providing additional private school options to Massachusetts families who wish to pursue those opportunities."
Diehl and Allen announced their plans during a press conference in Boston's North End together with South Dakota Governor Kristi Noem. Earlier this year, Governor Noem signed legislation into law expanding school choice in South Dakota, providing additional tax credits for families pursuing private school education for their children.
"Governor Noem has been a leader on the issue of school choice nationwide, and we hope to follow her strong example on this important issue," Diehl said.
Noem is in Boston to support Diehl's campaign and publicly endorsed his candidacy for Governor.
Jay McMahon, the Republican candidate for Attorney General, also joined Diehl, Allen, and Noem at the press conference.

---

name: Blue Missouri 2022
subject: the one thing we know about American elections:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trudy Busch Valentine for Senate
body:
it's that they are EXPENSIVE!!
| | |
---
**Peter, if there's one thing we know to be true about American elections, it's that they are _EXPENSIVE._**
Even if we were running against only one opponent, we would need to build a huge network of grassroots activists to defeat the GOP's army of dark money megadonors. So you can only imagine what we're up against in this _three-way race_ in Missouri.
**Right now, Trudy Busch Valentine is running to defeat not only Eric Schmitt, a MAGA-endorsed anti-abortion puppet of Donald Trump, but also John Wood, another anti-abortion candidate and Mitch McConnell henchman whose entire campaign is being bankrolled by a super PAC.**
Trudy, on the other hand, is a nurse and fourth-generation Missourian who is giving Democrats our best chance in _decades_ to flip this seat blue. And if she wins, Democrats will be all but guaranteed to maintain our Senate majority! Trudy is working night and day to defeat both of her backward-thinking opponents, but the GOP will pull out all the stops – and call on every single megadonor – to keep this state red.
**We can win this thing, Peter, but we can't do it alone.**
**Right now, Trudy is up against a critical mid-month deadline in less than 48 hours, and she's counting on your help to hit her urgent grassroots goal.[So please, will you rush a $5 mid-month donation right now to help us flip this state, expand our Senate majority, and make sure that everyone has a fair shot at their American Dream? name: Ron DeSantis
subject: This is how DICTATORS behave, not a LEADER of a free REPUBLIC!
body:
**[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60998987:6mCekmVrN:m:1:3317145305:B714D395E1582132893B4C76B218FAD6:r)**

Peter,
The FBI's raid of Mar-a-Lago is yet another escalation in the weaponization of federal agencies against the Regime's political opponents, while people like Hunter Biden get treated with kid gloves. Why didn't the FBI ever raid Hillary Clinton's house after she laundered classified information through a private server and then deleted 30,000 emails that were under subpoena?

**The federal Regime is targeting those it dislikes for disfavored treatment**. They are demanding we get in line or face the consequences.

Now, the Regime is getting another 87,000 IRS agents to wield against its adversaries. With this addition, the agency is now larger than the Pentagon, State Department, FBI, and Border Patrol combined, and BILLIONS of dollars are now being directed to fund these new hires. Democrats are not simply expanding an agency. They are growing their army of Biden Regime soldiers standing ready to execute any order by the D.C. Swamp.

The fact that the Left is turning taxpayer-funded government agencies into extensions of the Democrat Machine to do their political bidding right before our eyes should be alarming to every American. **These are not actions indicative of leaders in a free republic._This mirrors a Banana Republic._**

As your Governor, I have always been clear that the power belongs to the People -- _**_not politicians_.**_ This blatant overreach by the federal government is an attack on our democracy and the American people.

It is past time that elected representatives in Washington, D.C. stand up against this abuse of power by using the constitutional power of Congress to hold these agencies accountable. For too long these agencies have been on autopilot with no accountability. Let's make sure they stand up for our rights. No excuses! - _**[Stand with me>>>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60998987:6mCekmVrN:m:1:3317145305:B714D395E1582132893B4C76B218FAD6:r "https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=d0025c081abf2c0c1a0129edd35ee3585ab5764993ef33c944348d145a64d3cdf1fe2dd5a15e89a76fa2a12131287ac420fe5b6547a2f839")**_

Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[RUSH IN A DONATION](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/60998987:6mCekmVrN:m:1:3317145305:B714D395E1582132893B4C76B218FAD6:r)
---
Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor

Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606

body:
| | | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=64b47569697a4ddf9ad3b127a1dcd158&_e=F0NcvuQj-DJ2lebZflFbovr7FBsW94U4LVvAWQXzZB96jphi_yd5b_fbLOdtdZ9vI4y_Q0Behjbxbg9aPD3Og5S9ystKxecbfRd62VU086qGUA6bKmgArG6gv9IOwRZei3Y8SDVH_5-6XfCUEGuVHrXayjPnlnfK7R4fLUHvPikegqHHN8G0ZevKc3xzyyShJxz4xMDw6DXn2G3riLDsnl1vfHz0GqE7WN3RGkB_BCUrXY_Uk0pIbbLTsZirVCWeP4uLT1mpM96-dMrKfAkSsw%3D%3D)
---
**Welcome to the Miyares Roundup!** ** Attorney General Miyares was hard at work this week fighting for Virginians.** _**Supporting the End of CDC Mask Mandate**_
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=64b47569697a4ddf9ad3b127a1dcd158&_e=F0NcvuQj-DJ2lebZflFboqqy9DyxAKkl11KwlSwcL_Kkz-BWL4bEo9t5Sp0aTgN0Ci_EPRcpQ_3YVK8nsceCfGiG4TsXgYlxcS4YylJHWr4KLguUb8lUP4fLElDf3IaBsE6EbpyS7V2bbp-hvfOBcCJ7PKV8ChZ0w3b4Zz-e2LsOYo6-3iZLJK3pXBbItt1D-Pu9QGJYxidM09JPJCYpI47RLb9SWBbyzit7KTzAXTJHzg5BWY8cJ2lZXqC7fay7urJ4mnRXqARzHF4WZo-tq9fstmzAp9UjmGWevff4G3vnEnhdnRVt3Xxa0QqjVv021R2btoUeuRbh_8Cw4vDpa5z1Pm4lr6mpx_Ob1l9NqFDmmfD07ZiZcjWKmdKASVzrDn6wkOvadhev8d7ENo1RmVQW6nrA3OTufZQg1AkTDqE%3D)
---
This week, Attorney General Jason Miyares joined 22 other states in filing an amicus brief arguing against the CDC’s interstate travel mask mandate under the Biden Administration. AG Miyares views the CDC mask mandate on public transportation as a clear example of federal overreach and will continue to defend an American’s right to make their own autonomous decisions.To read the whole brief, click [**here**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=64b47569697a4ddf9ad3b127a1dcd158&_e=F0NcvuQj-DJ2lebZflFbon2bHmYBkc599Y-iwXxC619UobJqkSe2lKZTBFAgQ2cnHIftKzrNS1ZNv4hxBE9kBxBBFHa0ywYpJZ0vlQjszBVzmHS3-Kks-K63iIkrS-BIrUazZyY6jHBtXDiGfoDTJZKgyQzNsQIpgTo-70FwmTTyRpHHe5yqM55K8ayXxD7vmqYViG6Xcne_H7349MWvEhvdzXP8KdnVCCpzaCW4GnSa0F-W-cxuuB8L4XhujcIwBFpdxzjc1DuBPa2Jf6uYCHh8ZX2yRlzPVtZjy68rfzQ9Tj1ggsX06Hm7qpxb1-Opoi2RXTOynFaNjbuxk63Kdg%3D%3D). [**Attacks on Pregnancy Resource Centers Documentary**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=64b47569697a4ddf9ad3b127a1dcd158&_e=F0NcvuQj-DJ2lebZflFbohxhaxRss2t121vuizluy7Vvf5qsnt23afFbSnBhZlJ9T2ecjM0VdPyhkeTsBPXsHwfjz90RiBN6OaXzpUAKE1pYZEmqevblRh4NszJy7_bBmKxba8NtDDqjl7uxLsiTkpXR4TsFbEGvJwBwoxSQT3R-WR-jYLb6Qcpr9G7CsukuoVE4N0pEgZI_Dzy9rSBMHVH6yEdrfjF5wUwt36qibu-RGIvRhZF9nuDS60NiY7MUzyO75TGrLpELj1GyXRfzf2wLsANAFTrihP113vuw038%3D)
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=64b47569697a4ddf9ad3b127a1dcd158&_e=F0NcvuQj-DJ2lebZflFbohxhaxRss2t121vuizluy7Vvf5qsnt23afFbSnBhZlJ9T2ecjM0VdPyhkeTsBPXsH0YCQDBy_J_QvdLS41g4WA2iLEnnrysbTxa1VTeCyQSUN2YWp1p8bpMz3iokwPhIVEwcCibZCyMMdutJ3Pw9Yf_IDOJUdJyRsnP4N876D9aVDzNKeNG02AGSGrIrWDYfakOVeJzZKmK4xhaDKAOKNsAdXtS2f-nOL-DINyuvIQuEgFcJnrxszqY6EpZFHnEI9Yseo1sEFB5ahj-T9O_tHZY%3D)
---
Following AG Miyares’s visit to the recently vandalized Blue Ridge Pregnancy Center in Lynchburg, VA, the Daily Signal produced a great documentary sharing the story and implications of the attack. Featured in the [video](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=64b47569697a4ddf9ad3b127a1dcd158&_e=F0NcvuQj-DJ2lebZflFbohxhaxRss2t121vuizluy7Vvf5qsnt23afFbSnBhZlJ9T2ecjM0VdPyhkeTsBPXsH7Ot_9Du0vPjVxrgvKuBYWTugw1p9ckcDhAj7d4HWPY-bRqc50uNg9qLzTFKJgXEjTpLWaNzHDN4L-I-93MESgmT8I3o1dX_nKxCkh5iGNCIqWlHShGCrhPvJcDi9bfbvO0cRCqe_s9Fso0ynbNv8424MeNZdH6nNuOlhSn5CW4q_fFyKxpQjjBaIUc7mM6Uat33WM048WHGtzTDK51ANYg%3D), AG Miyares condemns the cowardly acts of vandalism against the very women they claim to be standing up for. [**We Love Our Virginia Farmers!**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=64b47569697a4ddf9ad3b127a1dcd158&_e=F0NcvuQj-DJ2lebZflFbohWvnHybodDjVUE1UiaDG4Wa2SACTwCWd8fvN7v3rAJkiGKxNhw6a44OpWrRR9S0zeOXiwDzTeTX43j4E2Bzb1NTPhW0cCLwEVRe9RPcZBUhwCg3Mx5NGhQphTFmCa-yRbRUgpeyCP0MDUkLaKjtClDKbqwJiDiqSq7WqqOGRUlBo57zWUZNVYK59KlKhZand5WY8rokDQOddHItckFz9mkDgNsAThEU6zxhIHtpN8jQjuAqkRM-GoSPVxJm6aY_fn8HrDMMr7raVjZcLRJV8h3ctvDuF8-NkPP24OGOrukl)
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=64b47569697a4ddf9ad3b127a1dcd158&_e=F0NcvuQj-DJ2lebZflFbohWvnHybodDjVUE1UiaDG4Wa2SACTwCWd8fvN7v3rAJkiGKxNhw6a44OpWrRR9S0zeOXiwDzTeTX43j4E2Bzb1NP3zFRocLOYWH8PfXHDhixPiml5U2YMAi4uIxW5hcqDfA4hy0qxbK6nuxJoI-TipoOitn1OI4wVIelwaErIf5Bvp27sBWZb-11NZdyNtQWstiqHnBWlV-QxPXFYPNyT03ftJ4YQpgsUjqRyfOKROMTHC2D1m2JyJXFQfvU6GaEgCxUI8mUtGtnKGl3Tk3GldlKzR76Y5MBfrj-mb0OpJfz)
---
AG Miyares traveled to Staunton to speak at the annual Virginia Farm Bureau County Presidents’ Conference. Drawing more than 100 county Farm Bureau leaders, participants and Farm Bureau representatives collaborated on how to best serve producer members from all parts of the Commonwealth. Afterwards, while driving through the Valley, AG Miyares had to stop at Wright’s for some amazing food!
---
| | [](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=64b47569697a4ddf9ad3b127a1dcd158&_e=F0NcvuQj-DJ2lebZflFbohWvnHybodDjVUE1UiaDG4Wa2SACTwCWd8fvN7v3rAJkiGKxNhw6a44OpWrRR9S0zeOXiwDzTeTX43j4E2Bzb1O1h_iU2SEnqf1ZqJTFuGyAlvUfFDNP-hdNjTEDf_UgU5hiZIBH0ZzxBl_OMi6BlYfap55IqGfHY_bxvifaHmMdteWBpzeOjoroTzgbCWbte1hooYti3J6U9ZXwbErKitdycrneZwz6yIoTCNBcAvxnt2vdZQX-5pHveIXO_vlGmJpwRLz4PJwRmdKC44WsqsILrDZJy9wYVp7MemFcfh1S)
---
| | **_Visiting the New River Valley_**
---
[](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=64b47569697a4ddf9ad3b127a1dcd158&_e=F0NcvuQj-DJ2lebZflFbohxhaxRss2t121vuizluy7X8kk_Nf7a3O6Cfytr2ortPP1-qq52hqVjK2zfTTT19IoHgayYgN-Y1EnSIlQTIxdZH1oxXGoDReV0QNszfRA-fIFDWKrynL_x0XTUEQwYCAzUhdlPYfHA2NWQAzi81UX_tX8dYld1fjRF8zWsz1V5XcWbzRcHAwvctCmjksiH35Wr8HVLOkDyW1lYs5lWa5dtaDwsDXvMoa_FUscQnDX8DN4KfYRcTqbXj3N_bZK57GrRAdt3drXRZZVwU6CeqD4Y%3D)
---
AG Miyares visited the newly recharted Pulaski County TRIAD which is committed to both protecting and enhancing the quality of life for Virginia’s elderly, including reducing crime targeting the elderly such as identity theft. AG Miyares was joined by New River Valley law enforcement to help educate the elderly about how we can all work together to protect our seniors.
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Until next time,Team Miyares
---

clean_body: | | | Welcome to the Miyares Roundup! Attorney General Miyares was hard at work this week fighting for Virginians. Supporting the End of CDC Mask Mandate This week, Attorney General Jason Miyares joined 22 other states in filing an amicus brief arguing against the CDC’s interstate travel mask mandate under the Biden Administration. AG Miyares views the CDC mask mandate on public transportation as a clear example of federal overreach and will continue to defend an American’s right to make their own autonomous decisions.To read the whole brief, click . Following AG Miyares’s visit to the recently vandalized Blue Ridge Pregnancy Center in Lynchburg, VA, the Daily Signal produced a great documentary sharing the story and implications of the attack. Featured in the , AG Miyares condemns the cowardly acts of vandalism against the very women they claim to be standing up for. AG Miyares traveled to Staunton to speak at the annual Virginia Farm Bureau County Presidents’ Conference. Drawing more than 100 county Farm Bureau leaders, participants and Farm Bureau representatives collaborated on how to best serve producer members from all parts of the Commonwealth. Afterwards, while driving through the Valley, AG Miyares had to stop at Wright’s for some amazing food! | | | | Visiting the New River Valley AG Miyares visited the newly recharted Pulaski County TRIAD which is committed to both protecting and enhancing the quality of life for Virginia’s elderly, including reducing crime targeting the elderly such as identity theft. AG Miyares was joined by New River Valley law enforcement to help educate the elderly about how we can all work together to protect our seniors. | | | | | Until next time,Team Miyares | | ---|--- | | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Miyares for Virginia | | PO Box 3193, Virginia Beach, VA 23454 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

That’s what these signs help us accomplish. **[We’re hoping to get even more signs up on lawns and on busy intersections across this district, but purchasing these signs isn't cheap. That’s what these signs help us accomplish. Thanks for your support amplifying our message, Max Steiner Combat Veteran and Democrat for Congress P.S.If you're like to pick up a yard sign yourself - or a batch for neighbors! - check out my website at . We have yard sign pickup locations throughout the North State. Just scroll down to the bottom of the page to find the location nearest you! * | Paid for by Max Steiner for Congress 2485 Notre Dame Blvd, Ste 370 #194 Chico, CA 95928 | | Sent via . name: Seth Dillon, Babylon Bee
subject: We didn't see this one coming
body:
We knew it was just a matter of time before another woke company canceled us... but we didn't see this one coming. A few weeks ago, we received an unexpected email from Front...
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWhY8gVhNq)
| | | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60598174:WhY8gVhNq:m:1:2532013465:17C8F7AE4F4DE9A2710C6613D0CD4878:r)
---
|
---
Fellow American,
We knew it was just a matter of time before another woke company canceled us... but we didn't see this one coming.
A few weeks ago, we received an unexpected email from Front, the company that manages all inbound and outbound email for the team here at the Babylon Bee, informing us that they had terminated our account, effective immediately.
Sure enough, moments later, we were unable to send or receive email.
For weeks afterwards, our team scrambled. We're a company spread across multiple cities, so email is essential to our operation. Needless to say, this one hurt. Front decided to drop the bomb on us in whatever way would disrupt us the most, and they succeeded.
But _why_ would they do such a thing?
By now, I'm sure you have a good guess.
It probably comes as no surprise that Front is run by a group of woke, left-wing tech elitists. Just like Twitter, Facebook, _The New York Times_ , Snopes, and the many other companies that have attacked us, they simply can't abide satire that dares to mock their left-wing orthodoxy.
So they orchestrated their attack to do the most damage they possibly could.
[**We 've been through attacks like this before, and we know that there are more coming -- which is why I'm reaching out to free speech-loving friends like you who value good satire, asking you to become a paid subscriber of the Babylon Bee today.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60598174:WhY8gVhNq:m:1:2532013465:17C8F7AE4F4DE9A2710C6613D0CD4878:r)
---
[**Become a Subscriber Today >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60598174:WhY8gVhNq:m:1:2532013465:17C8F7AE4F4DE9A2710C6613D0CD4878:r)
---
For years now, we've been building our support base in an effort to become "cancel-proof" -- so that radical companies like Front can't pull the rug out from under us like this.
We've come a long way, but as this episode proved, we're still vulnerable.
[**You can help with your subscription today**.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60598174:WhY8gVhNq:m:1:2532013465:17C8F7AE4F4DE9A2710C6613D0CD4878:r) And remember -- you won't just be standing with the Bee; you'll be standing up for free speech of all kinds online, and showing left-wing elitists that they can try to censor free thinkers like us, but the truth will always win out.
If you're familiar with the Babylon Bee, you know that we're no strangers to this sort of treatment. We've been canceled, censored, shadow-banned, locked out, and kicked off by more left-wing operations than I can count, for no other reason than that the woke just can't take a joke.
As a matter of fact, we've been locked out of our Twitter account for the past three months because we refuse to delete our satirical post honoring transgender Biden appointee Dr. Rachel Levine as our "Man of the Year."
But thanks to our network of subscribers, we can weather these storms better than ever before. Thanks to thousands of friends just like you who see the value of investing in free speech and good satire, we're still pushing forward.
[**But today, I'm asking you to join us. If you've been on the fence, now really is the time. Don't wait until our next cancellation. Please help us build resiliency today by becoming a subscriber.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60598174:WhY8gVhNq:m:1:2532013465:17C8F7AE4F4DE9A2710C6613D0CD4878:r)
Our goal is quite simple: to become the Obi Wan Kenobi of the digital world.
To paraphrase the great sage himself, with friends like you united behind us, the woke tech elites can't win. They can try to strike us down, but we will become more powerful than they could possibly imagine.
[**Join the rebellion today.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/60598174:WhY8gVhNq:m:1:2532013465:17C8F7AE4F4DE9A2710C6613D0CD4878:r)
---
Sincerely,
Seth Dillon CEO The Babylon Bee
---
| | |
---

The Babylon Bee, LLC
PO Box 546
Jupiter, FL 33468

subject: just a moment of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:

Republicans are spending more than $25 million trying to flip New Hampshire and take back the Senate. They know that winning here will flip the Senate, setting them up to pass the most radical elements of their agenda – including a nationwide abortion ban.
I know that we can keep this seat, and the Senate blue, but we all need to pull together. So if you can give even just $3, please do.

name: Amanda McTyre
subject: the worst part of my job
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
|
---

---
Hey team,

As the NDRC’s finance director, it’s my job to set budgets for each bucket of our work. But here’s the problem: If we don’t hit our fundraising goals, I have to tell certain teams that I just can’t give them what they need.

It’s the worst part of my job – especially when _everything_ the NDRC does is so important. Should I take money away from our work to defend and expand voting rights? To support Democratic candidates in must-win races? To help protect election administration and infrastructure? Those are the kinds of choices I might have to make if we don’t hit our monthly goal.

But you can help – it’s really easy. **Just send in a donation before tomorrow’s mid-month deadline and it’ll be immediately counted toward our August goal!** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: | Hey team, As the NDRC’s finance director, it’s my job to set budgets for each bucket of our work. But here’s the problem: If we don’t hit our fundraising goals, I have to tell certain teams that I just can’t give them what they need. It’s the worst part of my job – especially when everything the NDRC does is so important. Should I take money away from our work to defend and expand voting rights? To support Democratic candidates in must-win races? To help protect election administration and infrastructure? Those are the kinds of choices I might have to make if we don’t hit our monthly goal. But you can help – it’s really easy. Just send in a donation before tomorrow’s mid-month deadline and it’ll be immediately counted toward our August goal! | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = I can’t tell you how much I appreciate the support of this grassroots community, team. I track every donation and trust me, every donation matters. Thank you for everything you’re doing to defend our democracy. = Best, Amanda = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

1. Ken is a bold climate activist and has the endorsement of Vote Water!
2. Ken does not take any money from Big Sugar or the oil and gas industry, unlike his opponents.
3. As City of Miami Commissioner, Ken has worked to fight for affordable housing in one of America’s most unaffordable cities.
4. Ken has a proven track record of defending the LGBTQ community, and at a time of increased anti-queer hate, we need a bold ally in Congress.
5. Ken is fighting for bodily autonomy and reproductive justice.
6. Ken continues to hold a solid lead in the polls against Maria Salazar and is the best candidate to defeat her in November.
7. Once in Congress, Ken will fight vigorously for federal voting rights legislation.
8. Ken effectively enacted a $15 minimum wage in the City of Miami.
9. As City Commissioner, Ken passed a resolution defending DACA recipients and will continue to fight for a path to citizenship.

Hi there, Peter. This is Emily -- Eric's Finance Director. I was looking through our opponent’s finance reports, and a few names caught my eye that I thought might interest you. Here are a few of the GOP mega-donors funding Esther King's campaign:
* **Larry Anderson** \- a local businessman best-known for stealing nearly $20,000 from his own workers.
* **Dick Uihlein** \- He’s Illinois' biggest GOP donor. He helped bankroll Donald Trump's first presidential run.
* **Kevin McCarthy** \- McCarthy’s “Take Back The House 2022” PAC has dumped tens of thousands of dollars into King’s campaign account.

**When you follow the money, it's pretty easy to see why Esther King backs extreme policies like gutting Medicare and Social Security and raising taxes on the middle class. Meanwhile, our campaign is depending on lots of contributions from individual like you -- which is why I'm reaching out today:** [**Tomorrow at midnight marks the middle of our current fundraising quarter, and we need to bring in another $12,000 to stay on track and hit our goal. |

Derek, No matter how red the district, Virginia Democrats are stepping up to ensure that no Republican goes unchallenged. In every one of Virginia’s 11 congressional districts, a strong, thoughtful, qualified Democrat is running to keep Virginia on track. **[We need Virginians from every corner of the Commonwealth to chip in and help support our incredible slate of Democrats.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49231420/361330420/308851134?refcode=dpva-em-220814-everywhere&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MTQ4NDRjNy0wZTFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pCrvC_VPpLkWYYY6vkTrzLrGtu41yb8quBj3u-SMZtE=)** **VA-01: Herb Jones
VA-02: Congresswoman Elaine Luria
VA-03: Congressman Bobby Scott
VA-04: Congressman Don McEachin
VA-05: Josh Throneburg
VA-06: Jennifer Lewis
VA-07: Congresswoman Abigail Spanberger
VA-08: Congressman Don Beyer
VA-09: Taysha DeVaughan
VA-10: Congresswoman Jennifer Wexton
VA-11: Congressman Gerry Connolly** It doesn't matter what district you’re from, Virginia Democrats are fighting for you. name: Evan, =?utf-8?b?Q2hhcmxpZeKAmXM=?= Finance Director
subject: Is there anything I can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
|
---

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49231428/361330511/-1696682215?amount=25&refcode=20220814_f_3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYzJhZDgzMi0wZjFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=11SDRhjgCQ7j3ifvwvpzPu7-3bCu_fR9uLh_hAgiKDk=)
---
Team, it’s Evan — Charlie’s Finance Director.

Is there **_anything_** I can say to convince you that we need your support today?
• The GOP and right wing billionaires are pouring millions in cash into DeSantis’ re-election campaign.

• DeSantis is ramping up his attacks on our democracy, and he won’t stop unless we defeat him.

• Poll after poll after poll shows that this race is _neck-and-neck_!
---
Look, we don’t send these emails without good reason — we have to meet our FINAL fundraising goal of the primary election to win.

Would that convince you? Because we really need folks to support our campaign today.

body:
|
---
| | [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=c57ebb386e&e=8a657725d1)
---
| Peter, Open Border Porter just voted to block consideration of a bill expressing support for border patrol!

You read that right – Katie Porter is so far left that she can’t even bring herself to support the men and women who put their lives on the line to defend our country’s sovereignty.
---
| [DEFEAT KATIE PORTER](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=17caf74d00&e=8a657725d1 "DEFEAT KATIE PORTER")
---
| Regardless of politics, the men and women of the Border Patrol are our line of defense at the border and deserve to be recognized as the heroes they are.

Sadly, though, this is just the latest in a long line of pro-crime, anti-law and order actions taken by Katie Porter. As one of the leaders of the far-left Progressive Caucus, Open Border Porter has also been promoting Defund The Police policies that have made California and our whole country far less safe.

As Chairman of the Orange County Gang Reduction Intervention Partnership, on the other hand, I have been engaged in the fight for law and order for a long time. I know we must defeat Katie Porter and her progressive allies to secure the safety of our communities!

**That’s why I’m proud to be the Republican nominee taking on Katie Porter in this November’s midterm election. If you’re with me, will you please chip in [$10](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=49b4786c4e&e=8a657725d1), [$20](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=d1078690a2&e=8a657725d1) or [$30](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=d8bb611f1b&e=8a657725d1) to help us make our country safe again?**
---
| [DONATE FOR COMMUNITY SAFETY](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=fdc073998c&e=8a657725d1 "DONATE FOR COMMUNITY SAFETY")
---

---
| Thank you in advance,
Scott Baugh

Eddie’s the candidate that can win in November, but first, he needs to win his August 23rd primary. TV ads are critical to sharing his progressive message — we can’t go dark now!

body:
What would convince you to donate to my campaign today?
| | |
---
I've got to ask, friend: What would convince you to donate $5 to my campaign today?
I could tell you about the fact that Florida's last Senate race was decided by a narrow 0.12 points (just 10,033 votes), and ours is shaping up to be just as close.
Or that TWO brand-new polls this past week showed me TIED with Marco Rubio after months of trailing, which proves that we have the momentum we need to win.
Or that in the hours that followed, the GOP began spending _hundreds of thousands of dollars _to attack me with TV ads that smear my name and reputation.
Or that I rely entirely on grassroots donations from people like you to fight back against the GOP's attacks – but right now, we're on track to fall short of our crucial mid-month fundraising goal.
**Time is running out to close the gap before tomorrow's deadline, friend, so please:[Will you rush $5 or more now to help me reach my Mid Month fundraising goal, defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49222897/361300660/1672908452?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3964-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmFkN2Y1Yy1lZTFiLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=10EAoGXciSfn-V9xWc6cqVGORcuAdRwkZiE3hJK2jrc=)**
Thank you for chipping in what you can. It makes all the difference.

– Val Demings

Or that in the hours that followed, the GOP began spending hundreds of thousands of dollars to attack me with TV ads that smear my name and reputation. Or that I rely entirely on grassroots donations from people like you to fight back against the GOP's attacks – but right now, we're on track to fall short of our crucial mid-month fundraising goal. Time is running out to close the gap before tomorrow's deadline, friend, so please:= Thank you for chipping in what you can. It makes all the difference. – Val Demings | | Our grassroots campaign is off to a great start, but in a race as close as this one, I need your help to surge ahead and defend the Senate. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you’re critical to this grassroots campaign. To make sure you’re the first to get important updates, or text “JOIN” to 77076 to receive text updates. & . I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, donating to emails like this, to help me defeat Marco Rubio and stop Mitch McConnell from flipping the Senate. So, please consider =. You can also click here to or click here to . Val Demings for U.S. Senate P. O. Box 536926 Orlando, FL 32853 United States Paid for by Val Demings for U.S. Senate

name: John Fetterman
subject: I'm happy dancing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

Let me start by saying this. I’m not a millionaire.
I don’t have enough money to even *think* about self-funding our campaign for U.S. Senate.
And I certainly don’t have million$ to throw around like Dr. Oz + his super PACs.
When I say we’re a grassroots campaign funded by people like you, I mean it.
We don’t take a single dollar for granted. Each + every dollar we raise is used strategically to help reach + mobilize voters across the Commonwealth. In fact, a couple campaign staffers even get an automated email alert every single time someone donates.
(Yep, that means when you donate to this email, someone on the finance team will see it and do a little Happy Dance. 😂)
Believe me when I say your donation will not go unseen or unappreciated. In a tough race like this, every single dollar makes a huge difference. I really just couldn’t be more grateful for your support.
**[Want to inspire a Happy Dance today, friend? Split a donation of any amount between our campaign + Jacky Rosen's before our upcoming mid-month deadline. clean_body: | | | Friend, Let me start by saying this. I’m not a millionaire. I don’t have enough money to even think about self-funding our campaign for U.S. Senate. And I certainly don’t have million$ to throw around like Dr. Oz + his super PACs. When I say we’re a grassroots campaign funded by people like you, I mean it. We don’t take a single dollar for granted. Each + every dollar we raise is used strategically to help reach + mobilize voters across the Commonwealth. In fact, a couple campaign staffers even get an automated email alert every single time someone donates. (Yep, that means when you donate to this email, someone on the finance team will see it and do a little Happy Dance. 😂) Believe me when I say your donation will not go unseen or unappreciated. In a tough race like this, every single dollar makes a huge difference. I really just couldn’t be more grateful for your support. = | | = – John John Fetterman Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania P.S. Uh I wouldn’t say I’m the Happy Dancing type. But if I see your name come across our ActBlue tonight, maybe you’ll catch me doing this. 👇 = = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | ICYMI, lots of exciting things happened over the past week that we just had to share! First, Tanisha met Bill Galvin in two broadcast debates, delivering strong performances in each - showing voters substantive differences in their values, vision and priorities, and challenging Galvin on his record around voting reform, transparency of public records, community engagement, and even diversity of the Secretary of State’s office. At every turn, Galvin was on the defensive, and **Tanisha demonstrated her command of both the office and what this moment demands - notably, MORE!** Click here for a few notable moments on Twitter:
* [Qualifications](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49232036/361332522/529857593?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IzYzRjNC0xMzFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oceat4bUnSVhKzo1rF2xxl_g4ixcjlq1X26s4aXeKQ4=&emci=cf869e48-121c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b3b3c4c4-131c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8040336)
* [Diversity](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49232037/361332523/-680656112?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IzYzRjNC0xMzFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oceat4bUnSVhKzo1rF2xxl_g4ixcjlq1X26s4aXeKQ4=&emci=cf869e48-121c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b3b3c4c4-131c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8040336)
* [Abortion](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49232038/361332524/1966085193?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IzYzRjNC0xMzFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oceat4bUnSVhKzo1rF2xxl_g4ixcjlq1X26s4aXeKQ4=&emci=cf869e48-121c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b3b3c4c4-131c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8040336)

Second, Tanisha published an [opinion piece in Commonwealth Magazine ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49232039/361332525/-2059887312?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IzYzRjNC0xMzFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oceat4bUnSVhKzo1rF2xxl_g4ixcjlq1X26s4aXeKQ4=&emci=cf869e48-121c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b3b3c4c4-131c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8040336)about how she would use the Secretary of State’s office to protect and advance women’s reproductive rights in the aftermath of the Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v Wade. Bill Galvin is on the record as opposing abortion. Last, Tanisha received a very supportive [editorial in The Daily Item](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49232040/361332526/-568892118?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzMxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiM2IzYzRjNC0xMzFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oceat4bUnSVhKzo1rF2xxl_g4ixcjlq1X26s4aXeKQ4=&emci=cf869e48-121c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b3b3c4c4-131c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=8040336) of Lynn, where she was applauded for bringing fresh energy, focus and new ideas to an office that too few people know about. **With just 3 weeks to go until the Sept. 6 primary, you can expect to see even more of Tanisha in community talking with voters about the issues they care deeply about** \- expanding voter participation, particularly in our marginalized communities; advancing equity in tackling economic inequality; and protecting women from the onslaught of attacks on their privacy in the wake of the Dobbs decision. Please join our movement and help Tanisha beat Bill Galvin on Sept. 6! **We need your support... this moment demands more, together we’ll deliver more!**

clean_body: | | | = | | ICYMI, lots of exciting things happened over the past week that we just had to share! First, Tanisha met Bill Galvin in two broadcast debates, delivering strong performances in each - showing voters substantive differences in their values, vision and priorities, and challenging Galvin on his record around voting reform, transparency of public records, community engagement, and even diversity of the Secretary of State’s office. At every turn, Galvin was on the defensive, and Tanisha demonstrated her command of both the office and what this moment demands - notably, MORE! Click here for a few notable moments on Twitter: Second, Tanisha published an how she would use the Secretary of State’s office to protect and advance women’s reproductive rights in the aftermath of the Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v Wade. Bill Galvin is on the record as opposing abortion. Last, Tanisha received a very supportive of Lynn, where she was applauded for bringing fresh energy, focus and new ideas to an office that too few people know about. With just 3 weeks to go until the Sept. 6 primary, you can expect to see even more of Tanisha in community talking with voters about the issues they care deeply about \- expanding voter participation, particularly in our marginalized communities; advancing equity in tackling economic inequality; and protecting women from the onslaught of attacks on their privacy in the wake of the Dobbs decision. Please join our movement and help Tanisha beat Bill Galvin on Sept. 6! We need your support... this moment demands more, together we’ll deliver more!** = | | = \- by chipping in $11 you can help get us closer to our fundraising goal so we can reach more communities and help cover the cost of our yard signs and their distribution. Please email mailto:field@tanishasullivan.com for pick-up locations. With appreciation,Team Tanisha | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by the Committee to Elect Tanisha M. subject: JD Vance is unfit to represent us in the Senate

body:
We can flip Ohio blue in three months, but not without your help.
| We'll be brief, there:

We are officially **less than three months away** from the general election – and JD Vance and his big-money backers have made it clear that they're not planning on slowing down their spending any time soon.

Electing Tim Ryan will determine whether or not Ohioans will have someone willing to go to bat for them on Capitol Hill – or someone like Vance – **who has made it clear that he's willing to prioritize his billionaire backers, extremist politics, and MAGA Republicans over working people.**

Recent polls have shown Tim Ryan can win, but Mitch McConnell's super PAC allies are planning to spend almost $5 million to beat him. Vance hopes to coast all the way to the Senate with McConnell and Super PACs leading the way. We can't let that happen.

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: Freedom is worth fighting for
body:
**[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6868f143ffce4fe0867a7f9b88ce9b0c&_e=FLgmF22eiO8Q-QH526fbhNlbV881ORfn_QmRxEEhwxBODl8y6l4VDHkt3_x6AG9CZ5krWvQn-eX7yFoz9HAG38pYOGmnkfH6kPU4XOvmGoVO4d5qxGzO0Rw44DeaJRrdhU49tm8zkVXQWYVKtwVqLaNjbwjH1RHfEhDnbj82fnAA_XF476djlqjnfEPwcWN-HLd_5z9stgdP7wGgeO6pDww749jP0KiilTxuy1Teu8QfxsPFPcdIbj5y5syZDRrInAf7-TGs54Bor7clNCqRv20a_HKAVSkPoNy_7L3orfkk3LYgBHaCv2ClVBJ-0ks8wZC98w9Svg9z-O4BAWLUTneMZN4wm92FVH5GUbVtqiE7AlJErq9rDnoxapuy3Eu-gJLQQakvPNKRVO4wyfVn1g%3D%3D)**

Peter,
With the divisive nature of our national discourse these days, it's easy to drone on about who and what you're against. **_But it 's also important to say what you're for._**

In Florida, we have made the largest push anywhere in the country to get American civics back into our schools. We want to teach our children to understand the founding principles of our country, the Constitution, and the Bill of Rights.

We want to teach them about the important time periods in our history, the values that have been fought and bled for. **_We want to teach our kids what it means to be an American._**

As Florida's children grow up, they will accomplish many different things. The one common thread for all of them is they are going to be called upon to exercise the duties of being an American citizen - _and that means something._

As I look at the divisions in our society, I think if people had a better understanding of America's foundations, we wouldn't be as divided as a people.

**_So, in Florida, we are for the Constitution, we are for the founding principles of America, we are for teaching our children these things, and we 're proud of that._**

**_[If you stand with the free state of Florida and our Freedom Agenda, contribute any amount here to help us continue our mission for another four years.>>>](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6868f143ffce4fe0867a7f9b88ce9b0c&_e=FLgmF22eiO8Q-QH526fbhNlbV881ORfn_QmRxEEhwxBODl8y6l4VDHkt3_x6AG9CZ5krWvQn-eX7yFoz9HAG38pYOGmnkfH6kPU4XOvmGoVO4d5qxGzO0Rw44DeaJRrdhU49tm8zkVXQWYVKtwVqLaNjbwjH1RHfEhDnbj82fnAA_XF476djlqjnfEPwcWN-SQLcKvG6H7hVpyT5sf70-ongHjcOh1ppgPt6sOKbvSy2homhTOFRBAwgESYEOKJJ-Kh__TjR0QdRtlfhTwHNfD9M7AEvBKqYR9jFl3gDxkh7E2dhNMm5HoKVSTbBj-hDU6YVGzfEskt6IWZXu_xC9VrIatj79FeU1jJmIUdnKL_LZjNyN2jeWSVtkLmQuh3VW1jCfZlvQz3ib5OhUXsLKw%3D%3D "https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=6233fdbd32a24d375477b83e494461bda9aeb11cabfe8ccfd5ecf9b9e3faf5b3bd1007b6cbadaf221b94879ae3c37d7c20242b1b1d45f23f")_**

Together, we'll build up a generation ready to Keep Florida Free.
Sincerely,
Ron DeSantis

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6868f143ffce4fe0867a7f9b88ce9b0c&_e=FLgmF22eiO8Q-QH526fbhNlbV881ORfn_QmRxEEhwxBODl8y6l4VDHkt3_x6AG9CZ5krWvQn-eX7yFoz9HAG38pYOGmnkfH6kPU4XOvmGoVO4d5qxGzO0Rw44DeaJRrdhU49tm8zkVXQWYVKtwVqLaNjbwjH1RHfEhDnbj82fnAA_XF476djlqjnfEPwcWN-QTo92pwqPLayNVYJX_71Rllpq0ZgPH5LUnxeqT4oQ48twoFIXI2i6iF16NgyZPW808CtP5K4XhdlOwBDi9u0zfDcpH2nnSOINnEeucCw0qs0deTWK5d4H6oqxNPaQNsa9tdQheEFFYoChylLxA4HvcUmwxHztC-vm9g39QXIQNeaqak8SaJy_JF8Im75wPxDs5z7hN1SZXDmBGhuF5sl0A%3D%3D "RUSH IN A DONATION") [RUSH IN A DONATION](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=6868f143ffce4fe0867a7f9b88ce9b0c&_e=FLgmF22eiO8Q-QH526fbhNlbV881ORfn_QmRxEEhwxBODl8y6l4VDHkt3_x6AG9CZ5krWvQn-eX7yFoz9HAG38pYOGmnkfH6kPU4XOvmGoVO4d5qxGzO0Rw44DeaJRrdhU49tm8zkVXQWYVKtwVqLaNjbwjH1RHfEhDnbj82fnAA_XF476djlqjnfEPwcWN-YiSAYfZkqC1QY2jsJZn7NSV3ejBLdgsTARVzGd-TtRMASdmNgyL5RPjKp_pjkWF5ProPvm7O9XBCxj9iUcegqWjMfTFzeA_ENLVkRDCWA0Marz7y7W8wXdpnVuE4BFdnu54sYhfnqf7WihqNkHKBOBybD-kB00w-wMZ_qB_cYIeuXoOnh6BLqKDcT0l-rESGZETsRtjjt7O9_lT9_gVk5Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: Peter, With the divisive nature of our national discourse these days, it's easy to drone on about who and what you're against. But it 's also important to say what you're for. In Florida, we have made the largest push anywhere in the country to get American civics back into our schools. We want to teach our children to understand the founding principles of our country, the Constitution, and the Bill of Rights. We want to teach them about the important time periods in our history, the values that have been fought and bled for. We want to teach our kids what it means to be an American. As Florida's children grow up, they will accomplish many different things. The one common thread for all of them is they are going to be called upon to exercise the duties of being an American citizen - and that means something. As I look at the divisions in our society, I think if people had a better understanding of America's foundations, we wouldn't be as divided as a people. So, in Florida, we are for the Constitution, we are for the founding principles of America, we are for teaching our children these things, and we 're proud of that. "" Together, we'll build up a generation ready to Keep Florida Free. Sincerely, Ron DeSantis "RUSH IN A DONATION" Paid by Ron DeSantis, Republican, for Governor Ron DeSantis for Governor | 301 W. Platt Street, Suite 345, Tampa, FL 33606 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

| | | Derek, **__**_This is what you expect to see when you’re ahead in the polls, and when it’s clear you’re the only candidate who can win in November..._ To no surprise, my primary opponents have started to send attacks and barbs my way since they know our 603 Mission is the frontrunner. They’re using all their resources to go after **_us_** instead of **_Hassan!_** Let me make something clear - this isn’t going to bring us down. I grew up poor working multiple jobs until eventually owning a small business that spans over 13 acres and employs more than 50 Granite Staters - _I’m not going to let some political jabs slow me down now!_ **But at the same time, these baseless attacks can add up if we don’t have the resources to immediately respond and correct the record. name: Spencer DeMink
subject: Buddy’s hypocrisy now extends to law enforcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wade Herring for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0814 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0814]
Peter –
Early Sunday morning, Buddy Carter sent out an email best described as unhinged.
Titled ‘IMPEACH MERRICK GARLAND’, Buddy’s email points fingers at everyone under the sun, including U.S. Attorney General Merrick Garland and the Department of Justice, for what he claims was an abuse of authority when they lawfully obtained a search warrant and conducted a legal search of Trump’s property in Mar-a-Lago.
Here’s the truth: no one is above the rule of law.
Of course, Buddy uses his email as an opportunity for fear-mongering and alleges that government corruption is “coming for you, too.” He ends the email by calling for the impeachment of Garland.
Buddy’s hypocrisy is Exhibit A for what is wrong with Washington. He attacks law enforcement and tries to stoke fear and anger rather than use his time to do something productive for our District.
Lies have real-world consequences, as demonstrated by the attack on the FBI office in Cincinnati.
The hard-working families here in Georgia’s First deserve someone who works for them – not someone who parrots talking points from the likes of Marjorie Taylor Greene.
This is yet another example of the dangerous politics & self-interest we’re fighting against this November. If you’re just as ready to retire Buddy Carter as I am, please consider contributing to our campaign today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wade2022?refcode=whem0814]
Thank you,
Spencer DeMink
Communications Director | Wade Herring for Congress

subject: Demand answers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate**
body:
| | | [](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=ab886380ee304734aa51ec402f583c01&_e=vJ_aBqsOlpG3LIVX_8tPxXxTc33z19Qa7jc5zh2wiC_mLbhE7UQk8haUXylUIf_qWiCqaW2GMZuNCgI3od53krjU6f_BIkvPf4Bua0hmpeEtlPpSQqY2qxgORw6R7ZHd5i3muA3viG2fEop9CD93DZwec_E3_NVaofYSvzdRx-8cqfDu26bb_xj2LOfIYhoIs1iuHrtV8ae4npx2ZxOXjc0s9_Oyh3ygu5R3IK3pG_whn_J4WTHvBnMK9TEd67GJxAuUtiiaflsjF1r1uYm4BFlO9y5qU_XPW_s78htpLtT3J33dJU91ccYgTDJtEAKmGVKmIdX-odA3Kugylvf8qrCOQoK7WPHGjJOLXjYwepuRDHQrP59U2FUnFdVhgYvao_DpKNqlve9sRpaplqBbxUqslwGCOcfl3gw01sZe2bcFWGPUhGbs_OYigH06m9Rdvlxp7rAOkzxhUZCSDbmjKE24pIeG-maDp881LfsHTmXWr6HvsOXgE18oUWg0Bs08Im38J79CqJGHGwNYEnDFvNTYVW1KXSOj62hQbxmRrvE%3D)
---
Friend, The FBI raid of Donald Trump’s home is unprecedented. It is corrupt and an outrageous abuse of power-** and we need accountability from Biden’s DOJ immediately.** The Democrats have weaponized the FBI to target their political enemies. I am calling for action. Congress must demand answers. We need hearings; we need subpoenas, and we need answers from the Biden Administration right now. **The Democrats have crossed a line and have put our Democracy at risk.** We all need to STAND UP and __DEMAND ANSWERS__ RIGHT NOW! Democrats in Congress will try to ignore this, so we need _overwhelming _support. name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Beto’s not going to take it anymore—not from the gun lobby, not from the forced birth theocrats—so Dee Snider of Twisted Sister was glad to offer his support for Beto’s campaign to serve the citizens of Texas as their next governor.
body:
Twisted Sister for Beto!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter,** ** NPR may not get it, but rock stars get that Beto is, well...a rock star! In response to the motherf***er that made its way around the world, Dee Snider of the 80s heavy metal band Twisted Sister asked Beto's team if he could play the song live for a rally. Beto's campaign manager immediately said yes, and now Dee Snider is putting together an all-star band to sing "We're Not Gonna Take It," an anthem now for Beto as he takes on the cruel, corrupt, coup-supporting Greg Abbott. **I'll say it again. Imagine the morning after election day, Beto O'Rourke as Governor-Elect of Texas._With 59 percent of Texans saying the state is going in the wrong direction, and polling showing Beto within 5 points of Gov. Abbott, it could happen!_** Obviously, with similar results across the land the night before, but this rock star taking over a formerly conservative bastion, this rock star running the second biggest state in the country ... this will be a changed country at least on the path towards sanity and righteousness. [**So, again, can you dig deep to join us in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to a rock star about to become Governor of Texas?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta4833a43-17a5-4921-a2e9-69ef02fb098a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) THANK YOU! \---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action** <info@blueampaction.com>
Date: Fri, Aug 12, 2022 at 10:18 AM
Subject: Beto called someone laughing at kids’ dying from assault rifles a "Motherf***er." NPR's more upset about the swearing than the dead kids.
Peter, NPR just doesn’t get it. **By now I’m sure you’ve seen the viral video of Beto O'Rourke responding to a Greg-Abbott supporting heckler as he talked about the somber reality of our children murdered by assault rifles. NPR saw it, and they were outraged ... by Beto swearing.** **_[THANK BETO for saying what must be said, and doing what must be done. Please join us in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Beto O'Rourke. Because we can't afford 2023 where he is not Governor of Texas.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T17091a0a-a38d-4e58-8702-9a85dd93dca7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** **_If you're exhausted by Democrats too often refusing to hit back, comment or message aggressively against Republicans who lie, cheat, steal, coup, take away our rights and pocket our taxes, it's a reminder of why we need the next generation of fighters in the Democratic Party to take over, and oh my, is Beto O'Rourke one of those._** Beto was speaking about assault rifles, and how they were weapons made for the battlefield--which every sane human including the creator of the assault rifle has acknowledged--the damage they do to little bodies in schools as they were made to pierce helmets of opposing soldiers. In fetid, disrespectful, and honestly abominable right-wing fashion, as he was talking about children being murdered by assault rifles, he was heckled by a Greg Abbott supporter in the crowd who started laughing.** ** **_Laughing at kids dying via assault rifle. Think about that._** **Then Beto responded the way we all wish we had, not like some polished politician but a real human with real emotions:** **_" It may be funny to you motherf***er but it's not funny to me."_**
---
|

BETO O'ROURKE IS THE GOVERNOR-ELECT OF TEXAS. Try and imagine it for a second. What it will feel like._** **_[And then please join us in THANKING BETO for saying what must be said, and doing what must be done. Please join us in giving $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford to Beto O'Rourke. Because we can't afford 2023 where he is not Governor of Texas.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tea5493fb-7e85-452e-adbd-430136ab76d5/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_** Cliff

name: Jay Inslee
subject: A moment for hope
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
Our fight for bold climate action must continue.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/KaG2s3kYR~Mk/R2NUN2J0bVZNOTBKTEk1b0xCRHh2YUpOK3k2ODMrV05TZEdtS2M3dUlIelQ3cUxTYm4rR1hLYjl1YVpDK3JQU2tFY0xGN3JuYU8zcUFiY0xLTmNaSDFtSzlYV1dSb1Evd2E1OHlBTStrSTQ9S0/UW9vSjg3bTdVWVE5c0FRaGZVL3FtaVVaeTJWTFZxb0lqWGphZm9sYlE3WT0S1) Friend, Even as climate disasters continue to unfold around us, including a series of fires here in Eastern Washington, **the historic passage of the Inflation Reduction Act is a moment for hope.** For many, many, years countless Americans -- especially young people -- have fought heart and soul for action. And now we have made a huge step forward, thanks to them and thanks to you. Following the lead of many of the initiatives we've pushed forward in Washington state, this legislation will help transition our nation towards a clean energy economy while significantly reducing our carbon emissions. In addition to lowering energy costs and helping us meet our decarbonization goals, the Inflation Reduction Act will also lower healthcare and prescription drug costs. It will save lives and keep more hard-earned dollars' in American's pockets. In a whole lot of ways, the common-sense policies it puts forward mirror what we've long been building towards here in Washington state: a clean-energy economy, good paying jobs, and affordable health care for everyone. I am grateful for the leadership of my colleagues, Senators Patty Murray and Maria Cantwell, for heroically delivering this legislation for Washingtonians and every American. A few years back, I ran for president to put the climate crisis front and center on the national agenda. While the passage of the IRA closes one tremendous chapter in our long fight against the climate crisis, our work must continue. Up next, we desperately need more bold action on the state-level -- paired with aggressive executive action from President Biden. **This wouldn 't have been possible without the countless supporters and activists like you. Here in Washington State and across the U.S. we will continue to fight for our shared values.** Today is a moment for hope. Very truly yours, Jay | [CONTRIBUTE](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/8EW3hwLKy_cz/R2NUN2J0bVZNOTBKTEk1b0xCRHh2YUpOK3k2ODMrV05TZEdtS2M3dUlIelQ3cUxTYm4rR1hLYjl1YVpDK3JQU2tFY0xGN3JuYU8zcUFiY0xLTmNaSDFtSzlYV1dSb1Evd2E1OHlBTStrSTQ9S0/UW9vSjg3bTdVWVE5c0FRaGZVL3FtaVVaeTJWTFZxb0lqWGphZm9sYlE3WT0S1)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://jayinslee.com/unsubscribe?m=21050316&r=NjM1MTU5NDU3MzQ5S0&j=MjQyMDkwNDQwMgS2&l=11250994&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). Contributions or gifts to JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D) are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)

clean_body: Chuck Grassley was running ads so misleading that they’re being taken down If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. Hello, Facebook took down some of Chuck Grassley’s ads against us – but not before they were seen by tens of thousands of people and targeted over one million: This is what we’re up against. Chuck Grassley was running ads so misleading that they’re being taken down – but they were still running for over a week. Come on, Facebook! I’m facing millions of dollars ads full of lies and twisted disinformation. Chuck Grassley has already started smearing me on TV and even attacking my military record. I’m a hard target to attack, but with Senate control at stake, they’ll make up and say anything. In order to fight back, we need to raise another $400,000 before our critical mid-month deadline at midnight tomorrow, but right now we’re still $47,226 short with time running out. name: Josh Lafazan
subject: Five years ago: “Jews will not replace us”
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Lafazan for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49233018/361336976/1524799354?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjBjZjI2Mi0xYTFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8_IUR2xjskDijYcHl1nq3PxFlv4yTFlkWQ5d2_moJz0=&emci=b5f8a08d-471b-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=b20cf262-1a1c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=17773801)
---

| | I can still hear the chants, Peter. _"Jews will not replace us. Jews will not replace us."_ **I remember watching in horror, five years ago this weekend, as an angry, torch-waving mob of white supremacists, Neo-Nazis, and Klansmen marched through the University of Virginia campus in Charlottesville, unashamed of their bigotry and describing their hatred as "pride."** I thought about my Grandpa Boris, who fled the Nazis when they invaded his home town in Poland. I wondered how many times local antisemites had marched down the streets, waving torches, and stirring up violence. I wondered what disgusting garbage they chanted. I grew up listening to Grandpa Boris's stories and learning about the six million Jews slaughtered by the Nazis. "Never again," he'd tell me. I'd always nod, but I'd also tell myself that that sort of thing won't happen in America. _Everyone agrees that the Nazis were some of history's greatest villains. If they crawled out from under whatever rock they're under and showed up in our streets, everyone would condemn them._ The parade of hate in Charlottesville left dozens injured and one person murdered. But they weren't condemned by everyone. The President of the United States speculated that some of the marchers chanting "_Jews will not replace us_ ," were "very fine people." Since then, antisemitic violence and incidents have only increased across the country, including in New York. This rise in antisemitism threatens the Jewish community everywhere. **It's not an exaggeration to say we know what comes next, Peter. And it's not an exaggeration to say that there's no way in hell I'm going to let it happen.** My Grandpa Boris came to this country to get away from the dangerous cowardice like we saw in Charlottesville, to raise a family in the nation that _fought_ the Nazis. He worked hard, treated people fairly, took pride in his business, and was able to provide a comfortable life for his family, and ensure that we had the opportunities that he never did – especially to be free from antisemites proudly marching through the streets. I'm proud of my record of working with lots of different people to get results – even folks I disagree with. That's part of what makes good leadership. **But leadership also means drawing the line and confronting evil when we see it.** In Nassau County, I co-sponsored a bill that passed earlier this year to create a special county-wide task force to combat the rise of antisemitism in our community. Moreover, in 2021, I was proud to organize a Stand Up to Anti-Semitism rally on the front steps of the Legislature, joining with religious and civic leaders of all faiths to denounce hatred towards the Jewish people. Fighting against anti-Semitism is not just rhetoric; it has been central to my life's work and my professional career. The anniversary of the Charlottesville march is a reminder that we need to send people to Congress who bring more than just policy ideas. We also must demand our leaders have courage to stand up for the principles that attracted folks like my grandfather to this country. This campaign is rooted in those values. I'm proud to be in this movement with you, Peter, and honored to stand at your side. _Josh_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution disclaimer_text: Paid for by JD Vance for Senate Inc
body:
Will you let me know?

|
---
Hey,

It’s JD here following up -

I want to start by saying thank you. Your support of my campaign so far has meant the world to me. This campaign truly is about people like YOU who want the best for our nation and play an active role in making that happen.

[**Unfortunately, I have some tough news - we are not on track to reach our goals, which will put us in a VERY tough spot come November.**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=6b4eb70fe9a64c88ba66e08ca28abcce&_e=oYWAIJAf9F24ZhbA1rwqLF8m8BZVzm02qlEeg3aIJRAOUcXjRQgI5eT-J9zdzm6VAWg8E9ysT8Q1G4O2CwNSZPPZYlQbMVga73OytPGfhRmvCTzuMSbbs-BaKEsI2m308g1Gx-2alweqNbAD3lG0u7sakPdMoOxvgsDYsC4_rKcNGw7Rv0yjrmJZqEmiW9_M7wK6VD7G20iYbHF4-4rp6_pIT2dpoh5hGz1eujDb6di8aXYo4Tm9nLeRYN-oM4Ro1-UizjWcwaF1tKUPXHHh9Kzj3qW6x0AhEXbpvGjamLVclIVj1zTazFt_1yJhaTrjFrV6M8RA9VtI_oGGpyEmrRZdh7h7ma-LzSKGDz0uZdhbNZ2tg542TJp7S3_KkzQVJK1J1zOcYmxJXrnUkrYhpVkl3kPvbW8iCqZ_Gj9-5uq1qGK5vKwlkQL6LA9LT-So_X1wob8obba324IniOP9jx84FdwNBClpPXVWooqNSF7YTVO9HDN4x9mPVBrJyKSrWdWbvi3holP8mk6l-eph1A%3D%3D)

Sadly, this is all a part of the Radical Socialist’s master plan. They are ramping up their spending ALL across the nation to attack conservatives. **The worst part? It’s working.** [**WE HAVE TO FIGHT BACK.**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=6b4eb70fe9a64c88ba66e08ca28abcce&_e=oYWAIJAf9F24ZhbA1rwqLF8m8BZVzm02qlEeg3aIJRAOUcXjRQgI5eT-J9zdzm6VAWg8E9ysT8Q1G4O2CwNSZPPZYlQbMVga73OytPGfhRmvCTzuMSbbs-BaKEsI2m308g1Gx-2alweqNbAD3lG0u7sakPdMoOxvgsDYsC4_rKcNGw7Rv0yjrmJZqEmiW9_M7wK6VD7G20iYbHF4-4rp6_pIT2dpoh5hGz1eujDb6di8aXYo4Tm9nLeRYN-oM4Ro1-UizjWcwaF1tKUPXHHh9Kzj3qW6x0AhEXbpvGjamLVclIVj1zTazFt_1yJhaTrjA0X-lVPtJSn9auVhNyetBe5FvdZBcMq7pQo_uE5Q_t_foSCGfla2mmXz8ixRR5oF5lGLSuBZelc8AvAPYamgojNdpJDWdDj4sd2hejncXqgjTXxruX9f-LT2RFHG3qiYDl-EcNID5dhj8QDjFvXiLcLxJw97oMYkp0KnQ7BpOr9f0_vqqV1rTRcxWDpflZzo3S16GF591LnvPNbAgBENKA%3D%3D)

We need to start gaining more momentum if we want any chance of saving Ohio and America from their destructive agenda. We can’t win this election without your help.

_It is time we start FIGHTING back so we can Take Back the House in November. Time is of the essence. Are you able to rush a donation at this secure link?_ [**_JDVANCE.WINRED.COM_**](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=6b4eb70fe9a64c88ba66e08ca28abcce&_e=oYWAIJAf9F24ZhbA1rwqLF8m8BZVzm02qlEeg3aIJRAOUcXjRQgI5eT-J9zdzm6VAWg8E9ysT8Q1G4O2CwNSZPPZYlQbMVga73OytPGfhRmvCTzuMSbbs-BaKEsI2m308g1Gx-2alweqNbAD3lG0u7sakPdMoOxvgsDYsC4_rKcNGw7Rv0yjrmJZqEmiW9_M7wK6VD7G20iYbHF4-4rp6_pIT2dpoh5hGz1eujDb6di8aXYo4Tm9nLeRYN-oM4Ro1-UizjWcwaF1tKUPXHHh9Kzj3qW6x0AhEXbpvGjamLVclIVj1zTazFt_1yJhaTrjwqeYNz4P3ZzE7KUunHG5SNuy1qPT38WhJc-Ya6pjwVLQPbL0H3SV7S9mHv-1AJrnwSqn9MJi1O5BTQW_HjXKpWq5R-ebjvH5A5FiqvhyPRBqSIlwFccljT2R--Vs6n-9DQzTK2Dbr4eR8VEUl2r6GHdAJOnZfazHOuDF0o44KZi1BvRbDu7dMudAxSZXP4eHHsO1hlbCkhqAI2gFDaF-Wg%3D%3D)

\- JD Vance

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing the curtains on my campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zinke for Congress
body:
I’m at my wits’ end, Friend. Pelosi and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. At this point, if I don’t do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I have to possibly SHUT DOWN my campaign, **_but Republicans may never win another race this year._** **Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump’s Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.** **I’m also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.** If Pelosi can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance. **I have Trump’s endorsement, I lead the team of Navy SEAL’s running for Congress, and I have more battle experience than anyone else.** [](http://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c18170eef3cb42958a5ada061e1e199d&_e=K0ARKc12tYeSnNW6EBY3Me5FjSc0A3Vlp8IeD3eZmaNR63Z33uX1Hrpr3msmc_qxESteg7Wi-_UELEWh2FHwWLsA7oTm7WxdBjB6SnUeRPJUynkUh3p3EBHj5r4qLtadLLe_aT4EM12f0Ch2xGg947nwZcBljlboxiuaacJxB0AiNflUSfdGM6zGYUz2DKqEHEZqzHFP6eVRPNyvpFMTS5nBO0wtHvTLTqOOuZVt4YHvBzF6TGXCTBtlLWsIdawOeBSGZsMMVZzNmdpMg1mb-9ndwxHPV_hlyULES63SFz4uFu83T6lupVH6t2-2Yutpolt9OxF1zU2KLGWlmFYIhnmDjmj8opk2rNWusTShJk8uOP1ffDREOql1xHmMo98uVAqvl2GgYEOa44hyn9peg9jW8tvYmoTGKHKMerLCdJc%3D) The point is, Friend, I’m the toughest Republican running for office. If I can’t beat Pelosi - no one can. So, I’m going to be blunt with you. name: Welch for Vermont
subject: Our mid-month deadline
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
You’re our best chance at getting Peter elected and protecting our Democratic majorities in Congress.

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=798%2E61531%2ERtATP4)
Team,
It’s the weekend, so we won’t take too much of your time—but with our mid-month fundraising deadline tomorrow, [**we’re hoping you’ll rush a $5 donation to support Peter’s Senate race right away:**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3843?t=3&akid=798%2E61531%2ERtATP4)
_If you’ve saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_

---
| [$3](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3843?t=15&amount=3&akid=798%2E61531%2ERtATP4)
---
| [$15](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3843?t=17&amount=15&akid=798%2E61531%2ERtATP4)

---

---
These deadlines are important checkpoints for our campaign. We’re fresh off winning our primary this week and we’re looking to build on this momentum. Meeting and exceeding our goals is how we organize a grassroots coalition big enough to win a statewide election like this one.
If we fall short, we have less resources to share Peter’s message with the voters that need to hear it. Peter’s opponent is riding high off an upset victory of his own, and that’s momentum we’ll be fighting against until November.
With our progressive agenda on the line, we’re counting on this movement to make a massive impact on this race over the coming weeks. Simply put, you’re our best chance at getting Peter elected and protecting our Democratic majorities in Congress.
[**Our mid-month deadline is tomorrow and time is of the essence if we’re going to stop Mitch McConnell from taking this Senate seat. Rush a $5 contribution or anything you can spare today.**](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/3843?t=7&akid=798%2E61531%2ERtATP4)
Thanks so much!
Welch for Vermont

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49233428/361338982/-1540418300?refcode=jtk1449-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmFkZTMyYS0xZDFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NTd-86L8WfKFTEPeCZ-3aXLzUW-WumwzygEo-VwEkpY=)

**Peter, New Mexico needs to hear from us directly.**
After national Republicans and our GOP opponent blanketed the airwaves to smear Gov. Lujan Grisham's reputation, we are fighting back! From reproductive rights to public education, the stakes are too high in this election and we can’t afford to miss any opportunity to reach voters. That's why we've launched new ads of our own detailing Gov. Lujan Grisham's unwavering commitment to New Mexicans and the progress we are making for our state.
Voters will also see the stark contrast between her and her GOP opponent who is not only trying to push hateful policies like banning abortion, but is also refusing to denounce white supremacist groups that have been charged with sedition and terrorism. Worse, the GOP is pouring hundreds of thousands into her extremist opponent's campaign because they want to deceive New Mexico voters and flip our state red.
**In a race as important as this, every single vote makes an impact. And every single dollar does, too. It’s the difference between allowing the GOP to blanket the airwaves with unanswered attacks – or fighting back and sending a powerful message: that New Mexicans want a governor who delivers for them.**
**That's why our team set a goal to raise $25,000 – but we're still falling short, and time is running out. We need your urgent help now more than ever. ****[Please, Peter, will you donate $5 right now to help us reach our goal, counter GOP attacks, and keep New Mexico blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49233429/361338983/-1540418300?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk1449-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzc2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMmFkZTMyYS0xZDFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NTd-86L8WfKFTEPeCZ-3aXLzUW-WumwzygEo-VwEkpY=)**
Thank you for helping us get Gov. Lujan Grisham's message out, loud and clear.

Zack, political director
