name: Greg Stanton's iPhone
subject: Friend: We could lose this race if we don’t pick up the pace.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stanton for Congress
body:
My right-wing opponent is going to have the full support of dark money groups, so I'm counting on this team to support our people-powered campaign.
Friend,

I'll be blunt: We could lose this race if we don't pick up the pace. MAGA Republicans in Arizona rigged the maps to make 2022 my most competitive election ever, so it's going to take a lot of resources to get us to a win on Election Day.

Yesterday, my team reached out about our Voter Education Fund. Let me be clear: We must meet this fundraising goal so that we have the resources we need to run TV and digital ads, knock doors, and share our message with the community. My right-wing opponent will have the full support of dark money groups, so I'm counting on this team to support our people-powered campaign.

Will you use this custom link so I know you made a contribution? [**actblue.com/donate/gs-q322?refcode=VoterEd**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kE8b6Z8p7w-LAFdQ3HXKatdv-xbRRlMIi3ULSg9gYbw=/u14iQytVpn4aqEfcAWT8YwDouyxGKa5eBv371MbcGtc=?amount=5&refcode=em_fr_2022.08.14_b2_gsi_all)

Thank you,

Greg

_Sent from my iPhone_

| To learn more about Greg Stanton's work, visit [**StantonForArizona.com**](https://act.myngp.com/el/kE8b6Z8p7w-LAFdQ3HXKatdv-xbRRlMIi3ULSg9gYbw=/39DdYNxpxqwdbhtu_mwFPNf534oNosthN_uO_wT_KjI=) | Paid for by Stanton for Congress
---
Stanton for Congress
4340 E Indian School Rd.
Suite 21-518
Phoenix AZ 85018 United States

name: Team Booker
subject: Before midnight tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter, we’ll keep
this short:

We need to raise 1,500 contributions by tomorrow night in order to stay on
target for our monthly fundraising goals. So far this month we’ve raised
1,265 contributions through emails like this one.

This movement is about building a better, brighter future for everyone in
our commonwealth. One where we all have the same quality health care as
our politicians. Where we have more money in our pocket, and breathe clean
air and drink clean water.

To make that dream a reality, we need real leaders in the U.S. Senate, not
clowns like Rand Paul. Charles has lived the struggle other politicians
just talk about, so he understands what it will take to meet the magnitude
of the crises affecting working people in our commonwealth every day.

But we’re up against so much. Rand Paul and his rich friends are going to
throw everything they have at protecting his seat. In order to fund our
organizing work and build the programs we need to win this November, we’re
counting on donations from emails like this.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220814.jbIo87&refcode=em20220814-2357&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=2357%2E346206%2ES43Njw ]Will you be one of the 235 people we need to make a contribution today
to get us to our mid-month goal before midnight on Monday? Any amount,
even $1, will go a long way in showing we have the grassroots movement
necessary to take on Rand Paul.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220814.jbIo87&refcode=em20220814-2357&t=1021&akid=2357%2E346206%2ES43Njw ]Contribute $5

We can build a world where we don’t have to decide between putting food on
the table and affording our insulin. Where we can do deeper work to heal
and actually speak to the changes we need. But we can only do it together.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18293?c0=20220814.jbIo87&refcode=em20220814-2357&t=1022&akid=2357%2E346206%2ES43Njw ]If you can afford it, please make a contribution now to get us to our
1,500 contribution goal and ensure we have the resources to build a
campaign to take back Kentucky’s seat at the table.

Thank you,

Team Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20220814-2357-footer&t=1023&refcode2=2357_346206_S43Njw&akid=2357%2E346206%2ES43Njw

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=2357%2E346206%2ES43Njw

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001EQdzBmvQEdeWAJ1hWaFjh0Wu0njPmyEHjxZuA1CFLR52-krRewwYW_UetL-iVHBy9QH7sbDtrRW95Z0Ra2_5tGxrS0Ccjbabg31PPh5z0qaEEcwBHSyC0PtrIegWNkNQlx2CXXXawxVwT4sPox9UOmEi10NcF45zsQKK3ejEbAMQJh1yWDpV63huoomDJKXAHtit6eavLtiyQ9z7iB5pYA==&c=KNTU4N8VFeG-UpBfyQtcc5BgDlj1YYkU3Q7hFXn_fwgwZDoWq58yag==&ch=B5adFpVDrNreJzXvl_nM2lWFMzyPgmLaRfwlTZIbAw-WU_LsUx10Lg==)
---
| Joe Biden's America: Where the bureaucracies are militarized, while grandmothers have to fend for themselves on dangerous streets because the Defund the Police movement empowered thugs and criminals...
Peter, that's seriously what we're seeing happen right now.
The addled and compromised man in the White House just worked with his fellow Socialists in Washington to funnel $80 billion to the IRS...
And that was AFTER this Swamp bureaucracy snatched up over $700,000 of YOUR tax dollars for ammunition earlier this year! Get this - the IRS has seriously hoarded over $20 MILLION on guns and ammo since 2006!
Do you see what's happening here?
They are literally militarizing the government against you.
Swamp Democrats are making sure they squeeze every penny they can out of you in order to fund the reshaping of your country - even if they need to give the IRS their own private arsenal to do so.

name: Cecile Richards
subject: Let's turn this fury into action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH |
body:
I won't lie to you: I’m furious.
| | |
---
Hi there –

Since the overturning of _Roe v. Wade,_ millions have felt the devastation of having their bodily autonomy stripped away.

**I won't lie to you: I’m furious.** It is disheartening and can make one feel helpless – but we can't sit back and let the GOP continue to dismantle our rights. We've got to turn our fury into action. _Now_.

**How can we do that right now?****[With a donation of $3 to Maggie Hassan's critical reelection campaign in New Hampshire. Maggie has fought tirelessly for reproductive rights, and even just a few dollars to this race will go the furthest in securing our Senate majority and restoring the freedoms we deserve.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49234380/361343061/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1419-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTkwYWY0Mi0yNjFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dw_UnMQVJYg6B66vnnIqNVI2gDinF-GGoiVScrUH68s=)**
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49234381/361343062/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1419-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTkwYWY0Mi0yNjFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dw_UnMQVJYg6B66vnnIqNVI2gDinF-GGoiVScrUH68s=)
---
And it's so important to act right now. Mitch McConnell and the GOP are spending more than $25 MILLION in attack ads against her, hoping to snatch back this seat and Senate control.

But Maggie isn't going to back down from a tough fight, especially when women's rights and reproductive freedoms hang in the balance.

If reelected, Maggie will work tirelessly to combat the national abortion ban the GOP is threatening to enact. But she needs the help of this people-powered movement to get there.

**[So please, will you donate $3 to this campaign right now so we can continue to restore and defend our freedoms with pro-choice leaders in a Democratic-led Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49234382/361343063/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&amount=3&refcode=mh-jtk1419-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTkwYWY0Mi0yNjFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dw_UnMQVJYg6B66vnnIqNVI2gDinF-GGoiVScrUH68s=) **
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49234383/361343064/-947982778?amounts=3,10,25,50,100&refcode=mh-jtk1419-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTkwYWY0Mi0yNjFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dw_UnMQVJYg6B66vnnIqNVI2gDinF-GGoiVScrUH68s=)
---

clean_body: I won't lie to you: I’m furious. | | | Hi there – Since the overturning of Roe v. Wade, millions have felt the devastation of having their bodily autonomy stripped away. I won't lie to you: I’m furious. It is disheartening and can make one feel helpless – but we can't sit back and let the GOP continue to dismantle our rights. We've got to turn our fury into action. Now. How can we do that right now?= | | = And it's so important to act right now. Mitch McConnell and the GOP are spending more than $25 MILLION in attack ads against her, hoping to snatch back this seat and Senate control. But Maggie isn't going to back down from a tough fight, especially when women's rights and reproductive freedoms hang in the balance. If reelected, Maggie will work tirelessly to combat the national abortion ban the GOP is threatening to enact. But she needs the help of this people-powered movement to get there. = | | = There is no room for error, and we have to band together to make a difference today. Thank you for joining me. Cecile Richards = | If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = If you’re reading this from your phone, to automatically sign up for our SMS list. name: news@markwarnerva.com
subject: POLITICO: behind-the-scenes of the Inflation Reduction Act deal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mark played a crucial role in making sure this bill passed.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49234402/361343170/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTM4ZjU0ZC0yNzFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ha4BxKs5n2bknBFk2IaSnMuJlUrr4hlc_aQERY7t57c=&emci=bbbea72c-731a-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1a38f54d-271c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, the Inflation Reduction Act is going to slash the deficit, make the largest investment in fighting climate change in our history, and lower the cost of prescription drugs. It’s a huge win – and Mark is proud to have played a role in successfully negotiating a deal. **Did you see **[_POLITICO’s recap_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49234403/361343171/-71594090?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTM4ZjU0ZC0yNzFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ha4BxKs5n2bknBFk2IaSnMuJlUrr4hlc_aQERY7t57c=&emci=bbbea72c-731a-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=1a38f54d-271c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=4568237) **of the behind-the-scenes negotiations that led to this huge victory? A short excerpt:** “As Manchin and Sinema held their own conversations, they were helped along by Hickenlooper and Sen. Mark Warner (D-Va.). While Warner tried to come to a compromise on carried interest with Sinema, Hickenlooper suggested a stock buyback excise tax to compensate for Sinema’s requested changes on the corporate minimum tax. “There’s kind of been a trust-building relationship going on,” Warner said. “It became clear that some of the changes that Sen. Sinema wanted were creating some holes.” On Aug. 4, Warner joined Manchin on his house boat to talk about the deal Sinema would soon announce on taxes. After getting soaked in a rainstorm, Warner left with a new outfit — wearing a pair of Manchin’s shorts and a T-shirt — and a hope that Manchin, Sinema and Schumer would see eye-to-eye. (On Saturday Manchin returned Warner’s suit, fully pressed.)” ****[_Let’s make sure Mark and his colleagues can continue fighting for us in the Senate — because wins like this won’t be possible if Republicans regain the majority. Chip in $5 today._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49234404/361343172/861621708?refcode=mw_em_220814_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTM4ZjU0ZC0yNzFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ha4BxKs5n2bknBFk2IaSnMuJlUrr4hlc_aQERY7t57c=)**** Thank you, Team Warner ** ** ****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49234405/361343173/861621708?refcode=mw_em_220814_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTM4ZjU0ZC0yNzFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ha4BxKs5n2bknBFk2IaSnMuJlUrr4hlc_aQERY7t57c=)****

body:

| | |
# **[Tell Merrick Garland: "We'll Support You if You Prosecute Trump" >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf0de82e5-df9d-49af-b75a-4dc91f3c6944/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**

---
| | | The January 6th Committee’s televised hearings are proving that Trump actively tried to overthrow the 2020 election and prevent the peaceful transfer of power, inciting an insurrection and violent attack on the U.S. Capitol. And the FBI search is apparently turning up even more evidence of crimes. [**Tell Merrick Garland that you support prosecuting Trump, and that America will be behind him if he does.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22afb596-d2c3-4c50-8278-53f5be25979a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Merrick Garland was right to approve the FBI search of Mar-a-lago, and if he prosecutes Trump, **we need to let Garland know he'll have America's support, regardless of GOP complaints.** [**Sign the petition to tell AG Merrick Garland: "We'll support you prosecuting Trump!"** ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc42f0740-d52c-432c-b52e-2b529df8b9e2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Elect Nikki Fried
subject: Priceless.
disclaimer_text: paid for and approved by Nikki Fried, Democrat, for Governor
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-aug-2022?refcode=814deadline2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nf-email-aug-2022?refcode=814deadline2]

name: Wes Moore
subject: A governor for all Marylanders
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49230569/361323588/-543362158?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220814unite_wm_odpf60ds_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMThlOGRkNC0wNzFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iSrbH4mxUzVgEChSTklokY4zXaXxIAyxALuGvjYSKdg=)
---
Team, It’s undeniable that there’s a lot of political division in our country right now, and a lot to be concerned about in this moment. But I know if we come together, regardless of party or background, we have a lot to be hopeful about. While my opponent is focusing his time and energy on loyally defending Donald Trump, disparaging the nation’s top law enforcement agency, and even threatening to use our state’s police and military against sitting President Biden, _I’m focused on how to bring Marylanders together and lift each other up._ **We’re not just going out and asking Democrats to vote for us. We’re going out to every part of the state and asking all Marylanders to join our movement.** When I led soldiers in combat in Afghanistan, one question I never once asked my soldiers was, “What’s your political party?” _It didn’t matter._ We had one job, one goal, one mission. And the same goes for this election. We must unite as Marylanders to win not just this November’s election, but this critical moment in our state and nation’s history. In the military and throughout my career in public service, I have always led by bringing people together. **I will be a governor for all Marylanders, not one who seeks to divide and tear people apart.** **[So I’m asking you today: if you want a Maryland that leaves no one behind, please support our movement by pitching in $10 or more now. The more resources we build, the more Marylanders we can reach and welcome into this people-powered campaign before Election Day.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49230570/361323589/-543362158?refcode=fl_email_fr_20220814unite_wm_odpf60ds_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMThlOGRkNC0wNzFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iSrbH4mxUzVgEChSTklokY4zXaXxIAyxALuGvjYSKdg=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

body:

name: Joy Hofmeister
subject: Stitt is letting these families down
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JOY HOFMEISTER 2022 Friends of Joy Hofmeister 2022
body:
---
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49230744/361324219/1127668677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzUwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YjNiOTFiZi0wOTFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=v8PAGnQSuks4fIAYUO6unfHijRXmsINtBEIkBNxxcJ8=&emci=457759da-7f1a-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=9b3b91bf-091c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=13997030)
---
Peter,

Usually when I speak with people on the campaign trail, I hear about their hopes and dreams and what we can get done for Oklahoma.

But recently I met with families who are deeply worried about their futures -- and facing the terrible prospect of losing their homes and way of life. These families live in the path of Governor Stitt’s planned $5 billion turnpike extension.

The extension between Norman and Oklahoma City would wipe out more than 600 homes and is being rushed despite promises that the process would be transparent. If this can happen to these landowners, it can happen anywhere in the state. That’s why I support eminent domain reform to give Oklahomans more recourse when the government seeks to seize private property.

There are also questions about whether we should really be asking Oklahomans -- who are facing high gas prices -- to pay even more tolls while driving. Oklahoma already has over 600 miles of toll roads, which is more than almost any other state.

But what matters most to me are the families who are anxiously working to find a solution, and praying they won't lose the homes where they've raised their kids, built friendships, and created so many memories.

The hardest part of these conversations is knowing that Stitt could help, but he isn't stepping up. It's another example of him completely ignoring the people, and instead favoring the banks and businesses who stand to make money on the project over the community it will tear apart. At the very least, Stitt could do what I did, and meet with the landowners. No real leader should sit by and do nothing while hundreds of families have their homes ripped away.

We need a governor who works for everyone – not just the powerful and well-connected. This is what we're working to change in Oklahoma, and I know we can do it together.

Thanks,

Joy

clean_body: We’ve fallen behind, Peter. Without your help, we could lose this race. We've fallen behind, Peter. Without your help, we could lose this race. | Peter - After a $25 million barrage of misleading attack ads, we're now trailing our far-Left opponent, Senator Raphael Warnock. This Georgia Senate race doesn't just matter to Georgians. It will determine who controls the Senate majority and whether our country continues down the Democrats' destructive path. That's why I need your help, Peter. Our campaign has a clear pathway to victory, but we haven't had the money to respond to the onslaught of false attack ads from our opponent and Chuck Schumer's Super PAC. We're counting on the support of just 150 conservatives to help us get our ads on the air, set the record straight, inform the voters of Senator Warnock's disastrous record, and build the momentum we need to get back on top. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._

“Sunday work makes me a cranky senator” Liberal Lisa Murkowski

Friend,

Since 2001 the Senate has been called to work almost two dozen Sundays.

There have been over A THOUSAND Sundays over the past 21 years, and Lazy Lisa Murkowski is complaining about working 2% of the Sundays!

She's such a career politician!

Right now some families are working multiple jobs, trying to make ends meet. And instead of working ONE Sunday to potentially help reduce inflation, gas prices, or the cost of living, Lazy Lisa Murkowski is complaining that it makes her cranky.

I will promise you one thing: I will never complain about working on Sunday to make sure YOU are taken care of. As your next Senator, it is my duty to work for YOU, not complain about serving the people I'm supposed to represent.
If we want to make sure Lazy Lisa Murkowski begins retirement and never works on Sunday again, I’ll need your help, Friend.

clean_body: | | | | —------ | “Sunday work makes me a cranky senator” Liberal Lisa Murkowski Friend, Since 2001 the Senate has been called to work almost two dozen Sundays. There have been over A THOUSAND Sundays over the past 21 years, and Lazy Lisa Murkowski is complaining about working 2% of the Sundays! She's such a career politician! Right now some families are working multiple jobs, trying to make ends meet. And instead of working ONE Sunday to potentially help reduce inflation, gas prices, or the cost of living, Lazy Lisa Murkowski is complaining that it makes her cranky. I will promise you one thing: I will never complain about working on Sunday to make sure YOU are taken care of. As your next Senator, it is my duty to work for YOU, not complain about serving the people I'm supposed to represent. If we want to make sure Lazy Lisa Murkowski begins retirement and never works on Sunday again, I’ll need your help, Friend. | It’s time we elect a Senator that is going to work for you, not an elitist who complains! Let's hold Lazy Lisa Murkowski accountable. Thank you, Kelly Tshibaka | STAY UP TO DATE WITH KELLY AND THE CAMPAIGN BY CLICKING THIS LINK: "ckq.io/yl3xzs" | | | | ==

name: Kelly Burton | NDRC
subject: The three major pillars of our strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President
body:
The stakes of this year's midterm elections are the highest they've ever been in our lifetimes.
|
---

---
Friend, The stakes of this year's midterm elections are the highest they've ever been in our lifetimes. So with Election Day getting closer and closer, I wanted to send a note about our strategy to protect democracy — in addition to explaining why support from our donors will be critical to executing on our plans. **_[(But if you already know why your support is so important, you can click here to pitch in and help us keep up our work.)](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49231107/361327782/-1430081722?amount=20&refcode=20220814.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0MGQ2MWI0LTBiMWMtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5A-C3xI63a_LsWzvaNC9y-ouaRXCXC2rCRQ-Tn6rHbU=)_** There are three major pillars to our strategy this year:
1. **Elect pro-democracy candidates to key offices up and down the ballot.** We're targeting races in battleground states across the country that will be critical to the future of our democracy, and so far we've endorsed 14 outstanding candidates who are committed to doing everything in their power to preserve free and fair elections.

2. **Protect voting rights and expand access to the ballot.** With many GOP state legislatures continuing their crackdown on voting rights, it's as important as ever to make sure every eligible voter can make their voice heard. That's why we and our affiliates are fighting legal strategies from map manipulators and election deniers that could affect the future of fair maps, voting rights, and democracy itself.

3. **Defend the integrity of our election infrastructure.** This means ensuring our elections are properly and smoothly administered, and that election deniers are not successful in their efforts to corrupt the pool of election workers and infiltrate election administration from the inside. We already see movements like Stop the Steal organizing and we need to be ready to fight back.

But all of this work takes resources, friend, and that's where supporters like you come in. We're counting on your help to meet our fundraising targets so we can keep up this critically important work, and right now we're coming up on a big mid-month deadline. | **[PITCH IN TO HELP THE NDRC PROTECT OUR DEMOCRACY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/49231108/361327783/-1430081722?amount=20&refcode=20220814.2r_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0MGQ2MWI0LTBiMWMtZWQxMS1iZDZlLTI4MTg3OGI4M2Q4YSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=5A-C3xI63a_LsWzvaNC9y-ouaRXCXC2rCRQ-Tn6rHbU=)**
---
Donald Trump and his allies are working around the clock to undermine our nation's democratic values and even the Constitution itself — and with democracy itself on the line, we can't afford to give anything less than 110% to this fight.
So friend, if you're able, please pitch in anything you can before tomorrow's mid-month deadline to help us keep working around the clock to defend our democracy. The stakes are too high to sit this one out:
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: The stakes of this year's midterm elections are the highest they've ever been in our lifetimes. | Friend, The stakes of this year's midterm elections are the highest they've ever been in our lifetimes. So with Election Day getting closer and closer, I wanted to send a note about our strategy to protect democracy — in addition to explaining why support from our donors will be critical to executing on our plans. = There are three major pillars to our strategy this year: 1. Elect pro-democracy candidates to key offices up and down the ballot. We're targeting races in battleground states across the country that will be critical to the future of our democracy, and so far we've endorsed 14 outstanding candidates who are committed to doing everything in their power to preserve free and fair elections. 2. Protect voting rights and expand access to the ballot. With many GOP state legislatures continuing their crackdown on voting rights, it's as important as ever to make sure every eligible voter can make their voice heard. That's why we and our affiliates are fighting legal strategies from map manipulators and election deniers that could affect the future of fair maps, voting rights, and democracy itself. 3. Defend the integrity of our election infrastructure. This means ensuring our elections are properly and smoothly administered, and that election deniers are not successful in their efforts to corrupt the pool of election workers and infiltrate election administration from the inside. We already see movements like Stop the Steal organizing and we need to be ready to fight back. But all of this work takes resources, friend, and that's where supporters like you come in. We're counting on your help to meet our fundraising targets so we can keep up this critically important work, and right now we're coming up on a big mid-month deadline. | = Donald Trump and his allies are working around the clock to undermine our nation's democratic values and even the Constitution itself — and with democracy itself on the line, we can't afford to give anything less than 110% to this fight. So friend, if you're able, please pitch in anything you can before tomorrow's mid-month deadline to help us keep working around the clock to defend our democracy. The stakes are too high to sit this one out: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks, Kelly Burton President, NDRC = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, Kelly Burton, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 700 13th Street NW, Suite 600 Washington, DC 20005 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

Now, polls show me 1 point down.
#
**Peter, with just a _few_ hours to go before our midnight deadline, we're so close to hitting our fundraising goal – but at this moment, we're still falling short.**
_NBC News_ is calling Georgia the "most important swing state" of this year's elections, meaning our race could decide Senate control. That's why Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire GOP establishment are coming after me as their TOP target for defeat.
Trump held major rallies right here in Georgia with my opponent, Herschel Walker – and McConnell is mobilizing national Republicans to flood this race with MILLIONS to defeat me. **Now, polls show me _1 point down._**
I won my last race by a razor-thin margin – and with our entire Democratic agenda on the line – I mean it when I say we can't afford a single misstep. **The stakes have never been higher, friend, so if you've been waiting for the right time to make your very first gift, this is it:**

---
Friends, **One of my top priorities is making our communities safer.** I worked alongside fellow Democrats and President Biden to help state and local governments support public safety through the American Rescue Plan. I delivered funding for public safety resources in Albuquerque, Doña Ana County, and elsewhere through the last Omnibus Appropriations package. And I engaged early in the negotiations to pass the _Bipartisan Safer Communities Act_ , which implemented common-sense gun safety measures that will save lives. But our work to address public safety in our communities and put an end to preventable gun violence is not over. President Biden’s Safer America Plan is a crucial investment in public safety and crime prevention. We’re also working in the Senate to get our appropriations bills for next year across the finish line — which will make huge investments in public safety across our state. Here are just a few of the local public safety and homeland security projects that I’m working to get funding for:
* Public safety equipment that will help better respond to emergencies, investigate crime scenes, and prosecute violent criminals.

* Expansion of violence intervention and community safety programs.

* Legal support for Native American survivors of domestic violence.

* Funding for the Children’s Safehouse Forensic Interview Program, which provides trauma-informed forensic interviews of children, as well as adults with developmental disabilities, who are victims of abuse or witnesses of violent crime.

* Modernization of the New Mexico Department of Homeland Security and Emergency Management's emergency operations center.

* Fire engines for an array of local fire departments.

* And more!

[**If you agree that we need to invest in sweeping public safety and crime prevention reforms, add your name next to mine:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49235221/361355730/41879638?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220814_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmE2YTNkMS0zMDFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-tZTTVn1n_2jW4f0kVZHqaWDmUphLgh8k0NO57DB8VA=&emci=2727109f-a81a-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=02a6a3d1-301c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49235222/361355731/41879638?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20220814_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmE2YTNkMS0zMDFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-tZTTVn1n_2jW4f0kVZHqaWDmUphLgh8k0NO57DB8VA=&emci=2727109f-a81a-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&emdi=02a6a3d1-301c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&ceid=252045)

body:
My Democratic opponent is dangerous

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49231590/361331187/-877799329?refcode=header-img&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjVlZjhlNC0wZjFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7aSaV41R7kGMhk7ZoM77e-R1zfNK9Xynj6fuksH52IQ=)

Peter, politics is personal for me. Two years ago, I made history as the first openly queer Black woman elected in Florida at ANY level.

So I understand more than most the destructive toll of anti-gay discrimination and hate that Ron DeSantis and his Republicans champion.

[**I’m in this fight not just to make history as a Black queer woman, but to _make a difference_ for the people of Florida. That’s what I’ve done in office, and it remains my top priority. Will you chip in $3 toward our fight, then keep reading why this is so critical right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49231591/361331188/840503302?amount=3&refcode=MRFSH_20220814_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjVlZjhlNC0wZjFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7aSaV41R7kGMhk7ZoM77e-R1zfNK9Xynj6fuksH52IQ=) | **[$10,000 Pre-Primary Goal: Chip in $3 to re-elect Michele Rayner »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49231592/361331189/840503302?amount=3&refcode=MRFSH_20220814_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjVlZjhlNC0wZjFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7aSaV41R7kGMhk7ZoM77e-R1zfNK9Xynj6fuksH52IQ=)**
---
I am more determined than ever to protect vulnerable communities in Florida from DeSantis and his cronies. **But with just 9 days until our must-win primary race, I need your support.**

I’m up against a so-called “Democrat” in this primary election who received HUGE donations of GOP dark money from DeSantis-loving Republicans.

Peter, you read that right: **My _Democratic_ opponent is backed by GOP monsters who support anti-LGBTQ+ legislation.**

My opponent has more in common with Ron DeSantis than he does with working class folks like me and you — **that’s why Florida Republicans want him to win, Peter._We can’t let them._**

**[So I’m personally asking you to chip in $3 toward our $10,000 pre-primary goal to help me continue my fight to protect all Floridians. Can I count on you? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49231593/361331190/840503302?amount=3&refcode=MRFSH_20220814_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NjVlZjhlNC0wZjFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7aSaV41R7kGMhk7ZoM77e-R1zfNK9Xynj6fuksH52IQ=)**

This isn’t about politics, Peter — _it’s personal._ And it’s so important that I have your support so I can continue fighting the good fight in House District 62. Are you with me, Peter?

clean_body: My Democratic opponent is dangerous | = Peter, politics is personal for me. Two years ago, I made history as the first openly queer Black woman elected in Florida at ANY level. So I understand more than most the destructive toll of anti-gay discrimination and hate that Ron DeSantis and his Republicans champion. = | = I am more determined than ever to protect vulnerable communities in Florida from DeSantis and his cronies. But with just 9 days until our must-win primary race, I need your support. I’m up against a so-called “Democrat” in this primary election who received HUGE donations of GOP dark money from DeSantis-loving Republicans. Peter, you read that right: My Democratic opponent is backed by GOP monsters who support anti-LGBTQ+ legislation. My opponent has more in common with Ron DeSantis than he does with working class folks like me and you — that’s why Florida Republicans want him to win, Peter.We can’t let them. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = This isn’t about politics, Peter — it’s personal. And it’s so important that I have your support so I can continue fighting the good fight in House District 62. Are you with me, Peter? Thank you for all that you do. Proudly, = Michele Rayner | | Paid for by Michele For Florida, Inc. P.O. Box 35218, St. Petersburg, FL 33705 www.micheleforflorida.com Please, consider making a =. name: Tom Malinowski
subject: We just made history!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress
body:
As a diplomat in the Obama administration, Tom Malinowski stood up to dictators overseas. Now experts say his re-election could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.malinowskifornj.com/p/Bix_Do8Sr0m0vj5sQl0SCA2?unsubscribedata=%2BMhyRHfvjNUVZVwNheIaeR7R%2Bya1%2FckrK3JqzcHxF3DKo3PtYyubJ7oUogWSph0S7r0b1peKmMlgwcWJmp70QOxd4MNr27h%2BWrrW0B7WKF7r26HdNZGqf4kNOQ20amMQMnArBrsn3%2BKAKXe90byjqqYaQ2S7qIdQWUpMOm1WLcluIdmil0bODdUYOEj0f6hsx8QB9eLpN5mD%2FRnVczZ43c8I0lkNUEDEkEGFCvSc7CaWBT3di43TzwhRl6uyN7NSHU6MvutVH5UfvEkbyE5hzbNKuLqinvB3ESzXvtDv2qfe0TEC7z2KUasKLVkh4qLxvb6E8L4pHIm8bEMABzGsuFjXk0Zki8Pbo2E3PbgeUM%2FDvsh2MfKcygBYXUhuSRIBB2w9ar0t6qTCunLWWEYR3ilSYRjZK8xHPewPEJF%2Fj7JL8EkEjhlGVeGNJ6zM3wuV)

| |
---
Hi team,

The contrast could not be more stark.

On Friday, **our House majority sent the once-in-a-generation Inflation Reduction Act to President Biden for his signature.** Just as the pundits were declaring us dead and done, we delivered on our biggest promises: lowering the cost of health insurance and prescription drugs, restoring America’s leadership in clean energy, all while making corporations like Amazon pay taxes, and _reducing the deficit_ to tamp down inflation.

Meanwhile, the Republicans took to the airwaves, not to propose their own plans for fighting inflation or for bringing jobs back to America, but to compare American law enforcement to the Nazi Gestapo, to demand that we defund the FBI, and to call the United States a “banana republic,” simply because we remain a country where no one is above the law

A few weeks ago, I knocked on the door of a retired firefighter. He was not a Democrat. But when I asked him what his biggest challenge was, he told me it was the $4,000 a year he is paying for just one of the prescription drugs he needs. **The Inflation Reduction Act will cap his total out-of-pocket bill for drugs at $2,000. Democrats delivered that. Tom Kean Jr. and the Republicans were dead set against it.**

In the last few weeks, we also delivered the CHIPS and Science Act, to spur high tech manufacturing and innovation in America, the PACT Act, to help veterans suffering from toxic exposure, and the first gun violence prevention law in decades. We followed America’s biggest ever investment in infrastructure with our biggest ever commitment to fight climate change.

These breakthroughs are happening for one reason: Because engaged, concerned citizens like you voted, organized, and worked tirelessly to elect our Democratic majority in the first place. So thank you for the role YOU played to get us here.

Our next job is to PROTECT this progress. If the extremist GOP comes to power in November, they’ve promised two years of chaos and culture wars – a national abortion ban, endless impeachments, promotion of the Big Lie. They’ve now purged from the House virtually every moderate Republican who stood up to Trump, while embracing Tom Kean Jr., who promised to have Trump’s back “no matter what Trump does.”

Ours is one of THE most competitive House districts in the country. If we hold this seat, we can defend our entire House majority and keep making the progress we saw on Friday.

**[We’ve got less than three months to go, team. Let’s build on our momentum, put in the work, and WIN this. Chip in $10 or whatever you can right now to power this fight and keep leading the way towards progress:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49235338/361359834/1719613603?amount=10&refcode=TM_EM_FR_6MO_202208014_1_1&refcode2=4334c98e-321c-ed11-bd6e-281878b83d8a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MzM0Yzk4ZS0zMjFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ltLsnRF2R_qRlmBEr_NmrnUCMLXB9Pa4gx77X8uOXE=)** | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: As a diplomat in the Obama administration, Tom Malinowski stood up to dictators overseas. Now experts say his re-election could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Hi team, The contrast could not be more stark. On Friday, our House majority sent the once-in-a-generation Inflation Reduction Act to President Biden for his signature. Just as the pundits were declaring us dead and done, we delivered on our biggest promises: lowering the cost of health insurance and prescription drugs, restoring America’s leadership in clean energy, all while making corporations like Amazon pay taxes, and reducing the deficit to tamp down inflation. Meanwhile, the Republicans took to the airwaves, not to propose their own plans for fighting inflation or for bringing jobs back to America, but to compare American law enforcement to the Nazi Gestapo, to demand that we defund the FBI, and to call the United States a “banana republic,” simply because we remain a country where no one is above the law A few weeks ago, I knocked on the door of a retired firefighter. He was not a Democrat. But when I asked him what his biggest challenge was, he told me it was the $4,000 a year he is paying for just one of the prescription drugs he needs. The Inflation Reduction Act will cap his total out-of-pocket bill for drugs at $2,000. Democrats delivered that. Tom Kean Jr. and the Republicans were dead set against it. In the last few weeks, we also delivered the CHIPS and Science Act, to spur high tech manufacturing and innovation in America, the PACT Act, to help veterans suffering from toxic exposure, and the first gun violence prevention law in decades. We followed America’s biggest ever investment in infrastructure with our biggest ever commitment to fight climate change. These breakthroughs are happening for one reason: Because engaged, concerned citizens like you voted, organized, and worked tirelessly to elect our Democratic majority in the first place. So thank you for the role YOU played to get us here. Our next job is to PROTECT this progress. If the extremist GOP comes to power in November, they’ve promised two years of chaos and culture wars – a national abortion ban, endless impeachments, promotion of the Big Lie. They’ve now purged from the House virtually every moderate Republican who stood up to Trump, while embracing Tom Kean Jr., who promised to have Trump’s back “no matter what Trump does.” Ours is one of THE most competitive House districts in the country. If we hold this seat, we can defend our entire House majority and keep making the progress we saw on Friday. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks so much. Let’s do this! Tom * | Tom Malinowski served as a diplomat in the Obama administration, standing up to dictators overseas. Now he's standing up for our democracy as a Congressman representing New Jersey's 7th district — which experts say could be THE deciding race for control of the House this year. = = Paid for by Tom Malinowski for Congress Tom Malinowski for Congress P.O. name: Rep. Demings
subject: it's bigger than just me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
we're less than 100 days out from Election Day

---
| |
---
Friend, it's hard to believe that we're less than 100 days out from Election Day.
When I first made the decision to run for Senate, I knew this race would be one of the toughest I've ever faced. **And at its core, my campaign has always been about making the people I love proud. **
Growing up poor, Black and female in the 1960s South meant that I didn't have a whole lot – but I did have unconditional love. Sometimes I wonder who I would be and what I would be doing if I didn't have a family who was determined to make me shine at all costs.
Because the truth is, if my father hadn't taken an advance out on his paycheck to send me on a school trip to D.C., if my mother had never told me to "never tire of doing good," if I hadn't had the support system of my six older siblings, all of my success may not have been possible.
**So friend, this campaign started as part of my mission to never tire of doing good and as a way to make my loved ones proud – but now it's about more than that.**
**[Right now, the very soul of our nation is at risk, and this is likely to all come down to Florida. I cannot flip Florida blue without your support, so can I count on you to give $5 right now to defend our Senate majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49231640/361331295/1672908452?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4031-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDVlZjhlNC0wZjFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyUP2UIVpa-61EjQ-xFc5K92h4PgQ73cJND0uELcsXw=)**

With reproductive rights, voting rights, climate action and gun violence prevention reforms all hinging on whether or not Democrats can defend and expand our razor-thin Senate majority, my run for U.S. Senate in Florida is bigger than me.
**Friend, Floridians are voting RIGHT NOW, and with yesterday's news that this race is now officially TIED, I need more resources to reach them. [Please, as we enter the final phase of the election year, will you donate $5 before midnight tomorrow so I can fight back against the GOP's attacks, defeat Rubio and keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49231641/361331296/1672908452?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk4031-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDVlZjhlNC0wZjFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kyUP2UIVpa-61EjQ-xFc5K92h4PgQ73cJND0uELcsXw=)**

**Meet Mark:** Reverend Mark Holland is a fourth generation Kansan and a third generation United Methodist Pastor. He has dedicated his life to the service of others, as a father, pastor, community leader, elected official, and non-profit leader. Mark is the co-founder and executive director of Mainstream UMC, a global advocacy organization dedicated to greater inclusion in the church. He has served the Church in Kansas for over 25 years, most recently as the Senior Pastor of Trinity Community Church in Kansas City, Kansas for 19 years.

Friend, Georgia Republicans have undertaken a coordinated effort to strip their constituents of fundamental rights. **And Chris Carr has been one of the officials leading the charge.**

Just hours after _Roe v. Wade_ was struck down, Carr moved to enact HB 481 – Georgia’s restrictive abortion ban – putting the government right in the middle of the most personal of medical choices. He did this despite Georgia's constitution guaranteeing a right to privacy, and despite knowing that HB 481 would be devastating for lower-income and rural Georgians.

[**Polling shows that we have a very real chance to defeat Chris Carr, but we need the funds to reach as many Georgia voters as possible. clean_body: Chris Carr chose to make enacting a restrictive abortion ban a major campaign priority. = Friend, Georgia Republicans have undertaken a coordinated effort to strip their constituents of fundamental rights. And Chris Carr has been one of the officials leading the charge. Just hours after Roe v. He did this despite Georgia's constitution guaranteeing a right to privacy, and despite knowing that HB 481 would be devastating for lower-income and rural Georgians. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = The GOP is counting on voters simply watching as their rights are stripped away, but if we get voters fired up before Election Day, we can show them that Georgians are ready for a new direction. subject: GOP candidates “running like they’re hungry” to stay in power.

Peter,

Brain Kemp is telling his MAGA Republican allies that they need to “run like we’re hungry again” if they want to beat Stacey Abrams this November. He knows Georgia is getting bluer and bluer and the odds that Stacey will win in November are only going up — and he’s _terrified_.

But even though our chances of defeating Brian Kemp are improving, we’ve still got an uphill battle ahead of us. Here’s what’s on our to-do list before Election Day:
* **Contact thousands of voters in every corner of the state**
* **Make sure _everyone_ understands how important it is to cast their ballot**
* **Fight back against ongoing efforts to suppress the vote**

While Republicans are running like they’re hungry to flip Georgia back to red, **we need to work like we’re even _hungrier_ to keep Georgia blue.** And Peter, we need your help to get the job done.

**So please, make a donation to the Democratic Party of Georgia today to help us fight with everything we’ve got to defeat Brian Kemp and elect Democrats like Stacey Abrams this November:**

clean_body: We need to work like we’re even hungrier to defeat them in November. | | | | = Peter, Brain Kemp is telling his MAGA Republican allies that they need to “run like we’re hungry again” if they want to beat Stacey Abrams this November. He knows Georgia is getting bluer and bluer and the odds that Stacey will win in November are only going up — and he’s terrified. But even though our chances of defeating Brian Kemp are improving, we’ve still got an uphill battle ahead of us. Here’s what’s on our to-do list before Election Day: Contact thousands of voters in every corner of the state Make sure everyone understands how important it is to cast their ballot Fight back against ongoing efforts to suppress the vote While Republicans are running like they’re hungry to flip Georgia back to red, we need to work like we’re even hungrier to keep Georgia blue. And Peter, we need your help to get the job done. So please, make a donation to the Democratic Party of Georgia today to help us fight with everything we’ve got to defeat Brian Kemp and elect Democrats like Stacey Abrams this November:** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = Thank you, The Democratic Party of Georgia Team | | Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia. Team –
**First,** in 2019, Mike DeWine signed a bill banning abortion after six weeks in Ohio – before many people even know they’re pregnant.
**Then,** the Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , allowing Governor DeWine’s extreme ban to go into effect, disregarding that the vast majority of Ohioans support access to safe, legal abortion.
**Now,** we have to defeat him this fall and put an end to his draconian anti-choice agenda.
**[We need 250 more grassroots donations to reach our upcoming mid-month goal and stay on track to defeat Mike DeWine. Can you chip in $5 right now and help us get there?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49233045/361337007/229068718?refcode=nw_em_220814_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzBjZjI2Mi0xYTFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GGeMuDXZrOEAlJRbYs3TcXV_stN5ivBiW_FWRxAdVyI=)**
Mike DeWine has spent the last four decades in office cozying up to special interests and amassing a warchest to prop up his campaign. His tactic: If he can’t win on the issues – and with policies that are wildly out of step with the priorities of Ohioans, he can’t – then he’ll spend his way to victory.
I don’t have DeWine’s personal wealth, and I’ve spent my time in public service focusing on strengthening our community rather than turning a blind eye to the corruption in the Statehouse. So we’ll have to win a different way: By spreading the word about our vision for Ohio all across the state.
**[Ohio deserves better than what we’re getting under Mike DeWine. I need your help to defeat him this fall and get our state back on track. Please, rush $5 and help us reach our mid-month goal>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/49233046/361337008/229068718?refcode=nw_em_220814_1_t2&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODM5MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMzBjZjI2Mi0xYTFjLWVkMTEtYmQ2ZS0yODE4NzhiODNkOGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GGeMuDXZrOEAlJRbYs3TcXV_stN5ivBiW_FWRxAdVyI=)**
Onward,
Nan Whaley

body:
#
Peter,
We're proud to say that for emails just like this one so far in August, our average donation is $15.59.
**$15.59 is proof that grassroots power actually works.** Small-dollar donations helped send Pramila to Congress in 2016, 2018, and 2020. Grassroots contributions will keep Pramila in office in November AND help Pramila campaign to protect the Democratic majority in swing districts across the country. But only with your support.
If one out of every twelve people reading this email chipped in $15.59, we could reach our mid-month goal of $30,000 in no time. [**Will you donate $15.59, $3, or any amount before our mid-month deadline at 11:59pm tomorrow? Your donation today is even more important, because our fundraising has been trending downward — which is unsustainable.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/15728?refcode=em20220814-1513&t=1&akid=1513%2E420207%2EHdrWEY)
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/15728?refcode=em20220814-1513&t=20&akid=1513%2E420207%2EHdrWEY)**
Peter, there is real power in numbers. Your support — and that of other grassroots donors — adds up. Every dollar donated allows Pramila to continue focusing on legislating, supports her campaign, and ensures our progressive movement has the resources to grow.
Democrats have accomplished a lot in the face of special interests, but we know that there’s more to get done. And we know we must work hard to help Pramila deliver for our communities while protecting our Democratic majorities.
[**So, Peter, can you make your first contribution to Pramila’s campaign? Contribute $3, $15.59, or any amount to help us grow our movement and keep Pramila legislating for the people in Congress.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/15728?refcode=em20220814-1513&t=21&akid=1513%2E420207%2EHdrWEY)
Pramila doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money because she has always believed in the power of the people to enact real, lasting change. Thanks for chipping in today.
In solidarity,
Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager

name: Val Demings
subject: Did you see this brand-new poll? (We're tied!)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | | Friend, I'm reaching out because I wanted to personally share some incredible news:

After polls showed me trailing Marco Rubio by 2 points for months, a brand-new poll just came out on Monday: **It's 45-45. We're officially tied with Rubio in a race that could decide Senate control.**
---
I couldn't have done this without you, but now I need you more than ever.

As you read this, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are gearing up to pour millions into this race to bombard us with nonstop attack ads from now until Election Day. **That's because the GOP knows that if I defeat Rubio, it will virtually guarantee that Democrats keep Senate control. **** **

This poll is proof that we can win this. But I'm getting outspent in key areas of Florida, and the GOP is only going to start spending even more to try to defeat us after this latest poll.
**If we're going to counter their attacks, take the lead and protect our Senate majority, we need to raise $250,000 before midnight tonight – and I simply can't get there without your immediate donation.

That's why I'm asking you directly: Will you split $15 between my campaign and American Bridge PAC right now to help me take the lead in the polls, defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic Senate majority?**

clean_body: | | | Friend, I'm reaching out because I wanted to personally share some incredible news: After polls showed me trailing Marco Rubio by 2 points for months, a brand-new poll just came out on Monday: It's 45-45. We're officially tied with Rubio in a race that could decide Senate control. I couldn't have done this without you, but now I need you more than ever. As you read this, Mitch McConnell and the GOP are gearing up to pour millions into this race to bombard us with nonstop attack ads from now until Election Day. That's because the GOP knows that if I defeat Rubio, it will virtually guarantee that Democrats keep Senate control. This poll is proof that we can win this. But I'm getting outspent in key areas of Florida, and the GOP is only going to start spending even more to try to defeat us after this latest poll. If we're going to counter their attacks, take the lead and protect our Senate majority, we need to raise $250,000 before midnight tonight – and I simply can't get there without your immediate donation. That's why I'm asking you directly: Will you split $15 between my campaign and American Bridge PAC right now to help me take the lead in the polls, defeat Marco Rubio and defend our Democratic Senate majority? | | | = | = | = | = I know that with supporters like you by my side, we can do this. We can win this race. Thank you so much for all you do. – Val Demings Congresswoman Demings is only soliciting donations of up to $5,000 from individuals and multi-candidate political committees for American Bridge PAC's Contribution Account. She is not soliciting donations in any amount from corporations, labor organizations, foreign nationals, federal contractors, or national banks. American Bridge PAC is a hybrid super PAC. This email is sent on behalf of American Bridge PAC. | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by AB PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I’m reaching out with an important message today, and I hope you’ll hear me out:
body:
With conniving Republicans in the Senate blocking nearly every progressive bill passed through the House, change isn’t coming fast enough. | | |
---
| | Hi – I’m reaching out with an important message today, and I hope you’ll take the time to hear me out: As a Congressman, I’m doing everything in my power to create meaningful change – but with conniving Republicans in the Senate blocking nearly every progressive bill passed through the House, change isn’t coming fast enough. That’s why I’m looking to state legislatures this fall. State legislative races have been overlooked and underfunded for far too long – to the detriment of our democracy. State legislators have the power to enact impactful legislation to codify _Roe_ into state law, expand voting rights, reduce gun violence, and so much more. It’s past time we support them at the ballot box. **But the midterm elections are always challenging for the party in charge – and with the Republican party growing more extreme each day, we can’t afford to take _any_ risks. We need to mobilize _now._ ** [Please, can you chip in $7 to help elect Democrats to state legislatures across the country and protect our democracy from the extremist GOP? The stakes of this fight demand immediate action >>](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xjUtsAAdHONm_yHjn3wpZ3y5WLHGLRLj5Ckvilt8_MY2amESz6I9nRLZl7ra8XDBIppDnFg3jTli6t2DOIbJ9GiQc_j_l0WWUoVUfd05yzb2gFUjhIYZ8sGICfnwbcBI5udUXqYMldCUvclRubriZ9RJGJiyStTBph0j9uFYJFxlOm4vKzdn0WwX7TmPvq4NEwa8ffpchbluMhwp124J8N1d7iyK0YcRGDZMUoju86SpyECpy_yyxvpmXm50ChQAfvGQWKTw1luaOsY95aCJy_Lum8isHLUeC7E-pjB-bIyH_zd96qScZFFSKdFIsvewcT4pHKFmfvndJSzfP5C_os5l9KYv0_sWoTCwoMk4R0ymBC823bYUsN9jKZ6OEVC3hSyOHIS7R686oTGhm_owYjMfM-F_8x53T8mIKekqCUvvxHyRmBlCTtX0_Vcy5cXUQXKhBghr4idIGLVum_vKQ9/3ol/G4QL8BSOQ0OECBMBPEoPbg/h0/oEkxejSmQ68nkobj6xAaC71tQ4xrzHOTzj5X3zFGvew) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: With conniving Republicans in the Senate blocking nearly every progressive bill passed through the House, change isn’t coming fast enough. | | | | | Hi – I’m reaching out with an important message today, and I hope you’ll take the time to hear me out: As a Congressman, I’m doing everything in my power to create meaningful change – but with conniving Republicans in the Senate blocking nearly every progressive bill passed through the House, change isn’t coming fast enough. That’s why I’m looking to state legislatures this fall. State legislative races have been overlooked and underfunded for far too long – to the detriment of our democracy. State legislators have the power to enact impactful legislation to codify Roe into state law, expand voting rights, reduce gun violence, and so much more. It’s past time we support them at the ballot box. But the midterm elections are always challenging for the party in charge – and with the Republican party growing more extreme each day, we can’t afford to take any risks. We need to mobilize now. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | State Republicans have spent the past year pushing hateful legislation targeting voting rights, reproductive care, and the LGBTQ+ community. Abortion access, gun violence prevention measures, and voting rights are all at stake this November – and state legislatures are the key to protecting our values, our progressive agenda, and our democracy. subject: Here’s what’s on the line:

body:
| | | Peter, Look at blue states and what do you see:

_Skyrocketing crime. Tents of homelessness line the streets. Drug needles on the sidewalks._

**This is Blue America. And if the Democrats remain in power, they’ll bring the destruction of Liberal cities to YOUR neck of the woods.**

**There’s good news: we have a chance to stop them - but you need to act now. **

Our mid-month deadline is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT, and we MUST meet this goal if we’re going to take back the Senate and STOP the Democrat agenda from crushing our great country.

| | | Derek, **__**_This is what you expect to see when you’re ahead in the polls, and when it’s clear you’re the only candidate who can win in November..._ To no surprise, my primary opponents have started to send attacks and barbs my way since they know our 603 Mission is the frontrunner. They’re using all their resources to go after **_us_** instead of **_Hassan!_** Let me make something clear - this isn’t going to bring us down. I grew up poor working multiple jobs until eventually owning a small business that spans over 13 acres and employs more than 50 Granite Staters - _I’m not going to let some political jabs slow me down now!_ **But at the same time, these baseless attacks can add up if we don’t have the resources to immediately respond and correct the record. We can’t afford to let our historic mission to bring New Hampshire values to D.C. be held up in the primary.** **_[So if you can rush to our defenses today, please do so right now - you’ll help ensure we stay on track to defeat Maggie Hassan and stop Washington from holding back the rest of the country!>>](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDE2OTYyMzgwMzQwMTQwMDcyJmM9eTFtMCZlPTAmYj0xMDA0OTQ2ODUyJmQ9YzFzN3cxag==.GaWWkcrTpxA4zHxCj6ILholS5qqg2MReQM_a4JOit8U)_****_[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDE2OTYyMzgwMzQwMTQwMDcyJmM9eTFtMCZlPTAmYj0xMDA0OTQ2ODYyJmQ9cjhrMXIxYw==.y3w9ZaNUOHGP59UUm7u1aaB0cEsYyK5R1X9lhQ1-RGo)_**__**[](https://click.mlsend2.com/link/c/YT0yMDE2OTYyMzgwMzQwMTQwMDcyJmM9eTFtMCZlPTAmYj0xMDA0OTQ2ODY4JmQ9dzFmNm0xcQ==.svMHP-uW42ahFh203qFweLX7wsakfS47JPBeX3SBONs)**__

| | | If we let a speed bump in the primary slow us down, we are handing Hassan and Biden a free ticket to keep ruining our country and our economy. _There’s nothing this Ivy League lawyer won’t do to ensure that the far-left, Socialist agenda gets passed!_

* She’ll end the filibuster to pack the courts.
* She’ll nationalize our elections.
* Hassan might even _make D.C. a state_ to really expand Democrats’ total control over the rest of us!

That’s what we’re up against... So we can’t afford to lose sight of our ultimate goal: **firing Maggie Hassan, and replacing these political elites with real, hard-working, New Hampshire values!** If you can help with that by making sure we overcome these new attacks, please send in direct support below!__

name: Cheri Beasley for Senate
subject: 5️⃣ reasons to support Cheri Beasley today
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Here are five reasons why you should chip in to support Cheri Beasley today:
#

team, here are five reasons why your $5 donation to Cheri Beasley matters today:
1. Our opponent is an out-of-touch insider who has voted against North Carolina’s values time and again. Just this summer, Congressman Ted Budd voted against abortion rights, same-sex marriage, health care for our veterans, climate action and lower prescription drug prices (including a $35 cap on insulin).

2. Recent polls have shown us in a statistical tie with Ted Budd, and the National Journal just ranked us as one of the top three seats “most likely to flip” blue this November.

3. North Carolina is our best chance to guarantee Democrats protect and expand our razor-thin Senate majority. If we lose this race in November, we could be handing the majority back to Mitch McConnell.

4. Unlike our opponent who depends on corporate PAC money and super PAC outside spending to prop up his campaign, our campaign is powered by small-dollar grassroots donations from supporters like you.

5. Our fundraising numbers are not quite where we thought they’d be this week. With a race as tight as ours, and the election approaching rapidly, there’s simply no room to miss any of our goals.

[**So please: Will you rush in a $5 donation or more right now to support Cheri Beasley? We’ve got our mid-month fundraising deadline coming up tomorrow at midnight, so your support right now is crucial.**](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-aug22.dwKUnu&refcode=em220814-2-MA&t=1&akid=1458%2E357359%2EgBZKif)
**[DONATE $5](https://act.cheribeasley.com/go/2567?c0=cb-em-aug22.dwKUnu&refcode=em220814-2-MA&t=2&akid=1458%2E357359%2EgBZKif)**
Thank you for all that you do,
Team Beasley

Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
PO Box 28778
Raleigh, NC 27611
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you want to receive fewer emails, you may [submit this form to get only our most important updates](https://act.cheribeasley.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1458%2E357359%2EgBZKif). Emails like this are a critical tool for our campaign's fundraising and organizing efforts, but if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.cheribeasley.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1458%2E357359%2EgBZKif). If you would like to support Cheri's campaign for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina, please consider [making a donation](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beasley-em-2021?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1458_357359_gBZKif&akid=1458%2E357359%2EgBZKif) today to help us make history.

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Trump is backing Sarah Palin for Alaska’s vacant congressional seat, and the story just gets worse from there.
body:
Rep Sarah Palin?!
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Just when you think the Republican Party and American politics can't sink any lower, she's back.** **Sarah Palin.** The twice impeached Republican President--both times for betraying our national security--is being investigated under the Espionage Act for stealing classified documents and storing them among the bedbugs, sycophants and spies at Mar-a-Lago. So here comes Sarah Palin, who's run out of reality shows, cheap gimmicks and family values (her husband Todd divorced her a few years ago, accusing her of abuse), reentering a political system she helped debase in 2008 with her casual stupidity and endless conspiracies. [**Can you please join me in supporting Mary Peltola with $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford, and rejecting the hate and lies, once again, of Sarah Palin?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6ab61acf-d8e3-40fd-946f-c085ad971a5a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Palin's running for the vacant seat in Congress from Alaska. She was joined by Trump at a rally the very day Mar-a-Lago was raided, and put out the following crass, dishonest and riot-inciting statement (See FBI Building, Cincinnati) in response to the FBI raid to retrieve stolen state secrets----including some on nuclear technology--that Trump may have been selling to our enemies:** _**If Palin wins the seat from Alaska, she'll have the large soapbox afforded her by her fame from which to attack our democracy and institutions, weakening the rule of law. It would be like taking Marjorie Taylor Greene or Lauren Boebert and injecting them with steroids. In a few words, Sarah Palin's uniquely dangerous.**_ **Luckily we have a GREAT CHANCE to stop Palin and win this seat. Alaska has a top four primary and a ranked choice general election ballot. Native Alaskan and Democrat Mary Peltola is running for the seat, and if Democrats list her first, and she's listed second on enough ballots by independents and Republicans angry at the other Republicans for attacking their top choice, she can win!**
---
|
---
| | | | [DONATE NOW: MARY PELTOLA FOR ALASKA](https://default.salsalabs.org/T76568be0-233f-46d7-911b-63968bc293ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| **Peltola is a Yupik Eskimo, who would bring a valuable perspective to Congress. She is also an incredible person, elected to the first of her four terms in the state legislature at the age of 24. She has made sustainability a key part of her life and platform by directing the Kuskokwim River Inter Tribal Fish Commission representing more than 30 tribes working to restore salmon returns to their traditional spawning grounds. ** _Almost any human walking this Earth would be a huge upgrade over Sarah Palin, but with Peltola, we can bring diversity to Congress, add a terrific legislator and reject a dangerous demagogue who has proven in the past she'll tell any lie, smear any opponent--even putting them in danger as when she said then Senator Obama "palled around with terrorists"\--to get what she wants. Palin is like an out-of-date, crappy reality show that was cancelled a decade ago. Let's not bring that back into our lives and politics. _ [**Can you please join me in supporting Mary Peltola with $2, $5, $10 or whatever you can afford, and rejecting the hate and lies, once again, of Sarah Palin?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8998312d-935f-493b-b798-6cfba28ddd42/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for helping us stop Sarah Palin from gaining power yet again. Cliff
---
|
---

The Georgia Senate race is TOO CLOSE TO CALL. Multiple polls show that the contest between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is within the margin of error. It could go EITHER WAY.

We are counting on you, Peter, to help Herschel fight back against vicious and false attacks from the Left.

That's why we're reaching out with this critical **Georgia Campaign Update**. We have a MIDNIGHT FUNDRAISING DEADLINE, but _**we're still short of our goal.**_

clean_body: A new round of attacks have been launched at Herschel Walker. A new round of attacks have been launched at Herschel Walker. | The Georgia Senate race is TOO CLOSE TO CALL. Multiple polls show that the contest between Herschel Walker and Raphael Warnock is within the margin of error. It could go EITHER WAY. We are counting on you, Peter, to help Herschel fight back against vicious and false attacks from the Left. That's why we're reaching out with this critical Georgia Campaign Update. We have a MIDNIGHT FUNDRAISING DEADLINE, but we're still short of our goal. To match what Raphael Warnock is raising EVERY DAY, we need an additional 588 supporters to step up before 11:59 PM to help us stay out of the danger zone. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: This race is rated as a TOSS-UP because enough patriotic conservatives have donated to help keep it close. We're within striking distance, but Democrats are spending TENS OF MILLIONS to attack Herschel. With the help of National Democrats, Raphael Warnock and Chuck Schumer's Super PAC are running false and misleading attack ads. Unfortunately, we haven't had enough money to respond and set the record straight. Thanks, Team Herschel | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Alessandra Biaggi
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Alessandra Biaggi for Congress
body:
My opponent may have six-figure checks from Trump-endorsing super PACs, but...
#

Friends -
I'm writing to ask you to make your first online contribution — of $3 or anything you can — to my campaign for Congress. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request is so important, especially tonight.
Here's the truth:
Right now, there are just 9 days to go in this primary, and over the past week, **_hundreds of thousands of dollars from right-wing and dark money super PACs has poured into this race in support of my opponent._**
The corporate and political establishment are pulling out all the stops to try and defeat our progressive movement, and right now we need your support to make sure our message isn't drowned out here in the final days of this race.
That's why I need to ask:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to our grassroots campaign for Congress tonight? Every dollar will go directly toward fighting back against the surge of super PAC spending that's entered this primary.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?refcode=em220814-1-t1&refcode2=1018_59515_1X5FgJ&akid=1018%2E59515%2E1X5FgJ)
_If you 've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em220814-1-t1&refcode2=1018.59515.1X5FgJ&akid=1018%2E59515%2E1X5FgJ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em220814-1-t1&refcode2=1018.59515.1X5FgJ&akid=1018%2E59515%2E1X5FgJ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em220814-1-t1&refcode2=1018.59515.1X5FgJ&akid=1018%2E59515%2E1X5FgJ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em220814-1-t1&refcode2=1018.59515.1X5FgJ&akid=1018%2E59515%2E1X5FgJ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=em220814-1-t1&refcode2=1018.59515.1X5FgJ&akid=1018%2E59515%2E1X5FgJ)**
---
****
| **[Or another amount](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?express_lane=true&refcode=em220814-1-t1&refcode2=1018.59515.1X5FgJ&akid=1018%2E59515%2E1X5FgJ)**
---
****
There are a LOT of differences between the kind of campaign we're running, and the one my opponent is running. One of those differences I'm most proud of is how our campaigns are funded.
We're funding this thing the right way — no corporate PACs, no right-wing dark money, just a grassroots movement of real people standing together in solidarity and fighting for change.
My opponent may have six-figure checks from Trump-endorsing super PACs, but we have you, and we have each other. That's the power of a grassroots movement, and it's why we're going to win.
Sincerely, thank you for being a part of this team. And thank you for adding a contribution today if you can.
\- Alessandra
| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/biaggi-em-aug22/?refcode=em220814-1-t1&refcode2=1018.59515.1X5FgJ&akid=1018%2E59515%2E1X5FgJ)**
---
